ext\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"d9c2f895-031f-4b2e-8533-127d8d8de753\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"276dc8d0-edf9-42ad-b807-2df007b10137\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-30T10:34:41.549Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\n下面是对该仓库的梳理结论。**注意：这不是 Next.js / Node 项目**，根目录没有 &amp;#96;package.json&amp;#96;；业务代码在 **&amp;#96;lib/&amp;#96;**（Flutter/Dart），没有 &amp;#96;src/&amp;#96; 或 &amp;#96;app/&amp;#96;（Next 风格）目录。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 1. 整体目录结构（已排除 &amp;#96;node_modules&amp;#96;、&amp;#96;.git&amp;#96;）\\\\n\\\\n仓库约 **110 个文件**，核心是 **Flutter 应用** + 各平台工程 + 若干产品文档。\\\\n\\\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\\\nrhb/\\\\n├── lib/                    # Dart 业务与 UI（主代码）\\\\n├── android/                # Android 工程\\\\n├── ios/                    # iOS 工程\\\\n├── macos/                  # macOS 工程\\\\n├── web/                    # Web（index.html, manifest.json）\\\\n├── test/                   # widget_test.dart\\\\n├── assets/                 # pubspec 中声明，当前工作树内未见实际资源文件\\\\n├── pubspec.yaml / pubspec.lock\\\\n├── analysis_options.yaml\\\\n├── .env.example\\\\n├── .vscode/\\\\n├── .specstory/\\\\n├── README.md\\\\n├── PRD-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n├── 技术方案-MVP-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n├── 开发任务清单-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n├── User-Story-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n└── ChatGPT-AI 化妆教学 APP.md\\\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n&amp;#96;README.md&amp;#96; 里写的 &amp;#96;lib/core/&amp;#96;、&amp;#96;shared/widgets/&amp;#96; 等**在当前仓库里不存在**，以实际 &amp;#96;lib/&amp;#96; 为准。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. 技术栈（来自 &amp;#96;pubspec.yaml&amp;#96; 等）\\\\n\\\\n| 类别 | 技术 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| 框架 | **Flutter**（Dart SDK &amp;#96;^3.10.0&amp;#96;） |\\\\n| 状态管理 | **provider** |\\\\n| 路由 | **go_router** |\\\\n| 相机 | **camera** |\\\\n| 权限 | **permission_handler** |\\\\n| 人脸 | **google_mlkit_face_detection** |\\\\n| 图像 | **image** |\\\\n| UI | **cupertino_icons**, **flutter_svg** |\\\\n| 规范 | **flutter_lints** |\\\\n\\\\n声明的资源目录：&amp;#96;assets/images/&amp;#96;、&amp;#96;assets/makeup_styles/&amp;#96;、&amp;#96;assets/tutorial_data/&amp;#96;（当前 glob 未扫到文件，可能未提交或为空）。\\\\n\\\\n**没有**：&amp;#96;package.json&amp;#96;、后端框架、Prisma/SQLite 等数据库配置。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. 页面 / 路由（无 HTTP API）\\\\n\\\\n使用 **&amp;#96;go_router&amp;#96;**，路由在 &amp;#96;lib/app/router.dart&amp;#96;：\\\\n\\\\n| 路径 | 名称 | 页面 |\\\\n|------|------|------|\\\\n| &amp;#96;/&amp;#96; | home | &amp;#96;HomePage&amp;#96; |\\\\n| &amp;#96;/analysis&amp;#96; | analysis | &amp;#96;AnalysisPage&amp;#96; |\\\\n| &amp;#96;/tutorial&amp;#96; | tutorial | &amp;#96;TutorialPage&amp;#96; |\\\\n| &amp;#96;/result&amp;#96; | result | &amp;#96;ResultPage&amp;#96; |\\\\n\\\\n**没有** 已实现的 REST/GraphQL 路由或 &amp;#96;api/&amp;#96; 目录；&amp;#96;.env.example&amp;#96; 仅预留未来 API/分析/云同步占位。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. 数据库 schema / 表\\\\n\\\\n**仓库内没有数据库 schema**（无 Prisma、无 &amp;#96;.sql&amp;#96; 迁移、无 Drift/Hive 等）。\\\\n\\\\n“数据”主要是 **内存里的 Dart 模型**，可序列化 &amp;#96;toMap&amp;#96;/&amp;#96;fromMap&amp;#96;，但并非持久化表结构：\\\\n\\\\n- &amp;#96;FaceFeatureResult&amp;#96; + 枚举：&amp;#96;FaceShape&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;SkinTone&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;LipType&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;ConfidenceLevel&amp;#96;\\\\n- &amp;#96;MakeupProfile&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;TutorialStep&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;TargetRegion&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;OverlayStyle&amp;#96;\\\\n- &amp;#96;ScoreResult&amp;#96;\\\\n- &amp;#96;FacePoint&amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. 各功能模块实现程度（概览）\\\\n\\\\n| 模块 | UI/流程 | 业务逻辑 | 与 ML/相机集成 |\\\\n|------|---------|----------|----------------|\\\\n| 首页 | 基本完成 | 仅导航 | 无 |\\\\n| 面部分析 | 有页面与状态机 | **模拟**：延时 + 固定 &amp;#96;FaceFeatureResult&amp;#96; | &amp;#96;CameraService&amp;#96; / &amp;#96;FaceMeshService&amp;#96; **未接入** |\\\\n| 推荐 | Controller 有规则 | **&amp;#96;generateRecommendations&amp;#96; 未被任何页面调用** | 无 |\\\\n| 教程 | 步骤、进度、简易 CustomPaint | 默认 &amp;#96;MakeupProfile&amp;#96; 内嵌步骤 | 真实相机与 landmarks **未接入**；&amp;#96;OverlayRenderer&amp;#96; **未使用** |\\\\n| 评分 | 有结果页 UI | &amp;#96;ScoringController.calculateScore&amp;#96; **已实现但全项目无调用** → 结果页会一直 &amp;#96;CircularProgressIndicator&amp;#96; | 无 |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. &amp;#96;lib/&amp;#96; 下文件与职责（业务代码清单）\\\\n\\\\n### 入口与应用壳\\\\n\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/main.dart&amp;#96;**：&amp;#96;WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized()&amp;#96;，&amp;#96;runApp(MeetBeautyApp())&amp;#96;。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/app/app.dart&amp;#96;**：&amp;#96;MultiProvider&amp;#96; + &amp;#96;MaterialApp.router&amp;#96;，主题与 &amp;#96;appRouter&amp;#96;。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/app/router.dart&amp;#96;**：上述 4 条路由。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/shared/config/app_config.dart&amp;#96;**：应用名、版本、动画/相机/检测参数常量；注册 4 个 &amp;#96;ChangeNotifierProvider&amp;#96;。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/app/theme/app_theme.dart&amp;#96;**：Material 3 亮/暗主题。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/app/theme/app_colors.dart&amp;#96;**：品牌色与文本色等常量。\\\\n\\\\n### Feature：首页\\\\n\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/features/home/presentation/home_page.dart&amp;#96;**：欢迎页、卖点列表、&amp;#96;Start Learning&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;/analysis&amp;#96;；“Choose a Tutorial Style” 为 **TODO**。\\\\n\\\\n### Feature：面部分析\\\\n\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/features/analysis/presentation/analysis_page.dart&amp;#96;**：&amp;#96;initState&amp;#96; 里调用 &amp;#96;startAnalysis()&amp;#96;；相机区多为占位（图标/灰底）；展示 &amp;#96;FaceFeatureResult&amp;#96; 徽章；“Start Tutorial” 在完成分析后可用。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart&amp;#96;**：**无真实相机/ML**；&amp;#96;Future.delayed&amp;#96; 后写入写死的 &amp;#96;FaceFeatureResult(oval, warm, medium, high)&amp;#96;。\\\\n\\\\n### Feature：教程\\\\n\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart&amp;#96;**：全屏“相机”占位、&amp;#96;_OverlayPainter&amp;#96; 按 &amp;#96;TargetRegion&amp;#96; 画简单椭圆；上一步/下一步/完成 → &amp;#96;/result&amp;#96;；AR 与 landmarks 为 **TODO**。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/features/tutorial/application/tutorial_controller.dart&amp;#96;**：步骤状态机、默认 &amp;#96;natural_daily&amp;#96; 三步教程、&amp;#96;pause&amp;#96;/&amp;#96;resume&amp;#96;/&amp;#96;skip&amp;#96; 等。\\\\n\\\\n### Feature：结果\\\\n\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/features/result/presentation/result_page.dart&amp;#96;**：&amp;#96;Consumer\u003cScoringController\u003e&amp;#96; 若 &amp;#96;scoreResult == null&amp;#96; 则一直转圈；&amp;#96;Consumer\u003cTutorialController\u003e&amp;#96; 显示步数与时间；按钮回首页/再练。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/features/result/application/scoring_controller.dart&amp;#96;**：按完成率、跳过步数算分、星级与文案；需外部传入 &amp;#96;TutorialController&amp;#96; 调用 &amp;#96;calculateScore&amp;#96;（**当前无调用点**）。\\\\n\\\\n### Feature：推荐（仅逻辑层）\\\\n\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/features/recommendation/application/recommendation_controller.dart&amp;#96;**：根据 &amp;#96;FaceFeatureResult&amp;#96; 规则生成 &amp;#96;MakeupProfile&amp;#96; 列表（圆脸加 contour 模板 + 始终包含 natural_daily）；**无对应 UI**。\\\\n\\\\n### Services（已实现类，未接线）\\\\n\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/services/camera/camera_service.dart&amp;#96;**：前置相机初始化、&amp;#96;startImageStream&amp;#96; / &amp;#96;stopImageStream&amp;#96;。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart&amp;#96;**：ML Kit &amp;#96;FaceDetector&amp;#96;，从轮廓提取 &amp;#96;FacePoint&amp;#96;，&amp;#96;analyzeFeatures&amp;#96; 用宽高比粗分脸型（肤色/唇型仍为占位）。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart&amp;#96;**：基于画布的几何叠加（与 &amp;#96;FacePoint&amp;#96; 的高级方法多为占位 &amp;#96;null&amp;#96;）。\\\\n\\\\n### Shared models\\\\n\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart&amp;#96;**：特征枚举与结果模型。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/shared/models/makeup_profile.dart&amp;#96;**：教程步骤、妆造配置。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/shared/models/face_point.dart&amp;#96;**： landmark 点。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/shared/models/score_result.dart&amp;#96;**：评分结果。\\\\n- **&amp;#96;lib/shared/models/models.dart&amp;#96;**：barrel export。\\\\n\\\\n### 测试\\\\n\\\\n- **&amp;#96;test/widget_test.dart&amp;#96;**：挂载 &amp;#96;MeetBeautyApp&amp;#96;，断言出现 “Meet Beauty”。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 小结\\\\n\\\\n- 项目是 **Flutter MVP**：导航与页面骨架、教程状态机、评分算法草稿、ML Kit/相机服务类都已写，但 **分析页未用相机与 ML**、**推荐未接入流程**、**结果页未触发 &amp;#96;calculateScore&amp;#96;**，AR 叠加仍是屏幕中心几何图形。\\\\n- **没有 &amp;#96;package.json&amp;#96; 式前端栈**，也 **没有数据库表定义**；若你需要“表”，只能对应到上述 **Dart 模型字段**，而非 SQL。\\\\n\\\\n若你希望，我可以在 Agent 模式下帮你把 &amp;#96;ResultPage&amp;#96; 与 &amp;#96;ScoringController&amp;#96; 接上，或把 &amp;#96;AnalysisController&amp;#96; 与 &amp;#96;CameraService&amp;#96;/&amp;#96;FaceMeshService&amp;#96; 打通（Ask 模式下只能给方案，不能直接改代码）。\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1774866422841,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}}],\"name\":\"探索项目代码结构\",\"isFileListExpanded\":false,\"browserChipManuallyDisabled\":false,\"browserChipManuallyEnabled\":false,\"unifiedMode\":\"agent\",\"forceMode\":\"edit\",\"usageData\":{},\"allAttachedFileCodeChunksUris\":[],\"modelConfig\":{\"modelName\":\"composer-2\",\"maxMode\":false},\"subComposerIds\":[],\"subagentComposerIds\":[],\"capabilityContexts\":[],\"todos\":[],\"isQueueExpanded\":true,\"hasUnreadMessages\":false,\"gitHubPromptDismissed\":false,\"totalLinesAdded\":0,\"totalLinesRemoved\":0,\"addedFiles\":0,\"removedFiles\":0,\"isDraft\":false,\"isCreatingWorktree\":false,\"isApplyingWorktree\":false,\"isUndoingWorktree\":false,\"applied\":false,\"pendingCreateWorktree\":false,\"worktreeStartedReadOnly\":false,\"isBestOfNSubcomposer\":false,\"isBestOfNParent\":false,\"bestOfNJudgeWinner\":false,\"isSpec\":false,\"isProject\":false,\"isSpecSubagentDone\":false,\"isContinuationInProgress\":false,\"stopHookLoopCount\":0,\"branches\":[],\"speculativeSummarizationEncryptionKey\":\"SfLbi6zOYSZBrr+jwVr9vl8UGzofTUN1jz+hMyhFh1k=\",\"isNAL\":true,\"planModeSuggestionUsed\":false,\"debugModeSuggestionUsed\":false,\"conversationState\":\"~\",\"queueItems\":[],\"blobEncryptionKey\":\"+gNVLvuqMa0k3KDeu8r6w85dZEsYerAR0ADuh3lVeDE=\",\"isAgentic\":true,\"gitWorktree\":{\"worktreePath\":\"/Users/limingkun/.cursor/worktrees/meet-beauty__SSH__home-mac_/rhb\",\"commitHash\":\"8b57a7c4556b652545faf3c8a3a940e54ffff3bf\",\"branchName\":\"analyze-features-rhb\",\"mainWorktreePath\":\"/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty\"}}",
   "status": "success",

 }

-Parameters:
-
-&#96;&#96;&#96;json
-{
-  "name": "Phase1 相机AR链路打通",
-  "overview": "将已有的 CameraService、FaceMeshService、OverlayRenderer 三个服务接入 TutorialPage，实现\"实时相机预览 -\u003e 人脸关键点检测 -\u003e 基于 landmarks 的 AR overlay 渲染\"完整链路。",
-  "plan": "# Phase 1: 相机 + FaceMesh + AR 渲染链路打通\n\n## 当前状态\n\n三个核心服务已有基础代码但 **全部未接入任何页面**：\n\n- [CameraService](lib/services/camera/camera_service.dart) — 前置相机初始化、帧流控制，但无页面使用\n- [FaceMeshService](lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart) — ML Kit FaceDetector，返回扁平 &amp;#96;List\u003cFacePoint\u003e&amp;#96;，但无页面调用\n- [OverlayRenderer](lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart) — 画固定位置椭圆，未使用真实 landmarks\n- [TutorialPage](lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart) — 相机区域是黑底占位图标，overlay 画在屏幕中心固定位置\n\n## 目标数据流\n\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;mermaid\nflowchart LR\n  Camera[\"CameraService\\n实时帧流\"] --\u003e|CameraImage| Convert[\"InputImage\\n格式转换\"]\n  Convert --\u003e|InputImage| FaceMesh[\"FaceMeshService\\n人脸检测\"]\n  FaceMesh --\u003e|FaceLandmarks| Controller[\"FaceTrackingController\\n坐标变换+节流+平滑\"]\n  Controller --\u003e|landmarks| Renderer[\"OverlayPainter\\n唇部/脸颊 AR 渲染\"]\n  Camera --\u003e|CameraPreview| UI[\"TutorialPage\\n实时预览 + overlay 叠加\"]\n  Controller --\u003e|状态| UI\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\n\n## 具体任务\n\n### 1. 新建 FaceLandmarks 结构化模型\n\n**文件**: &amp;#96;lib/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart&amp;#96;\n\n当前 &amp;#96;FaceMeshService.detectFace&amp;#96; 返回扁平 &amp;#96;List\u003cFacePoint\u003e&amp;#96;，脸部轮廓和唇部点混在一起，无法区分用于不同区域渲染。需要创建结构化模型：\n\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;dart\nclass FaceLandmarks {\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e faceContour;       // 36 点，脸部轮廓\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperLipTop;       // 11 点，上唇外轮廓\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperLipBottom;    // 9 点，上唇内轮廓\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerLipTop;       // 9 点，下唇内轮廓\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerLipBottom;    // 9 点，下唇外轮廓\n  final FacePoint? noseBase;               // 鼻基部，用于计算脸颊\n  final FacePoint? leftEye;                // 左眼中心\n  final FacePoint? rightEye;               // 右眼中心\n  final Rect boundingBox;                  // 人脸边界框\n  final double? headAngleY;                // 头部偏转角度（侧脸检测）\n  final double? headAngleZ;                // 头部倾斜角度\n}\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\n\n### 2. 升级 FaceMeshService\n\n**文件**: [lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart](lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart)\n\n改动要点：\n- 新增 &amp;#96;CameraImage&amp;#96; -\u003e &amp;#96;InputImage&amp;#96; 转换方法（**关键技术难点**）\n  - Android: NV21 格式，用 &amp;#96;InputImage.fromBytes()&amp;#96; + &amp;#96;InputImageMetadata&amp;#96;\n  - iOS: bgra8888 格式，同上但不同 &amp;#96;InputImageFormat&amp;#96;\n  - 需要处理设备旋转方向 (&amp;#96;InputImageRotation&amp;#96;)\n- 修改 &amp;#96;detectFace&amp;#96; 返回 &amp;#96;FaceLandmarks?&amp;#96; 而非 &amp;#96;List\u003cFacePoint\u003e?&amp;#96;\n- 提取 ML Kit 的全部 4 组唇部轮廓 (&amp;#96;upperLipTop&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;upperLipBottom&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;lowerLipTop&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;lowerLipBottom&amp;#96;)\n- 提取 landmarks (&amp;#96;noseBase&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;leftEye&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;rightEye&amp;#96;)\n- 提取 &amp;#96;headEulerAngleY/Z&amp;#96; 用于侧脸判断\n\n核心转换代码参考：\n\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;dart\nInputImage? convertCameraImage(CameraImage image, CameraDescription camera) {\n  final rotation = _getRotation(camera.sensorOrientation);\n  final format = Platform.isAndroid \n      ? InputImageFormat.nv21 \n      : InputImageFormat.bgra8888;\n  final plane = image.planes.first;\n  return InputImage.fromBytes(\n    bytes: plane.bytes,\n    metadata: InputImageMetadata(\n      size: Size(image.width.toDouble(), image.height.toDouble()),\n      rotation: rotation,\n      format: format,\n      bytesPerRow: plane.bytesPerRow,\n    ),\n  );\n}\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\n\n### 3. 新建 FaceTrackingController\n\n**文件**: &amp;#96;lib/services/face_tracking_controller.dart&amp;#96;\n\n这是整个链路的**核心编排器**，作为 &amp;#96;ChangeNotifier&amp;#96; 注册到 Provider 树：\n\n- 持有 &amp;#96;CameraService&amp;#96; 和 &amp;#96;FaceMeshService&amp;#96; 实例\n- **帧节流**: 每 200ms 处理一帧（按 &amp;#96;AppConfig.analysisIntervalMs&amp;#96;），避免每帧都跑 ML Kit\n- **坐标变换**: 将 ML Kit 返回的图像坐标转换为 Flutter widget 坐标\n  - 考虑图像旋转（竖屏拍摄时图像实际是横向的）\n  - 前置相机镜像翻转\n  - 图像尺寸到预览 widget 尺寸的缩放\n- **点位平滑**: 对 landmarks 做指数移动平均（EMA），降低抖动\n- **状态管理**: &amp;#96;isTracking&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;isFaceDetected&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;landmarks&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;errorMessage&amp;#96;\n- **生命周期**: &amp;#96;startTracking()&amp;#96; / &amp;#96;stopTracking()&amp;#96; / &amp;#96;pauseTracking()&amp;#96; / &amp;#96;resumeTracking()&amp;#96;\n\n关键 API：\n\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;dart\nclass FaceTrackingController extends ChangeNotifier {\n  FaceLandmarks? get landmarks;\n  bool get isFaceDetected;\n  bool get isTracking;\n  CameraController? get cameraController;  // 给 CameraPreview 用\n  \n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e startTracking();\n  void stopTracking();\n  void updatePreviewSize(Size size);        // overlay 坐标变换用\n}\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\n\n坐标变换核心逻辑：\n\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;dart\nOffset imageToWidgetCoord(FacePoint p, Size imageSize, Size widgetSize, \n    InputImageRotation rotation, bool isFrontCamera) {\n  double x = p.x, y = p.y;\n  // 1. 根据 rotation 旋转坐标\n  // 2. 缩放到 widget 尺寸\n  // 3. 前置相机水平镜像\n  return Offset(transformedX, transformedY);\n}\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\n\n### 4. 升级 OverlayRenderer — 真实 landmarks 渲染\n\n**文件**: [lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart](lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart)\n\n改动要点：\n- **唇部渲染**: 用 &amp;#96;upperLipTop&amp;#96; + &amp;#96;lowerLipBottom&amp;#96;（外轮廓）构建闭合 Path，填充颜色\n- **脸颊渲染**: 根据 &amp;#96;noseBase&amp;#96; + &amp;#96;leftEye&amp;#96;/&amp;#96;rightEye&amp;#96; + &amp;#96;faceContour&amp;#96; 计算脸颊中心，画高斯模糊椭圆\n- 保留 fallback: 当 landmarks 不足时降级为当前的固定位置椭圆\n- 使用 &amp;#96;MaskFilter.blur&amp;#96; 实现腮红边缘柔化\n\n唇部 Path 构建示意：\n\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;dart\nPath buildLipPath(List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperLipTop, List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerLipBottom) {\n  final path = Path();\n  // upperLipTop 从左到右\n  path.moveTo(upperLipTop.first.x, upperLipTop.first.y);\n  for (final p in upperLipTop.skip(1)) { path.lineTo(p.x, p.y); }\n  // lowerLipBottom 从右到左（反向遍历）闭合\n  for (final p in lowerLipBottom.reversed) { path.lineTo(p.x, p.y); }\n  path.close();\n  return path;\n}\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\n\n### 5. 改造 TutorialPage — 接入真实相机和 AR\n\n**文件**: [lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart](lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart)\n\n改动要点：\n- **替换占位容器为 &amp;#96;CameraPreview&amp;#96;**: 使用 &amp;#96;FaceTrackingController.cameraController&amp;#96; 显示实时画面\n- **OverlayPainter 接收真实 landmarks**: 从 &amp;#96;FaceTrackingController.landmarks&amp;#96; 获取，传给 &amp;#96;OverlayRenderer.drawOverlay&amp;#96;\n- **lifecycle 管理**: 实现 &amp;#96;WidgetsBindingObserver&amp;#96;，切后台暂停 camera，回前台恢复\n- **状态 UI**: 未检测到人脸时显示提示（\"请将面部对准屏幕\"）\n- **权限处理**: 首次进入时请求相机权限，拒绝时显示引导\n- **dispose**: 页面退出时调用 &amp;#96;stopTracking()&amp;#96; 释放资源\n\n页面结构变更：\n\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\nStack\n  ├── CameraPreview (实时画面)\n  ├── CustomPaint / OverlayPainter (AR overlay，基于真实 landmarks)\n  ├── 人脸状态提示 (未检测到时显示)\n  ├── 关闭按钮 + 进度指示\n  └── 步骤卡片 + 操作按钮\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\n\n### 6. Provider 注册 \u0026 权限处理\n\n**文件**: [lib/shared/config/app_config.dart](lib/shared/config/app_config.dart)\n\n- 将 &amp;#96;FaceTrackingController&amp;#96; 注册到 &amp;#96;AppConfig.providers&amp;#96;\n- 在 TutorialPage 的 &amp;#96;initState&amp;#96; 中使用 &amp;#96;permission_handler&amp;#96; 请求相机权限\n- 权限拒绝时显示说明页面，引导用户去设置中开启\n\n## 风险与注意事项\n\n- **CameraImage -\u003e InputImage 转换** 是最容易出错的环节，Android/iOS 格式不同，旋转方向不同，需要逐平台调试\n- **坐标变换** 前置相机的镜像 + 旋转组合容易搞反，建议先在 debug 模式下绘制原始 landmark 点验证\n- **性能**: ML Kit 人脸检测在中端机上约 15-30ms/帧，配合 200ms 节流足够流畅；但要确保 &amp;#96;_isProcessing&amp;#96; 锁防止并发\n- **ML Kit 版本兼容**: &amp;#96;google_mlkit_face_detection: ^0.12.0&amp;#96; 已在 pubspec.yaml 中声明，需确认其 contour API 与代码匹配\n\n## 验收标准\n\n- TutorialPage 显示真实前置相机画面\n- 面部移动时，唇部 overlay 能跟随嘴唇位置\n- 脸颊 overlay 能跟随双颊位置\n- 连续运行 3 分钟无崩溃\n- 切后台再回来相机能正常恢复\n- 无人脸时显示友好提示\n",
-  "todos": [

+
+所有 6 个 todo 全部完成，&#96;flutter analyze&#96; 零错误。以下是本次实现的完整总结：
+
+---
+
+## Phase 1 实现完成
+
+### 新增/修改的文件
+
+| 文件 | 操作 | 说明 |
+|------|------|------|
+| &#96;lib/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart&#96; | 新建 | 结构化 landmarks 模型，含唇部4组轮廓、脸颊锚点、EMA平滑方法 |
+| &#96;lib/shared/models/models.dart&#96; | 修改 | 添加 &#96;face_landmarks.dart&#96; 导出 |
+| &#96;lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart&#96; | 重写 | 新增 &#96;CameraImage→InputImage&#96; 转换（Android NV21 / iOS bgra8888），&#96;detectFace&#96; 返回 &#96;FaceLandmarks?&#96; |
+| &#96;lib/services/face_tracking_controller.dart&#96; | 新建 | 核心编排器：帧节流(200ms)、图像坐标→widget坐标变换（含旋转+前置镜像+缩放）、EMA点位平滑、生命周期管理 |
+| &#96;lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart&#96; | 重写 | 基于真实 landmarks 绘制唇部闭合 Path；脸颊用 &#96;MaskFilter.blur&#96; 模糊椭圆；均带 fallback |
+| &#96;lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart&#96; | 重写 | 接入 &#96;CameraPreview&#96;、真实 AR overlay、无人脸提示、lifecycle 管理、权限申请+拒绝引导 |
+| &#96;lib/shared/config/app_config.dart&#96; | 修改 | 注册 &#96;FaceTrackingController&#96; 到 Provider 树 |
+| &#96;assets/{images,makeup_styles,tutorial_data}/&#96; | 新建 | 创建空目录，消除 pubspec 警告 |
+
+### 数据链路
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+相机帧 (NV21/bgra8888)
+  → FaceMeshService.convertCameraImage()
+  → FaceMeshService.detectFace() [ML Kit]
+  → FaceLandmarks (结构化)
+  → FaceTrackingController (旋转+镜像+缩放 → widget坐标, EMA平滑)
+  → TutorialPage (CameraPreview + _ArOverlayPainter)
+  → OverlayRenderer.drawOverlay() [唇部Path / 腮红模糊椭圆]
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+### 下一步调试建议
+
+真机调试时，如果 overlay 位置偏移，可以临时在 &#96;_ArOverlayPainter.paint&#96; 里调用 &#96;_renderer.debugDrawLandmarks(canvas, landmarks)&#96; 绘出原始关键点，直观验证坐标变换是否正确。
+

+## 当前状态总结
+
+**构建和启动**: 成功
+

+**注意事项**（Android 模拟器测试的局限性）：
+
+1. **模拟器只有 1 个后置摄像头**（&#96;CameraLensDirection.back&#96;），没有前置摄像头。代码中的 &#96;firstWhere(front, orElse: first)&#96; 会自动降级使用后置摄像头，功能链路不受影响。
+2. **模拟器的虚拟相机**输出的是一个动态场景（默认的虚拟房间），没有真实人脸，所以 ML Kit 不会检测到人脸——教程页会显示「请将面部对准屏幕」的提示，这是预期行为。
+3. 要真正验证 **人脸检测 + AR overlay 跟随** 的完整链路，建议用**真机**测试，或者在模拟器的高级设置中将虚拟摄像头源设置为一段包含人脸的视频。
+
+**你可以手动操作**：在模拟器上点击首页的「开始学习」按钮 → 进入分析页 → 再导航到教程页，观察相机预览是否正常显示。我这边会持续监控日志，帮你排查任何运行时报错。

+_**Agent (claude-4.6-sonnet-medium-thinking)**_
+
+当前项目只有一个基础的 widget 测试。以下是针对你这个 Flutter 项目，在模拟器上进行 BDD 测试的几种可行方案：
+
+---
+
+## 方案对比
+
+### 1. Flutter Integration Test（官方方案，最推荐）
+
+Flutter 自带的 &#96;integration_test&#96; 包，可以在真机/模拟器上运行完整的端到端测试。
+
+**优点**：
+- 官方支持，零额外依赖
+- 直接操作真实 Widget 树，能驱动完整页面流程
+- 可以 mock 系统服务（相机、权限等）
+- 支持截图断言
+
+**BDD 风格写法**（配合 &#96;flutter_gherkin&#96; 或直接用分组）：
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;dart
+// integration_test/tutorial_flow_test.dart
+import 'package:flutter_test/flutter_test.dart';
+import 'package:integration_test/integration_test.dart';
+
+void main() {
+  IntegrationTestWidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized();
+
+  group('教学流程', () {
+    testWidgets('用户从首页进入教学，完成三步后看到结果页', (tester) async {
+      await tester.pumpWidget(const MeetBeautyApp());
+      await tester.pumpAndSettle();
+
+      // Given: 用户在首页
+      expect(find.text('Meet Beauty'), findsOneWidget);
+
+      // When: 点击开始学习
+      await tester.tap(find.text('Start Learning'));
+      await tester.pumpAndSettle();
+
+      // Then: 进入分析页
+      expect(find.text('Face Analysis'), findsOneWidget);
+      // ...
+    });
+  });
+}
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+**运行命令**：
+&#96;&#96;&#96;bash
+flutter test integration_test/tutorial_flow_test.dart -d emulator-5554
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+**限制**：相机和 ML Kit 在集成测试中需要 mock，否则模拟器上无法获得真实人脸数据。
+
+---
+
+### 2. flutter_gherkin / bdd_widget_test（真正的 Gherkin BDD）
+
+如果你想用标准 Gherkin 语法（&#96;.feature&#96; 文件 + Given/When/Then）：
+
+**&#96;bdd_widget_test&#96;** — 编译期生成测试代码：
+&#96;&#96;&#96;gherkin
+# features/tutorial_flow.feature
+Feature: 教学流程
+  Scenario: 用户完成基础妆容教学
+    Given 用户在首页
+    When 用户点击开始学习按钮
+    Then 进入面部分析页
+    When 相机检测到人脸
+    And 用户点击进入教学
+    Then 显示教学步骤 "Apply Lip Color"
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+**&#96;flutter_gherkin&#96;** — 运行时解析，支持 integration test 模式，可以在模拟器上运行。
+
+**优点**：产品/QA 可读的自然语言用例
+**缺点**：引入额外依赖，step 定义有一定学习成本
+
+---
+
+### 3. Patrol（推荐用于需要系统交互的场景）
+
+[Patrol](https://patrol.leancode.co/) 是一个 Flutter 原生测试框架，核心优势是**可以操作系统级 UI**（权限弹窗、通知栏、系统设置等）。
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;dart
+patrolTest('授权相机后进入教学', ($) async {
+  await $.pumpWidget(const MeetBeautyApp());
+  
+  await $.tap(find.text('Start Learning'));
+  await $.pumpAndSettle();
+  
+  // Patrol 可以自动处理系统权限弹窗
+  await $.native.grantPermissionWhenInUse();
+  
+  // 验证相机预览出现
+  expect(find.byType(CameraPreview), findsOneWidget);
+});
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+**优点**：能处理 &#96;permission_handler&#96; 触发的系统弹窗（这在你的项目中很关键）
+**缺点**：配置稍重，需要额外的 native 依赖
+
+---
+
+### 4. Maestro（无代码 UI 自动化）
+
+[Maestro](https://maestro.mobile.dev/) 是一个独立于框架的移动端 UI 自动化工具，用 YAML 描述测试流程：
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml
+# .maestro/tutorial_flow.yaml
+appId: com.meetbeauty.meet_beauty
+---
+- launchApp
+- tapOn: "Start Learning"
+- assertVisible: "Face Analysis"
+- tapOn: "Capture &amp; Analyze"
+- assertVisible: "Your Features"
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+**运行**：
+&#96;&#96;&#96;bash
+maestro test .maestro/tutorial_flow.yaml
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+**优点**：无需写 Dart 代码，YAML 描述直观，截图 + 视频录制内置
+**缺点**：只能通过可见文本/accessibility label 定位，无法 mock 服务层
+
+---
+
+## 针对你的项目的推荐
+
+| 场景 | 推荐方案 |
+|------|----------|
+| 快速验证页面导航流程 | **Integration Test**（零额外依赖） |
+| 需要操作系统权限弹窗 | **Patrol** |
+| 产品/QA 协作写用例 | **bdd_widget_test** + Gherkin |
+| 快速冒烟测试，不想写代码 | **Maestro** |
+| 验证相机 + ML Kit 链路 | 需要 **mock CameraService/FaceMeshService** + Integration Test |
+
+对于你当前的 MVP 阶段，我建议 **Integration Test + mock 服务层** 作为起步——它不需要额外依赖，只需要在 &#96;pubspec.yaml&#96; 的 &#96;dev_dependencies&#96; 加上 &#96;integration_test&#96;（Flutter SDK 自带），然后对 &#96;CameraService&#96; 和 &#96;FaceMeshService&#96; 注入 mock 实现即可在模拟器上跑通完整流程。
+
+需要我切到 Agent 模式帮你搭建其中某个方案的骨架吗？
+
+---
+

+&lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;
+Now I have a thorough understanding of the entire codebase. Let me create a plan for Integration Test + mock service layer.
+
+Key challenges I need to address in the plan:
+
+1. **Dependency injection problem**: Currently, &#96;AnalysisController&#96; and &#96;FaceTrackingController&#96; create their own &#96;CameraService&#96; and &#96;FaceMeshService&#96; instances internally using &#96;= CameraService()&#96; / &#96;= FaceMeshService()&#96;. This makes them impossible to mock without refactoring. We need to change these to accept injected dependencies (constructor injection or optional parameters with defaults).
+
+2. **&#96;TutorialPage&#96; directly calls &#96;Permission.camera.request()&#96;**: This is a static method call that can't be easily mocked in integration tests.
+   
+3. **What needs to be mocked**: The &#96;CameraService&#96; and &#96;FaceMeshService&#96; won't work reliably in emulator tests, and I need to mock the permission handler to avoid system dialogs.
+
+4. **Test structure**: Integration tests go in &#96;integration_test/&#96; directory and use &#96;integration_test&#96; package.
+
+5. **Test scenarios** to cover: Home page → Analysis page navigation, the full tutorial flow across all 3 steps, Recommendation page → Tutorial page transitions, and Result page functionality like score display and practice again.
+
+Now for the implementation approach: I need to make services injectable so controllers accept optional &#96;CameraService&#96; and &#96;FaceMeshService&#96; parameters with production defaults, and refactor &#96;TutorialPage&#96; to request permissions through a service rather than directly. Then I'll create mock implementations of the controllers that skip real camera and ML Kit calls, and wrap everything in a test-specific app that provides these mocks through &#96;MultiProvider&#96;.
+
+Actually, I'm realizing there's a simpler path here—since both controllers are &#96;ChangeNotifier&#96;s already registered via Provider, I can just create mock versions that extend them and override methods like &#96;startTracking()&#96; and &#96;startAnalysis()&#96;, then swap them in during integration tests using &#96;MultiProvider&#96; without touching the production code at all.
+
+But there's a complication: &#96;TutorialPage&#96; directly calls &#96;Permission.camera.request()&#96; in addition to what happens inside the controllers, so permission handling is scattered across two places. For integration tests running on a real device or emulator, I could grant permissions via &#96;adb shell pm grant&#96;, or I'd need to mock the permission handler at the plugin level to centralize it.
+
+The cleaner solution is to mock at the controller level instead—I'll create mock versions of &#96;FaceTrackingController&#96; and &#96;AnalysisController&#96; that skip the actual camera and ML Kit work but still manage state transitions correctly, then inject these mocks through the provider in a test app wrapper.
+
+Actually, wait—extending the controllers won't work cleanly because their constructors will still instantiate the real services internally. The better approach is to refactor the controllers to accept optional service dependencies, create lightweight mock services, and inject those into the controllers during testing. Then I'll modify &#96;MeetBeautyApp&#96; to accept an optional providers list for tests, which keeps everything backward compatible while making the code testable.
+
+For the file structure, I need to refactor &#96;FaceTrackingController&#96; and &#96;AnalysisController&#96; to accept optional service parameters, extract permission logic from &#96;TutorialPage&#96; into &#96;FaceTrackingController&#96;, and set up mock services and a test app helper. The integration tests themselves should cover the main flows—homepage navigation, the full tutorial sequence, and the analysis-to-recommendation path.
+
+On the pubspec side, I could add mockito and build_runner, but manual mocks are actually cleaner here since I'm mocking entire services and controllers rather than verifying specific interactions.&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;
+

diff --git a/lib/app/app.dart b/lib/app/app.dart
index 41aba59..1f645a4 100644
--- a/lib/app/app.dart
+++ b/lib/app/app.dart
@@ -1,22 +1,34 @@
 import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
+import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
 import 'package:provider/provider.dart';
 import 'package:meet_beauty/app/router.dart';
 import 'package:meet_beauty/app/theme/app_theme.dart';
 import 'package:meet_beauty/shared/config/app_config.dart';
 
 class MeetBeautyApp extends StatelessWidget {
-  const MeetBeautyApp({super.key});
+  /// Optional providers override — pass in tests to inject mocks.
+  final List&lt;ChangeNotifierProvider&lt;ChangeNotifier&gt;&gt;? overrideProviders;
+
+  /// Optional router override — pass a fresh [GoRouter] in tests to avoid
+  /// shared navigation state between test cases.
+  final RouterConfig&lt;Object&gt;? routerConfig;
+
+  const MeetBeautyApp({
+    super.key,
+    this.overrideProviders,
+    this.routerConfig,
+  });
 
   @override
   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
     return MultiProvider(
-      providers: AppConfig.providers,
+      providers: overrideProviders ?? AppConfig.providers,
       child: MaterialApp.router(
         title: AppConfig.appName,
         theme: AppTheme.light,
         darkTheme: AppTheme.dark,
         themeMode: ThemeMode.system,
-        routerConfig: appRouter,
+        routerConfig: routerConfig ?? appRouter,
         debugShowCheckedModeBanner: false,
       ),
     );

feat: add integration test layer with mock services for emulator BDD testing

- Refactor FaceTrackingController and AnalysisController to accept optional
  CameraService/FaceMeshService via constructor injection for testability
- Add MeetBeautyApp.routerConfig override so each test gets a fresh GoRouter,
  preventing navigation state leakage between test cases
- Extract buildAppRouter() factory in router.dart; keep singleton appRouter
  for production
- Fix TutorialPage.dispose() using cached _tracker ref (safe context.read
  during didChangeDependencies); move stopTracking() to button callbacks to
  avoid notifyListeners() in locked widget-tree phases
- Add integration_test dev dependency and 14 test cases across 4 files:
  smoke_test, home_flow_test, analysis_recommendation_test, tutorial_flow_test
- Mock layer: MockCameraService (no-op hardware), MockFaceMeshService
  (static landmarks), MockFaceTrackingController, MockAnalysisController,
  MockScoringController, and buildTestApp() helper
- All 14 tests pass on Android emulator API 34 (sdk_gphone64_arm64)
EOF
)"</summary>

```bash
cd /Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty && git commit --trailer "Made-with: Cursor" -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add integration test layer with mock services for emulator BDD testing

- Refactor FaceTrackingController and AnalysisController to accept optional
  CameraService/FaceMeshService via constructor injection for testability
- Add MeetBeautyApp.routerConfig override so each test gets a fresh GoRouter,
  preventing navigation state leakage between test cases
- Extract buildAppRouter() factory in router.dart; keep singleton appRouter
  for production
- Fix TutorialPage.dispose() using cached _tracker ref (safe context.read
  during didChangeDependencies); move stopTracking() to button callbacks to
  avoid notifyListeners() in locked widget-tree phases
- Add integration_test dev dependency and 14 test cases across 4 files:
  smoke_test, home_flow_test, analysis_recommendation_test, tutorial_flow_test
- Mock layer: MockCameraService (no-op hardware), MockFaceMeshService
  (static landmarks), MockFaceTrackingController, MockAnalysisController,
  MockScoringController, and buildTestApp() helper
- All 14 tests pass on Android emulator API 34 (sdk_gphone64_arm64)
EOF
)"
```

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: cd /Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty && gh pr create --title "feat: add integration test layer with mock services for emulator BDD testing" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

- 新增完整的 integration test + mock 服务层，支持在 Android 模拟器上进行 BDD 风格端到端测试，无需真实摄像头或 ML Kit 硬件
- 对 `FaceTrackingController`、`AnalysisController`、`MeetBeautyApp`、`GoRouter` 做可测试性重构，支持依赖注入和 router 隔离
- 修复 `TutorialPage` 在 `dispose()`/`deactivate()` 阶段访问 Provider 导致的 widget tree 锁定崩溃

## Changes

### 可测试性重构
- `FaceTrackingController` / `AnalysisController`：构造函数支持可选的 `CameraService` / `FaceMeshService` 注入
- `MeetBeautyApp`：新增 `routerConfig` 参数，允许测试传入独立 `GoRouter` 实例
- `router.dart`：抽取 `buildAppRouter()` 工厂函数（测试每次创建新实例，避免导航状态跨用例泄漏）；保留 `appRouter` 单例供生产使用
- `TutorialPage`：在 `didChangeDependencies()` 中缓存 `_tracker` 引用；将 `stopTracking()` 从 `deactivate()`/`dispose()` 移至按钮点击回调，避免在 tree 锁定阶段触发 `notifyListeners()`

### Mock 服务层（`integration_test/mocks/`）
- `MockCameraService`：无操作，跳过真实摄像头初始化
- `MockFaceMeshService`：返回静态 `FaceLandmarks` / `FaceFeatureResult`
- `MockFaceTrackingController`：`startTracking()` 立即进入 tracking 状态
- `MockAnalysisController`：`startAnalysis()` 立即模拟面部检测
- `MockScoringController`：构造时预置结果，结果页不显示 loading

### 测试用例（14 个，全部通过 Android API 34 模拟器）

| 文件 | 用例 | 覆盖 |
|---|---|---|
| `smoke_test.dart` | 1 | 应用启动渲染 |
| `home_flow_test.dart` | 3 | 首页内容展示、导航到分析页 |
| `analysis_recommendation_test.dart` | 5 | 分析→检测→完成→推荐页→进入教学 |
| `tutorial_flow_test.dart` | 5 | 三步教学、上一步、完成→结果页、Home、再练一次 |

## Test plan

- [x] `flutter test integration_test/ -d emulator-5554` 全部通过（14/14）
- [x] `flutter analyze` 零错误零警告

Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
EOF
)" --base main</summary>

## Summary

- 新增完整的 integration test + mock 服务层，支持在 Android 模拟器上进行 BDD 风格端到端测试，无需真实摄像头或 ML Kit 硬件
- 对 `FaceTrackingController`、`AnalysisController`、`MeetBeautyApp`、`GoRouter` 做可测试性重构，支持依赖注入和 router 隔离
- 修复 `TutorialPage` 在 `dispose()`/`deactivate()` 阶段访问 Provider 导致的 widget tree 锁定崩溃

## Changes

### 可测试性重构
- `FaceTrackingController` / `AnalysisController`：构造函数支持可选的 `CameraService` / `FaceMeshService` 注入
- `MeetBeautyApp`：新增 `routerConfig` 参数，允许测试传入独立 `GoRouter` 实例
- `router.dart`：抽取 `buildAppRouter()` 工厂函数（测试每次创建新实例，避免导航状态跨用例泄漏）；保留 `appRouter` 单例供生产使用
- `TutorialPage`：在 `didChangeDependencies()` 中缓存 `_tracker` 引用；将 `stopTracking()` 从 `deactivate()`/`dispose()` 移至按钮点击回调，避免在 tree 锁定阶段触发 `notifyListeners()`

### Mock 服务层（`integration_test/mocks/`）
- `MockCameraService`：无操作，跳过真实摄像头初始化
- `MockFaceMeshService`：返回静态 `FaceLandmarks` / `FaceFeatureResult`
- `MockFaceTrackingController`：`startTracking()` 立即进入 tracking 状态
- `MockAnalysisController`：`startAnalysis()` 立即模拟面部检测
- `MockScoringController`：构造时预置结果，结果页不显示 loading

### 测试用例（14 个，全部通过 Android API 34 模拟器）

| 文件 | 用例 | 覆盖 |
|---|---|---|
| `smoke_test.dart` | 1 | 应用启动渲染 |
| `home_flow_test.dart` | 3 | 首页内容展示、导航到分析页 |
| `analysis_recommendation_test.dart` | 5 | 分析→检测→完成→推荐页→进入教学 |
| `tutorial_flow_test.dart` | 5 | 三步教学、上一步、完成→结果页、Home、再练一次 |

## Test plan

- [x] `flutter test integration_test/ -d emulator-5554` 全部通过（14/14）
- [x] `flutter analyze` 零错误零警告

## Summary

- 新增完整的 integration test + mock 服务层，支持在 Android 模拟器上进行 BDD 风格端到端测试，无需真实摄像头或 ML Kit 硬件
- 对 `FaceTrackingController`、`AnalysisController`、`MeetBeautyApp`、`GoRouter` 做可测试性重构，支持依赖注入和 router 隔离
- 修复 `TutorialPage` 在 `dispose()`/`deactivate()` 阶段访问 Provider 导致的 widget tree 锁定崩溃

## Changes

**可测试性重构**
- `FaceTrackingController` / `AnalysisController`：构造函数支持可选 `CameraService` / `FaceMeshService` 注入
- `MeetBeautyApp`：新增 `routerConfig` 参数，测试传入独立 `GoRouter` 实例避免状态泄漏
- `router.dart`：抽取 `buildAppRouter()` 工厂函数；保留 `appRouter` 单例供生产使用
- `TutorialPage`：缓存 `_tracker` 引用；将 `stopTracking()` 移至按钮回调，避免 tree 锁定阶段的 crash

**Mock 服务层（`integration_test/mocks/`）**
- `MockCameraService` / `MockFaceMeshService` / `MockFaceTrackingController` / `MockAnalysisController` / `MockScoringController`

| 文件 | 用例数 | 覆盖 |
|---|---|---|

'package:flutter_test/flutter_test.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:integration_test/integration_test.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport 'helpers/test_app.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nvoid main() {\\\\\\\\n  IntegrationTestWidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  group('首页流程', () {\\\\\\\\n    testWidgets('首页正确展示标题、副标题和功能亮点', (tester) async {\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pumpWidget(buildTestApp());\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(seconds: 2));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Meet Beauty'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('AI Makeup Coach'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Face Analysis'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('AR Tutorial'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Smart Scoring'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Start Learning'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    testWidgets('点击 Start Learning 导航到面部分析页', (tester) async {\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pumpWidget(buildTestApp());\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(seconds: 2));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('Start Learning'));\\\\\\\\n      // Wait for navigation animation to complete.\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(milliseconds: 500));\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(milliseconds: 500));\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(seconds: 1));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Face Analysis'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Your Features'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    testWidgets('首页主要功能区域全部可见', (tester) async {\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pumpWidget(buildTestApp());\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(seconds: 2));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Core content visible on screen.\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Meet Beauty'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Start Learning'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n 'package:flutter_test/flutter_test.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:integration_test/integration_test.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport 'helpers/test_app.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Give navigation/rebuild time without relying on pumpAndSettle.\\\\\\\\nFuture\u003cvoid\u003e _settle(WidgetTester tester) async {\\\\\\\\n  await tester.pump(const Duration(milliseconds: 300));\\\\\\\\n  await tester.pump(const Duration(milliseconds: 300));\\\\\\\\n  await tester.pump(const Duration(milliseconds: 500));\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Navigate from home → analysis → recommendation → tutorial.\\\\\\\\nFuture\u003cvoid\u003e _navigateToTutorial(WidgetTester tester) async {\\\\\\\\n  await tester.tap(find.text('Start Learning'));\\\\\\\\n  await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Analysis page: mock auto-detects face; Capture \u0026 Analyze is enabled.\\\\\\\\n  await tester.tap(find.text('Capture \u0026 Analyze'));\\\\\\\\n  await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Analysis complete; navigate to recommendations.\\\\\\\\n  await tester.tap(find.text('Get Recommendations'));\\\\\\\\n  await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Recommendation page: Start Learning enters tutorial.\\\\\\\\n  await tester.tap(find.text('Start Learning'));\\\\\\\\n  await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nvoid main() {\\\\\\\\n  IntegrationTestWidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  group('教学流程', () {\\\\\\\\n    testWidgets('进入教学页显示第一步内容', (tester) async {\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pumpWidget(buildTestApp());\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(seconds: 2));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await _navigateToTutorial(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Apply Lip Color'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('1 / 3'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    testWidgets('完成三步教学后进入结果页并显示分数', (tester) async {\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pumpWidget(buildTestApp());\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(seconds: 2));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await _navigateToTutorial(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Step 1 visible\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Apply Lip Color'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('下一步'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Step 1 → 2\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('下一步'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Add Blush - Left Cheek'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('2 / 3'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Back to step 1\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('上一步'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Apply Lip Color'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Forward again to step 2\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('下一步'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Step 2 → 3\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('下一步'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Add Blush - Right Cheek'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('完成教学'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('3 / 3'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Complete tutorial\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('完成教学'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Result page\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('out of 100'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Practice Again'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Home'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    testWidgets('步骤进度显示 1 / 3', (tester) async {\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pumpWidget(buildTestApp());\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(seconds: 2));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await _navigateToTutorial(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('1 / 3'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    testWidgets('结果页点击 Home 返回首页', (tester) async {\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pumpWidget(buildTestApp());\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(seconds: 2));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await _navigateToTutorial(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('下一步'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('下一步'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('完成教学'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('Home'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Meet Beauty'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    testWidgets('结果页点击 Practice Again 重新进入教学', (tester) async {\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pumpWidget(buildTestApp());\\\\\\\\n      await tester.pump(const Duration(seconds: 2));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await _navigateToTutorial(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('下一步'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('下一步'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('完成教学'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await tester.tap(find.text('Practice Again'));\\\\\\\\n      await _settle(tester);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      expect(find.text('Apply Lip Color'), findsOneWidget);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":135}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"9c239dfe-3985-4933-b689-aaf0d6214ffc\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"5e236987-e3eb-48f3-8282-76b03b8dcf7b\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-30T15:01:28.820Z\\\", tester.pump(const Duration(milliseconds: 300));\\\\\\\\n  await tester.pump(const Duration(milliseconds: 500));\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nvoid main() {\\\\\\\\n 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:provider/provider.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/app/app.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/app/router.dart' show buildAppRouter;\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/features/tutorial/application/tutorial_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/features/recommendation/application/recommendation_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/features/result/application/scoring_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/services/face_tracking_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport '../mocks/mock_analysis_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport '../mocks/mock_face_tracking_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport '../mocks/mock_scoring_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Build a [MeetBeautyApp] with mock services injected via Provider.\\\\\\\\n///\\\\\\\\n/// A fresh [GoRouter] is created for every call so that navigation state\\\\\\\\n/// does not leak between test cases.\\\\\\\\n///\\\\\\\\n/// [withFace] – if true, the [MockFaceTrackingController] will simulate a\\\\\\\\n/// detected face with pre-built [FaceLandmarks], enabling overlay painting.\\\\\\\\nWidget buildTestApp({bool withFace = false}) {\\\\\\\\n  return MeetBeautyApp(\\\\\\\\n    routerConfig: buildAppRouter(),\\\\\\\\n    overrideProviders: [\\\\\\\\n      ChangeNotifierProvider\u003cAnalysisController\u003e(\\\\\\\\n        create: (_) =\u003e MockAnalysisController(),\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      ChangeNotifierProvider\u003cTutorialController\u003e(\\\\\\\\n        create: (_) =\u003e TutorialController(),\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      ChangeNotifierProvider\u003cRecommendationController\u003e(\\\\\\\\n        create: (_) =\u003e RecommendationController(),\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      ChangeNotifierProvider\u003cScoringController\u003e(\\\\\\\\n        create: (_) =\u003e MockScoringController(),\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      ChangeNotifierProvider\u003cFaceTrackingController\u003e(\\\\\\\\n        create: (_) =\u003e MockFaceTrackingController(withFace: withFace),\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n port 'package:meet_beauty/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/services/camera/camera_service.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport 'mock_camera_service.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'mock_face_mesh_service.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// A [AnalysisController] that skips real camera and returns fake results.\\\\\\\\n///\\\\\\\\n/// [startAnalysis] immediately publishes a fake [FaceLandmarks] as if a face\\\\\\\\n/// were detected, unblocking the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Capture \u0026 Analyze\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" button.\\\\\\\\n/// [completeAnalysis] synchronously sets a fixed [FaceFeatureResult].\\\\\\\\nclass MockAnalysisController extends AnalysisController {\\\\\\\\n  MockAnalysisController()\\\\\\\\n      : super(\\\\\\\\n          cameraService: MockCameraService(),\\\\\\\\n          faceMeshService: MockFaceMeshService(),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e startAnalysis() async {\\\\\\\\n    // Simulate: camera ready + face detected immediately.\\\\\\\\n    // We bypass the real camera init and image stream by directly\\\\\\\\n    // mutating the accessible state via the parent's protected fields.\\\\\\\\n    // Since the parent fields are private, we use notifyListeners after\\\\\\\\n    // updating via the backing mock service.\\\\\\\\n    //\\\\\\\\n    // Simplest approach: override the public getters directly.\\\\\\\\n    _fakeLandmarks = MockFaceMeshService.fakeLandmarks;\\\\\\\\n    _initialized = true;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  bool _initialized = false;\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks? _fakeLandmarks;\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? _fakeFeatureResult;\\\\\\\\n  bool _analysisComplete = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  bool get isCameraInitialized =\u003e _initialized;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  CameraStatus get cameraStatus =\u003e _initialized\\\\\\\\n      ? CameraStatus.ready\\\\\\\\n      : CameraStatus.uninitialized;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks? get currentLandmarks =\u003e _fakeLandmarks;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? get featureResult =\u003e _fakeFeatureResult;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  bool get isAnalysisComplete =\u003e _analysisComplete;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  bool get isAnalyzing =\u003e false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e completeAnalysis() async {\\\\\\\\n    _fakeFeatureResult = MockFaceMeshService.fakeFeatureResult;\\\\\\\\n    _analysisComplete = true;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void reset() {\\\\\\\\n    _initialized = false;\\\\\\\\n    _fakeLandmarks = null;\\\\\\\\n    _fakeFeatureResult = null;\\\\\\\\n    _analysisComplete = false;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":77}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"3eb80bf7-9d61-473d-b357-8aa1ab585e21\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"46dc385f-53db-45db-85e9-bb26dbdce19d\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-30T15:01:28.820 'package:camera/camera.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/services/camera/camera_service.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// A no-op [CameraService] for integration tests.\\\\\\\\n///\\\\\\\\n/// - [initialize] succeeds immediately without touching real hardware.\\\\\\\\n/// - [startImageStream] is silent (no frames will arrive).\\\\\\\\n/// - [isInitialized] returns true after [initialize] is called.\\\\\\\\n/// - [status] reports [CameraStatus.ready] after [initialize].\\\\\\\\nclass MockCameraService extends CameraService {\\\\\\\\n  bool _initialized = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  bool get isInitialized =\u003e _initialized;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  CameraStatus get status =\u003e\\\\\\\\n      _initialized ? CameraStatus.ready : cameraStatus;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e initialize() async {\\\\\\\\n    debugPrint('MockCameraService: initialize() called (no-op)');\\\\\\\\n    _initialized = true;\\\\\\\\n    cameraStatus = CameraStatus.ready;\\\\\\\\n    cameraErrorMessage = null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void startImageStream(Function(CameraImage) onImage) {\\\\\\\\n    // No real camera — silently ignore.\\\\\\\\n    debugPrint('MockCameraService: startImageStream() called (no-op)');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void stopImageStream() {\\\\\\\\n    debugPrint('MockCameraService: stopImageStream() called (no-op)');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    _initialized = false;\\\\\\\\n    debugPrint('MockCameraService: dispose() called (no-op)');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":46}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"62079b43-c36b-4a7d-8285-1c65c7f3eee1\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"e59ec16f-1926-4291-ac97-ec2becf8da79\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-30T15:01:28.820Z\\\",\\\ 'package:camera/camera.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:google_mlkit_face_detection/google_mlkit_face_detection.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_point.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// A stub [FaceMeshService] that returns pre-built data without ML Kit.\\\\\\\\n///\\\\\\\\n/// By default [detectFace] returns null (no face detected).\\\\\\\\n/// Set [simulateFaceDetected] to true to have it return [fakeLandmarks].\\\\\\\\nclass MockFaceMeshService extends FaceMeshService {\\\\\\\\n  bool simulateFaceDetected;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  MockFaceMeshService({this.simulateFaceDetected = false});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// A minimal [FaceLandmarks] object with plausible coordinates (400×600 image).\\\\\\\\n  static FaceLandmarks get fakeLandmarks =\u003e FaceLandmarks(\\\\\\\\n        faceContour: _oval,\\\\\\\\n        upperLipTop: _lipTop,\\\\\\\\n        upperLipBottom: _lipTop,\\\\\\\\n        lowerLipTop: _lipBottom,\\\\\\\\n        lowerLipBottom: _lipBottom,\\\\\\\\n        noseBase: const FacePoint(x: 200, y: 340),\\\\\\\\n        leftEye: const FacePoint(x: 160, y: 260),\\\\\\\\n        rightEye: const FacePoint(x: 240, y: 260),\\\\\\\\n        boundingBox: const Rect.fromLTWH(100, 100, 200, 300),\\\\\\\\n        headAngleY: 0,\\\\\\\\n        headAngleZ: 0,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  static const List\u003cFacePoint\u003e _oval = [\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint(x: 100, y: 200), FacePoint(x: 150, y: 150),\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint(x: 200, y: 140), FacePoint(x: 250, y: 150),\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint(x: 300, y: 200), FacePoint(x: 300, y: 300),\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint(x: 200, y: 400), FacePoint(x: 100, y: 300),\\\\\\\\n  ];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  static const List\u003cFacePoint\u003e _lipTop = [\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint(x: 170, y: 370), FacePoint(x: 190, y: 365),\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint(x: 200, y: 363), FacePoint(x: 210, y: 365),\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint(x: 230, y: 370),\\\\\\\\n  ];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  static const List\u003cFacePoint\u003e _lipBottom = [\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint(x: 170, y: 390), FacePoint(x: 190, y: 395),\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint(x: 200, y: 396), FacePoint(x: 210, y: 395),\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint(x: 230, y: 390),\\\\\\\\n  ];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Pre-built feature result used by [analyzeFeatures].\\\\\\\\n  static const FaceFeatureResult fakeFeatureResult = FaceFeatureResult(\\\\\\\\n    faceShape: FaceShape.oval,\\\\\\\\n    skinTone: SkinTone.warm,\\\\\\\\n    lipType: LipType.medium,\\\\\\\\n    confidenceLevel: ConfidenceLevel.high,\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  InputImage? convertCameraImage(\\\\\\\\n    CameraImage image,\\\\\\\\n    CameraDescription camera,\\\\\\\\n  ) =\u003e\\\\\\\\n      null; // Not needed — no real image stream in tests.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cFaceLandmarks?\u003e detectFace(InputImage image) async {\\\\\\\\n    return simulateFaceDetected ? fakeLandmarks : null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? analyzeFeatures(FaceLandmarks landmarks) =\u003e\\\\\\\\n      fakeFeatureResult;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    // ML Kit detector never initialised, nothing to close.\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":81}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"d485e261-6cd8-44b3-9a71-5dc66fd45975\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"2ddb36af-1b50-4deb-bb4d-550af425b258\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-30T15:01:28.820Z\\\",\\\ 'package:meet_beauty/services/face_tracking_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport 'mock_camera_service.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'mock_face_mesh_service.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// A [FaceTrackingController] that skips real camera and ML Kit.\\\\\\\\n///\\\\\\\\n/// After [startTracking], the controller immediately enters\\\\\\\\n/// [TrackingState.tracking].  Set [withFace] to true to also publish a fake\\\\\\\\n/// [FaceLandmarks] so tests can verify face-detected behaviour.\\\\\\\\nclass MockFaceTrackingController extends FaceTrackingController {\\\\\\\\n  final bool withFace;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  MockFaceTrackingController({this.withFace = false})\\\\\\\\n      : super(\\\\\\\\n          cameraService: MockCameraService(),\\\\\\\\n          faceMeshService: MockFaceMeshService(),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e startTracking() async {\\\\\\\\n    // Jump straight to tracking — no camera, no permissions.\\\\\\\\n    if (withFace) {\\\\\\\\n      // Publish fake landmarks so the overlay painter has data.\\\\\\\\n      // We reach into the parent's landmark field via the exposed setter path:\\\\\\\\n      // call the internal state setter directly.\\\\\\\\n      _setFakeLandmarks();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Use parent's _setState via public method indirection isn't possible,\\\\\\\\n    // so we notify listeners by calling the internal helper via super's\\\\\\\\n    // notifyListeners — instead we just override state completely via a\\\\\\\\n    // lightweight reset trick:\\\\\\\\n    //\\\\\\\\n    // Because _state is private in the parent, we expose it via a thin\\\\\\\\n    // override: call stopTracking first (idle) then re-enter tracking.\\\\\\\\n    // Actually the cleanest way here is to override the state getter too.\\\\\\\\n    _tracking = true;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  bool _tracking = false;\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks? _fakeLandmarks;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _setFakeLandmarks() {\\\\\\\\n    _fakeLandmarks = MockFaceMeshService.fakeLandmarks;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Override public API that the UI queries.\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  TrackingState get state =\u003e\\\\\\\\n      _tracking ? TrackingState.tracking : TrackingState.idle;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  bool get isTracking =\u003e _tracking;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks? get landmarks =\u003e _fakeLandmarks;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  bool get isFaceDetected =\u003e _fakeLandmarks != null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void stopTracking() {\\\\\\\\n    _tracking = false;\\\\\\\\n    _fakeLandmarks = null;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void pauseTracking() {\\\\\\\\n    _tracking = false;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void resumeTracking() {\\\\\\\\n    _tracking = true;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":85}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"a3bda282-e722-4e1e-a0c9-f05ecbb231e8\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"13752360-6b99-4dae-9fdf-00f8127deacf\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-30T15:01:28.820Z\\\",\\\ 'package:meet_beauty/features/result/application/scoring_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/features/tutorial/application/tutorial_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/score_result.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// A [ScoringController] that pre-populates a fake [ScoreResult] so the\\\\\\\\n/// result page renders immediately without waiting for [calculateScore].\\\\\\\\nclass MockScoringController extends ScoringController {\\\\\\\\n  MockScoringController() {\\\\\\\\n    // Seed a result directly without calling notifyListeners during build.\\\\\\\\n    // calculateScore triggers notifyListeners, which is unsafe in a constructor\\\\\\\\n    // during a build phase.  We replicate just the score assignment here.\\\\\\\\n    _seedScore();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _seedScore() {\\\\\\\\n    // Directly set the score via the public calculate path but deferred.\\\\\\\\n    // Use a fake TutorialController only for the data the method needs.\\\\\\\\n    calculateScore(_FakeTutorialController());\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Minimal [TutorialController]-like data source used to seed the score.\\\\\\\\nclass _FakeTutorialController implements TutorialController {\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  int get completedStepsCount =\u003e 3;\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  int get totalSteps =\u003e 3;\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  int get skippedStepsCount =\u003e 0;\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  Duration? get tutorialDuration =\u003e const Duration(minutes: 1, seconds: 30);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // All other members are unused by calculateScore.\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  dynamic noSuchMethod(Invocation invocation) =\u003e super.noSuchMethod(invocation);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":37}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"1b822aab-c299-44a0-b692-57e214967254\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"91e56a71-8253-42fc-ba19-144bedaa7514\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"20 Meet Beauty - AI Makeup Coaching App\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAn AI-powered makeup learning application that provides personalized tutorials with real-time AR guidance.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Face Analysis**: AI-powered facial feature detection and analysis\\\\\\\\n- **Personalized Recommendations**: Custom makeup tutorials based on your face shape, skin tone, and lip type\\\\\\\\n- **AR Tutorial Overlay**: Real-time visual guidance for makeup application\\\\\\\\n- **Progress Scoring**: Instant feedback on your makeup application\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Flutter** - Cross-platform mobile development\\\\\\\\n- **Google ML Kit** - Face detection and landmarks\\\\\\\\n- **Provider** - State management\\\\\\\\n- **go_router** - Navigation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Project Structure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nlib/\\\\\\\\n  app/                    # App-level configuration\\\\\\\\n    theme/                # Theme and colors\\\\\\\\n    app.dart              # Root app widget\\\\\\\\n    router.dart           # Navigation routes\\\\\\\\n  core/                   # Core utilities\\\\\\\\n    constants/\\\\\\\\n    utils/\\\\\\\\n    logger/\\\\\\\\n  features/               # Feature-based modules\\\\\\\\n    home/                 # Home page\\\\\\\\n    analysis/             # Face analysis feature\\\\\\\\n    recommendation/       # Makeup recommendations\\\\\\\\n    tutorial/             # AR tutorial feature\\\\\\\\n    result/               # Scoring and results\\\\\\\\n  services/               # Infrastructure services\\\\\\\\n    camera/               # Camera management\\\\\\\\n    facemesh/             # Face detection\\\\\\\\n    overlay/              # AR overlay rendering\\\\\\\\n  shared/                 # Shared components\\\\\\\\n    models/               # Data models\\\\\\\\n    widgets/              # Reusable widgets\\\\\\\\n    config/               # App configuration\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Getting Started\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Flutter SDK 3.11+\\\\\\\\n- Xcode (for iOS development)\\\\\\\\n- Android Studio (for Android development)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Installation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. Clone the repository\\\\\\\\n2. Install dependencies:\\\\\\\\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n   flutter pub get\\\\\\\\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. Run the app:\\\\\\\\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n   flutter run\\\\\\\\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Development Status\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThis project is currently in MVP development phase. See the following documents for details:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- [PRD-AI化妆教学APP.md](./PRD-AI化妆教学APP.md) - Product Requirements Document\\\\\\\\n- [技术方案-MVP-AI化妆教学APP.md](./技术方案-MVP-AI化妆教学APP.md) -
