\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"f8504814-ac5c-4249-8f15-a29b0f44a258\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"1d872197-a46c-4fd0-9ec4-aee432806643\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-30T15:01:28.820Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"以下是根据仓库只读查看整理的结果。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 1. 目录树（测试相关 + 你关心的根级项）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nmeet-beauty/\\\\n├── pubspec.yaml\\\\n├── README.md\\\\n├── PRD-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n├── 技术方案-MVP-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n├── 开发任务清单-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n├── User-Story-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n├── ChatGPT-AI 化妆教学 APP.md\\\\n├── test/\\\\n│   └── widget_test.dart\\\\n├── integration_test/\\\\n│   ├── smoke_test.dart\\\\n│   ├── home_flow_test.dart\\\\n│   ├── analysis_recommendation_test.dart\\\\n│   ├── tutorial_flow_test.dart\\\\n│   ├── helpers/\\\\n│   │   └── test_app.dart\\\\n│   └── mocks/\\\\n│       ├── mock_analysis_controller.dart\\\\n│       ├── mock_camera_service.dart\\\\n│       ├── mock_face_mesh_service.dart\\\\n│       ├── mock_face_tracking_controller.dart\\\\n│       └── mock_scoring_controller.dart\\\\n├── .github/          （不存在）\\\\n├── Makefile          （不存在）\\\\n└── scripts/          （不存在）\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n说明：&#96;build/&#96;、&#96;.dart_tool/&#96;、&#96;.git/&#96; 等未写入树；&#96;ios/Runner/.../README.md&#96; 为 Xcode 资源说明，与 Flutter 测试无关。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. &#96;pubspec.yaml&#96; 中的测试相关依赖\\\\n\\\\n&#96;dev_dependencies&#96; 里与测试直接相关的是：\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;flutter_test&#96;**（&#96;sdk: flutter&#96;）— 单元 / widget 测试与 &#96;testWidgets&#96; 等 API  \\\\n- **&#96;integration_test&#96;**（&#96;sdk: flutter&#96;）— 集成测试驱动与 &#96;IntegrationTestWidgetsFlutterBinding&#96;  \\\\n- **&#96;flutter_lints&#96;** — 静态分析 / lint，不执行测试但常配合 CI 使用  \\\\n\\\\n生产依赖里没有单独的 &#96;mockito&#96;、&#96;fake_async&#96; 等测试专用包；集成测试里的 mock 是手写子类。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. &#96;integration_test/&#96; 各文件用途摘要\\\\n\\\\n| 文件 | 用途 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| **&#96;smoke_test.dart&#96;** | 冒烟：启动 &#96;buildTestApp()&#96;，固定 &#96;pump&#96; 时间（避免 &#96;pumpAndSettle&#96; 挂起），断言首页出现 &#96;Meet Beauty&#96;。 |\\\\n| **&#96;home_flow_test.dart&#96;** | 首页：标题/副标题/功能亮点文案、&#96;Start Learning&#96; 点击后进入面部分析页、主要区域可见性。 |\\\\n| **&#96;analysis_recommendation_test.dart&#96;** | 分析→推荐：从首页进分析页 UI；&#96;Capture \u0026 Analyze&#96; 后出现 &#96;Get Recommendations&#96;；推荐页文案与 &#96;Start Learning&#96; 进教学页、&#96;3 steps&#96; 等。 |\\\\n| **&#96;tutorial_flow_test.dart&#96;** | 教学全流程：经首页→分析→推荐进入教学；步骤 1/2/3、上一步/下一步、&#96;完成教学&#96; 到结果页（含分数文案）、&#96;Home&#96; / &#96;Practice Again&#96; 行为。 |\\\\n| **&#96;helpers/test_app.dart&#96;** | 组装测试用 &#96;MeetBeautyApp&#96;：每次新建 &#96;GoRouter&#96;，通过 &#96;overrideProviders&#96; 注入 &#96;MockAnalysisController&#96;、&#96;MockScoringController&#96;、&#96;MockFaceTrackingController&#96; 等；&#96;TutorialController&#96; / &#96;RecommendationController&#96; 为真实实现。 |\\\\n| **&#96;mocks/mock_camera_service.dart&#96;** | 无真实相机：&#96;initialize&#96; 立即成功，&#96;startImageStream&#96; 空操作。 |\\\\n| **&#96;mocks/mock_face_mesh_service.dart&#96;** | 无 ML Kit：静态 &#96;fakeLandmarks&#96; / &#96;fakeFeatureResult&#96;，&#96;detectFace&#96; 可按开关返回假脸。 |\\\\n| **&#96;mocks/mock_analysis_controller.dart&#96;** | 替代真实分析链路：&#96;startAnalysis&#96; 立即“有脸”、可 &#96;completeAnalysis&#96; 产出固定特征结果。 |\\\\n| **&#96;mocks/mock_face_tracking_controller.dart&#96;** | 替代实时追踪：&#96;startTracking&#96; 直接进入 tracking；可选 &#96;withFace&#96; 发布假 landmarks。 |\\\\n| **&#96;mocks/mock_scoring_controller.dart&#96;** | 结果页：构造时用内部逻辑配合假 &#96;TutorialController&#96; 数据，让分数界面可立即断言。 |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. &#96;test/&#96;（非 integration）\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;test/widget_test.dart&#96;**：默认风格的 widget 测试，直接 &#96;pumpWidget(const MeetBeautyApp())&#96;，断言首页 &#96;Meet Beauty&#96;（未使用 &#96;integration_test&#96; 的 mock 注入路径）。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. 根目录文档与其它检查结果\\\\n\\\\n- **根目录 &#96;README.md&#96;**：存在，含功能说明、技术栈、&#96;lib/&#96; 结构、安装与运行，并链接到 PRD / 技术方案 / 任务清单等中文文档。  \\\\n- **&#96;.github/&#96;**：**不存在**（无 GitHub Actions 等工作流目录）。  \\\\n- **&#96;Makefile&#96;**：**不存在**。  \\\\n- **&#96;scripts/&#96;&#96;：**不存在**。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. 现有文档列表（便于你索引）\\\\n\\\\n**项目根目录（产品/技术向）**\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;README.md&#96;  \\\\n- &#96;PRD-AI化妆教学APP.md&#96;  \\\\n- &#96;技术方案-MVP-AI化妆教学APP.md&#96;  \\\\n- &#96;开发任务清单-AI化妆教学APP.md&#96;  \\\\n- &#96;User-Story-AI化妆教学APP.md&#96;  \\\\n- &#96;ChatGPT-AI 化妆教学 APP.md&#96;  \\\\n\\\\n**其它路径**\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;ios/Runner/Assets.xcassets/LaunchImage.imageset/README.md&#96;（启动图资源说明）  \\\\n- &#96;.specstory/&#96; 下多份会话/历史类 &#96;.md&#96;（工具生成，非项目正式说明文档）\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n**小结**：测试结构以 &#96;integration_test/&#96; 为主，通过 &#96;helpers/test_app.dart&#96; + &#96;mocks/&#96; 避开真机相机与 ML；&#96;pubspec&#96; 使用官方 &#96;flutter_test&#96; 与 &#96;integration_test&#96;；根目录有完整 &#96;README&#96; 与多份中文规划文档；当前仓库无 &#96;.github/&#96;、&#96;Makefile&#96; 和 &#96;scripts/&#96;。\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1774877864142,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":22,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":18,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":19,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":33,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":32,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":23,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":16,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":24,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":21,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":31,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"探索项目测试相关文件结构\",\"isFileListExpanded\":false,\"browserChipManuallyDisabled\":false,\"browserChipManuallyEnabled\":false,\"unifiedMode\":\"agent\",\"forceMode\":\"edit\",\"usageData\":{},\"allAttachedFileCodeChunksUris\":[],\"modelConfig\":{\"modelName\":\"composer-2\",\"maxMode\":false},\"subComposerIds\":[],\"subagentComposerIds\":[],\"capabilityContexts\":[],\"todos\":[],\"isQueueExpanded\":true,\"hasUnreadMessages\":false,\"gitHubPromptDis {
```json
  "name": "Testing Docs",
  "overview": "在项目根目录新建 &#96;TESTING.md&#96;，完整记录集成测试的架构设计、运行命令、Mock 层说明和编写新测试的方法，同时在 &#96;README.md&#96; 的 Getting Started 段落里加一行指向该文档的链接。",
  "plan": "# 测试文档计划\n\n## 目标\n\n新建一份独立的 [&#96;TESTING.md&#96;](TESTING.md)，内容与项目已有的产品/技术文档风格一致；同时在 [&#96;README.md&#96;](README.md) 的 Getting Started 区域补充指向该文档的链接。\n\n## TESTING.md 结构\n\n### 1. Overview\n- 测试策略：integration test + mock 服务层，无需真实摄像头/ML Kit\n- 测试框架：&#96;flutter_test&#96; + &#96;integration_test&#96;（SDK 内置，无第三方 mock 库）\n\n### 2. Test Architecture\n\n用 mermaid 展示分层关系：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\ngraph TD\n  TestFile[\"Test File\"] --\u003e buildTestApp[\"buildTestApp()\"]\n  buildTestApp --\u003e MeetBeautyApp\n  MeetBeautyApp --\u003e freshRouter[\"buildAppRouter()\"]\n  MeetBeautyApp --\u003e mockProviders[\"Mock Providers\"]\n  mockProviders --\u003e MockAnalysisController\n  mockProviders --\u003e MockFaceTrackingController\n  mockProviders --\u003e MockScoringController\n  MockAnalysisController --\u003e MockCameraService\n  MockAnalysisController --\u003e MockFaceMeshService\n  MockFaceTrackingController --\u003e MockCameraService\n  MockFaceTrackingController --\u003e MockFaceMeshService\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3. Running Tests\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# 列出可用设备\nflutter devices\n\n# 运行全部集成测试（需 Android 模拟器或真机）\nflutter test integration_test/ -d \u003cdevice-id\u003e\n\n# 运行单个测试文件\nflutter test integration_test/home_flow_test.dart -d \u003cdevice-id\u003e\n\n# 运行 widget/unit 测试（不需要设备）\nflutter test test/\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n\u003e **注意**：&#96;pumpAndSettle()&#96; 在 integration test + GoRouter 组合下会无限挂起，所有测试用 &#96;pump(Duration)&#96; 替代。\n\n### 4. Mock Layer\n\n每个 mock 的职责与关键行为：\n\n| 文件 | 替代目标 | 关键行为 |\n|---|---|---|\n| &#96;mocks/mock_camera_service.dart&#96; | &#96;CameraService&#96; | &#96;initialize()&#96; 立即成功，&#96;startImageStream&#96; 空操作 |\n| &#96;mocks/mock_face_mesh_service.dart&#96; | &#96;FaceMeshService&#96; | 返回静态 &#96;fakeLandmarks&#96; / &#96;fakeFeatureResult&#96; |\n| &#96;mocks/mock_face_tracking_controller.dart&#96; | &#96;FaceTrackingController&#96; | &#96;startTracking()&#96; 直接进入 tracking 状态 |\n| &#96;mocks/mock_analysis_controller.dart&#96; | &#96;AnalysisController&#96; | &#96;startAnalysis()&#96; 立即\"有脸\"，&#96;completeAnalysis()&#96; 产出固定特征 |\n| &#96;mocks/mock_scoring_controller.dart&#96; | &#96;ScoringController&#96; | 构造时预置分数，结果页无 loading |\n\n### 5. Test Coverage\n\n| 文件 | 用例数 | 覆盖流程 |\n|---|---|---|\n| &#96;smoke_test.dart&#96; | 1 | 应用启动、首页渲染 |\n| &#96;home_flow_test.dart&#96; | 3 | 首页内容展示、导航到分析页 |\n| &#96;analysis_recommendation_test.dart&#96; | 5 | 分析→检测→完成→推荐页→进入教学 |\n| &#96;tutorial_flow_test.dart&#96; | 5 | 三步教学、上一步、完成→结果页、Home、再练一次 |\n\n### 6. Writing New Tests\n\n步骤说明：\n1. 新建 &#96;integration_test/xxx_test.dart&#96;，调用 &#96;IntegrationTestWidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized()&#96;\n2. 用 &#96;buildTestApp()&#96; 构建 widget，用 &#96;pump(Duration(seconds: N))&#96; 等待渲染\n3. 用 &#96;tester.tap(find.text('...'))&#96; 模拟操作，导航用 &#96;pump(Duration(milliseconds: N))&#96; 分段等待\n4. 如需扩展 mock（如模拟权限拒绝），继承对应 mock 类覆盖所需 getter\n5. 运行 &#96;flutter analyze&#96; 确保无错误后在模拟器验证\n\n### 7. Known Limitations\n\n- &#96;pumpAndSettle()&#96; 与 GoRouter 不兼容，禁止使用\n- &#96;TutorialPage&#96; 在 &#96;deactivate()&#96;/&#96;dispose()&#96; 阶段不能调 &#96;notifyListeners()&#96;，&#96;stopTracking()&#96; 已移至按钮回调\n- 模拟器不提供真实人脸数据，AR 渲染 pipeline 需在真机上验证\n\n## README.md 修改\n\n在 &#96;## Getting Started&#96; 的 &#96;Run the app&#96; 命令后面补充：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n4. Run integration tests (requires Android emulator or device):\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   flutter test integration_test/ -d \u003cdevice-id\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   See [TESTING.md](./TESTING.md) for full testing guide.\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n",
  "todos": [
    {
      "content": "创建 TESTING.md，包含架构图、运行命令、Mock 层说明、用例清单、编写指南和已知限制",

      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "在 README.md 的 Getting Started 段落补充集成测试命令和 TESTING.md 链接",
      "id": "update-readme",
      "status": "pending"
    }
  ]
}
```

'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/app/theme/app_colors.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass HomePage extends StatelessWidget {\\\\\\\\n  const HomePage({super.key});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\\\\\\\\n    return Scaffold(\\\\\\\\n      body: SafeArea(\\\\\\\\n        child: Padding(\\\\\\\\n          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24.0),\\\\\\\\n          child: Column(\\\\\\\\n            crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,\\\\\\\\n            children: [\\\\\\\\n              const Spacer(flex: 2),\\\\\\\\n              // Logo and Title\\\\\\\\n              Column(\\\\\\\\n                children: [\\\\\\\\n                  Container(\\\\\\\\n                    width: 120,\\\\\\\\n                    height: 120,\\\\\\\\n                    decoration: BoxDecoration(\\\\\\\\n                      color: AppColors.primaryLight,\\\\\\\\n                      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(30),\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                    child: const Icon(\\\\\\\\n                      Icons.face_retouching_natural,\\\\\\\\n                      size: 64,\\\\\\\\n                      color: AppColors.primary,\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                  ),\\\\\\\\n                  const SizedBox(height: 24),\\\\\\\\n                  Text(\\\\\\\\n                    'Meet Beauty',\\\\\\\\n                    style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineLarge,\\\\\\\\n                  ),\\\\\\\\n                  const SizedBox(height: 8),\\\\\\\\n                  Text(\\\\\\\\n                    'AI Makeup Coach',\\\\\\\\n                    style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.bodyLarge?.copyWith(\\\\\\\\n                          color: AppColors.textSecondary,\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                  ),\\\\\\\\n                ],\\\\\\\\n              ),\\\\\\\\n              const Spacer(flex: 2),\\\\\\\\n              // Feature highlights\\\\\\\\n              Column(\\\\\\\\n                children: [\\\\\\\\n                  _FeatureItem(\\\\\\\\n                    icon: Icons.face,\\\\\\\\n                    title: 'Face Analysis',\\\\\\\\n                    description: 'Get personalized makeup recommendations',\\\\\\\\n                  ),\\\\\\\\n                  const SizedBox(height: 16),\\\\\\\\n                  _FeatureItem(\\\\\\\\n                    icon: Icons.video_camera_front,\\\\\\\\n                    title: 'AR Tutorial',\\\\\\\\n                    description: 'Learn with real-time AR guidance',\\\\\\\\n Scoring',\\\\\\\\n                    description: 'Track your progress with instant feedback',\\\\\\\\n                  ),\\\\\\\\n                ],\\\\\\\\n              ),\\\\\\\\n              const Spacer(flex: 2),\\\\\\\\n              // Start Button\\\\\\\\n              ElevatedButton(\\\\\\\\n                onPressed: () =\u003e context.go('/analysis'),\\\\\\\\n                style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(\\\\\\\\n                  padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),\\\\\\\\n                  shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(\\\\\\\\n                    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),\\\\\\\\n                  ),\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n                child: const Text(\\\\\\\\n                  'Start Learning',\\\\\\\\n 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/app/theme/app_colors.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:provider/provider.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass TutorialPage extends StatefulWidget {\\\\\\\\n  const TutorialPage({super.key});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  State\u003cTutorialPage\u003e createState() =\u003e _TutorialPageState();\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass _TutorialPageState extends State\u003cTutorialPage\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void initState() {\\\\\\\\n    super.initState();\\\\\\\\n    WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback((_) {\\\\\\\\n      context.read\u003cTutorialController\u003e().startTutorial();\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\\\\\\\\n    return Scaffold(\\\\\\\\n      body: Consumer\u003cTutorialController\u003e(\\\\\\\\n        builder: (context, controller, child) {\\\\\\\\n          return Column(\\\\\\\\n            children: [\\\\\\\\n              // Camera with AR overlay\\\\\\\\n              Expanded(\\\\\\\\n                flex: 3,\\\\\\\\n                child: Stack(\\\\\\\\n                  children: [\\\\\\\\n                    // Camera preview\\\\\\\\n                    Container(\\\\\\\\n                      color: Colors.black,\\\\\\\\n                      child: const Center(\\\\\\\\n                        child: Icon(\\\\\\\\n                          Icons.face,\\\\\\\\n                          size: 150,\\\\\\\\n                          color: Colors.white24,\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                      ),\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                    // AR overlay will be rendered here\\\\\\\\n                    if (controller.currentStep != null)\\\\\\\\n                      _buildOverlay(controller.currentStep!),\\\\\\\\n                    // Close button\\\\\\\\n                    Positioned(\\\\\\\\n                      top: 48,\\\\\\\\n                      left: 16,\\\\\\\\n                      child: IconButton(\\\\\\\\n                        icon: const Icon(Icons.close, color: Colors.white),\\\\\\\\n                        onPressed: () =\u003e context.go('/'),\\\\\\\\n                      ),\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                    // Progress indicator\\\\\\\\n                    Positioned(\\\\\\\\n                      top: 48,\\\\\\\\n                      right: 16,\\\\\\\\n                      child: Container(\\\\\\\\n                        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(\\\\\\\\n                          horizontal: 12,\\\\\\\\n                          vertical: 6,\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                        decoration: BoxDecoration(\\\\\\\\n                          color: Colors.black54,\\\\\\\\n                          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                        child: Text(\\\\\\\\n                          '${controller.currentStepIndex + 1}/${controller.totalSteps}',\\\\\\\\n                          style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white),\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                      ),\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                  ],\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n              ),\\\\\\\\n              // Tutorial instructions\\\\\\\\n              Container(\\\\\\\\n                width: double.infinity,\\\\\\\\n                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),\\\\\\\\n                child: Column(\\\\\\\\n                  crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\\\\\\\\n                  children: [\\\\\\\\n                    if (controller.currentStep != null) ...[\\\\\\\\n                      Text(\\\\\\\\n                        controller.currentStep!.title,\\\\\\\\n                        style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,\\\\\\\\n                      ),\\\\\\\\n                      const SizedBox(height: 8),\\\\\\\\n                      Text(\\\\\\\\n                        controller.currentStep!.instruction,\\\\\\\\n                        style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.bodyMedium,\\\\\\\\n                      ),\\\\\\\\n                    ],\\\\\\\\n                    const SizedBox(height: 24),\\\\\\\\n                    // Step progress dots\\\\\\\\n                    Row(\\\\\\\\n                      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,\\\\\\\\n                      children: List.generate(\\\\\\\\n                        controller.totalSteps,\\\\\\\\n                        (index) =\u003e Container(\\\\\\\\n                          margin: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4),\\\\\\\\n                          width: 8,\\\\\\\\n                          height: 8,\\\\\\\\n                          decoration: BoxDecoration(\\\\\\\\n                            shape: BoxShape.circle,\\\\\\\\n                            color: index \u003c= controller.currentStepIndex\\\\\\\\n                                ? AppColors.primary\\\\\\\\n                                : AppColors.textHint,\\\\\\\\n                          ),\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                      ),\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                    const SizedBox(height: 24),\\\\\\\\n                    // Action buttons\\\\\\\\n                    Row(\\\\\\\\n                      children: [\\\\\\\\n                        if (controller.currentStepIndex \u003e 0)\\\\\\\\n                          Expanded(\\\\\\\\n                            child: OutlinedButton(\\\\\\\\n                              onPressed: controller.previousStep,\\\\\\\\n                              child: const Text('Previous'),\\\\\\\\n                            ),\\\\\\\\n                          ),\\\\\\\\n                        if (controller.currentStepIndex \u003e 0)\\\\\\\\n                          const SizedBox(width: 16),\\\\\\\\n                        Expanded(\\\\\\\\n                          flex: 2,\\\\\\\\n                          child: ElevatedButton(\\\\\\\\n                            onPressed: controller.isLastStep\\\\\\\\n                                ? () =\u003e _completeTutorial(controller)\\\\\\\\n                                : controller.nextStep,\\\\\\\\n                            child: Text(\\\\\\\\n                              controller.isLastStep ? 'Complete' : 'Next',\\\\\\\\n                            ),\\\\\\\\n                          ),\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                      ],\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                  ],\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n              ),\\\\\\\\n            ],\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n        },\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Widget _buildOverlay(TutorialStep step) {\\\\\\\\n    // TODO: Implement actual AR overlay rendering\\\\\\\\n    return Positioned.fill(\\\\\\\\n      child: CustomPaint(\\\\\\\\n        painter: _OverlayPainter(step: step),\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _completeTutorial(TutorialController controller) {\\\\\\\\n    controller.completeTutorial();\\\\\\\\n    context.go('/result');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass _OverlayPainter extends CustomPainter {\\\\\\\\n  final TutorialStep step;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  _OverlayPainter({required this.step});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {\\\\\\\\n    // TODO: Implement actual overlay rendering based on face landmarks\\\\\\\\n    final paint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = AppColors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.3)\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final center = Offset(size.width / 2, size.height / 2);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    switch (step.targetRegion) {\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.lips:\\\\\\\\n        canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n          Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n            center: Offset(center.dx, center.dy + 50),\\\\\\\\n            width: 100,\\\\\\\\n            height: 40,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          paint,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.leftCheek:\\\\\\\\n        canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n          Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n            center: Offset(center.dx - 80, center.dy + 20),\\\\\\\\n            width: 60,\\\\\\\\n            height: 40,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          paint,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.rightCheek:\\\\\\\\n        canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n          Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n            center: Offset(center.dx + 80, center.dy + 20),\\\\\\\\n            width: 60,\\\\\\\\n            height: 40,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          paint,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      default:\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  bool shouldRepaint(covariant _OverlayPainter oldDelegate) {\\\\\\\\n    return oldDelegate.step != step;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":224}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/.cursor/worktrees/meet-beauty__SSH__home-mac_/rhb/lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import based on face landmarks\\\\\\\\n    final paint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = AppColors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.3)\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final center = Offset(size.width / 2, size.height / 2);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    switch (step.targetRegion) {\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.lips:\\\\\\\\n        canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n          Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n            center: Offset(center.dx, center.dy + 50),\\\\\\\\n            width: 100,\\\\\\\\n            height: 40,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          paint,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.leftCheek:\\\\\\\\n        canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n          Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n            center: Offset(center.dx - 80, center.dy + 20),\\\\\\\\n            width: 60,\\\\\\\\n            height: 40,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          paint,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.rightCheek:\\\\\\\\n        canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n          Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n            center: Offset(center.dx + 80, center.dy + 20),\\\\\\\\n            width: 60,\\\\\\\\n            height: 40,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          paint,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      default:\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  bool shouldRepaint(covariant _OverlayPainter oldDelegate) {\\\\\\\\n    return oldDelegate.step != step;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":224,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":7476,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/.cursor/worktrees/meet-beauty__SSH__home-mac_/rhb/lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":224}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"f1e3e7fb-2d8b-4614-9ca3-45d060578b42\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"70d9f0c4-ec2b-4202-b404-aabf3f3e7571\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPick 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/makeup_profile.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nenum TutorialState {\\\\\\\\n  idle,\\\\\\\\n  initializing,\\\\\\\\n  running,\\\\\\\\n  paused,\\\\\\\\n  completed,\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nenum StepStatus {\\\\\\\\n  notStarted,\\\\\\\\n  active,\\\\\\\\n  completed,\\\\\\\\n  skipped,\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass TutorialController extends ChangeNotifier {\\\\\\\\n  TutorialState _state = TutorialState.idle;\\\\\\\\n  MakeupProfile? _currentProfile;\\\\\\\\n  int _currentStepIndex = 0;\\\\\\\\n  Map\u003cString, StepStatus\u003e _stepStatuses = {};\\\\\\\\n  DateTime? _startTime;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  TutorialState get state =\u003e _state;\\\\\\\\n  MakeupProfile? get currentProfile =\u003e _currentProfile;\\\\\\\\n  int get currentStepIndex =\u003e _currentStepIndex;\\\\\\\\n  int get totalSteps =\u003e _currentProfile?.tutorialSteps.length ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isLastStep =\u003e _currentStepIndex \u003e= totalSteps - 1;\\\\\\\\n  TutorialStep? get currentStep {\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentProfile == null || _currentStepIndex \u003e= totalSteps) {\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void startTutorial({MakeupProfile? profile}) {\\\\\\\\n    // Use provided profile or create default for MVP\\\\\\\\n    _currentProfile = profile ?? _getDefaultProfile();\\\\\\\\n    _currentStepIndex = 0;\\\\\\\\n    _state = TutorialState.running;\\\\\\\\n    _startTime = DateTime.now();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Initialize all steps as not started\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses = {\\\\\\\\n      for (var step in _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps)\\\\\\\\n        step.id: StepStatus.notStarted\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark first step as active\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentProfile!.tutorialSteps.isNotEmpty) {\\\\\\\\n      _stepStatuses[_currentProfile!.tutorialSteps.first.id] = StepStatus.active;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void nextStep() {\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentProfile == null || isLastStep) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark current step as completed\\\\\\\\n    final currentStepId = _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex].id;\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses[currentStepId] = StepStatus.completed;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Move to next step\\\\\\\\n    _currentStepIndex++;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark new step as active\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentStepIndex \u003c totalSteps) {\\\\\\\\n      final nextStepId = _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex].id;\\\\\\\\n      _stepStatuses[nextStepId] = StepStatus.active;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void previousStep() {\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentProfile == null || _currentStepIndex == 0) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark current step as not started\\\\\\\\n    final currentStepId = _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex].id;\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses[currentStepId] = StepStatus.notStarted;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Move to previous step\\\\\\\\n    _currentStepIndex--;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark new step as active\\\\\\\\n    final prevStepId = _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex].id;\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses[prevStepId] = StepStatus.active;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void skipStep() {\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentProfile == null || isLastStep) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark current step as skipped\\\\\\\\n    final currentStepId = _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex].id;\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses[currentStepId] = StepStatus.skipped;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    nextStep();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void pauseTutorial() {\\\\\\\\n    _state = TutorialState.paused;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void resumeTutorial() {\\\\\\\\n    _state = TutorialState.running;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void completeTutorial() {\\\\\\\\n    // Mark current step as completed if not already\\\\\\\\n    if (currentStep != null) {\\\\\\\\n      _stepStatuses[currentStep!.id] = StepStatus.completed;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _state = TutorialState.completed;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void reset() {\\\\\\\\n    _state = TutorialState.idle;\\\\\\\\n    _currentProfile = null;\\\\\\\\n    _currentStepIndex = 0;\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses = {};\\\\\\\\n    _startTime = null;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Duration? get tutorialDuration {\\\\\\\\n    if (_startTime == null) return null;\\\\\\\\n    return DateTime.now().difference(_startTime!);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  int get completedStepsCount {\\\\\\\\n    return _stepStatuses.values\\\\\\\\n        .where((s) =\u003e s == StepStatus.completed)\\\\\\\\n        .length;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  int get skippedStepsCount {\\\\\\\\n    return _stepStatuses.values.where((s) =\u003e s == StepStatus.skipped).length;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  MakeupProfile _getDefaultProfile() {\\\\\\\\n    // Default natural makeup tutorial for MVP\\\\\\\\n    return const MakeupProfile(\\\\\\\\n      id: 'natural_daily',\\\\\\\\n      name: 'Natural Daily Look',\\\\\\\\n      category: 'Daily',\\\\\\\\n      lipColor: Color(0xFFE57373),\\\\\\\\n      blushColor: Color(0xFFFFB6C1),\\\\\\\\n      tutorialSteps: [\\\\\\\\n        TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n          id: 'step1',\\\\\\\\n          title: 'Apply Lip Color',\\\\\\\\n          instruction: 'Start from the center of your lips and work outward. Use gentle strokes for a natural look.',\\\\\\\\n          targetRegion: TargetRegion.lips,\\\\\\\\n          overlayStyle: OverlayStyle(\\\\\\\\n            color: Color(0xFFE57373),\\\\\\\\n            opacity: 0.4,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          order: 1,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n        TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n          id: 'step2',\\\\\\\\n          title: 'Add Blush - Left Cheek',\\\\\\\\n          instruction: 'Smile gently and apply blush to the apples of your cheeks. Blend upward toward your temples.',\\\\\\\\n          targetRegion: TargetRegion.leftCheek,\\\\\\\\n          overlayStyle: OverlayStyle(\\\\\\\\n            color: Color(0xFFFFB6C1),\\\\\\\\n            opacity: 0.3,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          order: 2,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n        TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n          id: 'step3',\\\\\\\\n          title: 'Add Blush - Right Cheek',\\\\\\\\n          instruction: 'Apply the same technique to your right cheek for a balanced look.',\\\\\\\\n          targetRegion: TargetRegion.rightCheek,\\\\\\\\n          overlayStyle: OverlayStyle(\\\\\\\\n            color: Color(0xFFFFB6C1),\\\\\\\\n            opacity: 0.3,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          order: 3,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n      ],\\\\\\\\n      recommendationReasons: [\\\\\\\\n        'Perfect for everyday wear',\\\\\\\\n        'Enhances your natural features',\\\\\\\\n        'Quick and easy application',\\\\\\\\n      ],\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":200}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/.cursor/worktrees/meet-beauty__SSH__home-mac_/rhb/lib/features/tutorial/application/tutorial_controller.dart\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import (context, controller, child) {\\\\\\\\n                  final result = controller.scoreResult;\\\\\\\\n                  if (result == null) {\\\\\\\\n                    return const                Row(\\\\\\\\n                        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,\\\\\\\\n                        children: List.generate(\\\\\\\\n                          5,\\\\\\\\n                          (index) =\u003e Icon(\\\\\\\\n                            index \u003c result.stars\\\\\\\\n                                ? Icons.star\\\\\\\\n                                : Icons.star_border,\\\\\\\\n                            size: 48,\\\\\\\\n                            color: AppColors.warning,\\\\\\\\n                          ),\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                      ),\\\\\\\\n                      const SizedBox(height: 24),\\\\\\\\n                      // Score\\\\\\\\n BorderRadius.circular(16),\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                        child: Column(\\\\\\\\n                          children: [\\\\\\\\n                            Text(\\\\\\\\n                              result.encouragement,\\\\\\\\n                              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.bodyLarge,\\\\\\\\n                              textAlign: TextAlign.center,\\\\\\\\n                            ),\\\\\\\\n                            if (result.suggestion != null) ...[\\\\\\\\n                              const SizedBox(height: 12),\\\\\\\\n                              Text(\\\\\\\\n                                result.suggestion!,\\\\\\\\n                                style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.bodyMedium,\\\\\\\\n                                textAlign: TextAlign.center,\\\\\\\\n                              ),\\\\\\\\n                            ],\\\\\\\\n                          ],\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                      ),\\\\\\\\n                      const SizedBox(height: 24),\\\\\\\\n                      // Tags\\\\\\\\n                      if (result.feedbackTags.isNotEmpty)\\\\\\\\n                        Wrap(\\\\\\\\n                          spacing: 8,\\\\\\\\n                          runSpacing: 8,\\\\\\\\n                          children: result.feedbackTags.map((tag) {\\\\\\\\n                            return Container(\\\\\\\\n                              padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(\\\\\\\\n BoxDecoration(\\\\\\\\n                                color: AppColors.primaryLight.withValues(alpha: 0.3),\\\\\\\\n                                borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),\\\\\\\\n                              ),\\\\\\\\n                              child: Text(\\\\\\\\n                                _formatTag(tag),\\\\\\\\n                                style: const TextStyle(\\\\\\\\n                                  color: AppColors.primary,\\\\\\\\n                                  fontSize: 12,\\\\\\\\n                                ),\\\\\\\\n                              ),\\\\\\\\n                            );\\\\\\\\n                          }).toList(),\\\\\\\\n                        ),\\\\\\\\n                    ],\\\\\\\\n                  );\\\\\\\\n                },\\\\\\\\n              ),\\\\\\\\n              const Spacer(flex: 2),\\\\\\\\n              // Tutorial stats\\\\\\\\n              Consumer\u003cTutorialController\u003e(\\\\\\\\n                builder: (context, tutorial, child) {\\\\\\\\n                  return Container(\\\\\\\\n                    padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),\\\\\\\\n                    decoration: BoxDecoration(\\\\\\\\n                      color: AppColors.card,\\\\\\\\n                      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                    child: Row(\\\\\\\\n                      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceAround,\\\\\\\\n );\\\\\\\\n                },\\\\\\\\n              ),\\\\\\\\n              const SizedBox(height: 24),\\\\\\\\n              // Action buttons\\\\\\\\n              Row(\\\\\\\\n duration.inMinutes;\\\\\\\\n    final seconds = duration.inSeconds.remainder(60);\\\\\\\\n    return '${minutes.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}:${seconds.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}';\\\\\\\\n 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/score_result.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/features/tutorial/application/tutorial_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass ScoringController extends ChangeNotifier {\\\\\\\\n  ScoreResult? _scoreResult;\\\\\\\\n  bool _isCalculating = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  ScoreResult? get scoreResult =\u003e _scoreResult;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isCalculating =\u003e _isCalculating;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void calculateScore(TutorialController tutorialController) {\\\\\\\\n    _isCalculating = true;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // MVP: Calculate score based on completion rate\\\\\\\\n    final completedSteps = tutorialController.completedStepsCount;\\\\\\\\n    final totalSteps = tutorialController.totalSteps;\\\\\\\\n    final skippedSteps = tutorialController.skippedStepsCount;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Calculate base score\\\\\\\\n    final completionRate = totalSteps \u003e 0 ? completedSteps / totalSteps : 0.0;\\\\\\\\n    final skipPenalty = skippedSteps * 5;\\\\\\\\n    final baseScore = (completionRate * 100).round() - skipPenalty;\\\\\\\\n    final score = baseScore.clamp(0, 100);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Calculate stars (1-5)\\\\\\\\n    int stars;\\\\\\\\n    if (score \u003e= 90) {\\\\\\\\n      stars = 5;\\\\\\\\n    } else if (score \u003e= 75) {\\\\\\\\n      stars = 4;\\\\\\\\n    } else if (score \u003e= 60) {\\\\\\\\n      stars = 3;\\\\\\\\n    } else if (score \u003e= 40) {\\\\\\\\n      stars = 2;\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      stars = 1;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Generate feedback\\\\\\\\n    final feedbackTags = \u003cString\u003e[];\\\\\\\\n    String encouragement;\\\\\\\\n    String? suggestion;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (score \u003e= 80) {\\\\\\\\n      encouragement = 'Excellent work! Your makeup application looks great!';\\\\\\\\n      feedbackTags.add('great_coverage');\\\\\\\\n      if (skippedSteps == 0) {\\\\\\\\n        feedbackTags.add('all_steps_completed');\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } else if (score \u003e= 60) {\\\\\\\\n      encouragement = 'Good job! You\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\'re making nice progress.';\\\\\\\\n      suggestion = 'Try to complete all steps for a better result.';\\\\\\\\n      feedbackTags.add('good_effort');\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      encouragement = 'Keep practicing! You\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\'ll get better with time.';\\\\\\\\n      suggestion = 'Take your time with each step for better results.';\\\\\\\\n      feedbackTags.add('needs_practice');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (skippedSteps \u003e 0) {\\\\\\\\n      feedbackTags.add('steps_skipped');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _scoreResult = ScoreResult(\\\\\\\\n      score: score,\\\\\\\\n      stars: stars,\\\\\\\\n      feedbackTags: feedbackTags,\\\\\\\\n      encouragement: encouragement,\\\\\\\\n      suggestion: suggestion,\\\\\\\\n      details: {\\\\\\\\n        'completedSteps': completedSteps,\\\\\\\\n        'totalSteps': totalSteps,\\\\\\\\n        'skippedSteps': skippedSteps,\\\\\\\\n        'duration': tutorialController.tutorialDuration?.inSeconds ?? 0,\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _isCalculating = false;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void reset() {\\\\\\\\n    _scoreResult = null;\\\\\\\\n    _isCalculating = false;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":90}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/.cursor/worktrees/meet-beauty__SSH__home-mac_/rhb/lib/features/result/application/scoring_controller.dart\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/score_result.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/features/tutorial/application/tutorial_controller.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass ScoringController extends ChangeNotifier {\\\\\\\\n  ScoreResult? 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/makeup_profile.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass RecommendationController extends ChangeNotifier {\\\\\\\\n  List\u003cMakeupProfile\u003e _recommendations = [];\\\\\\\\n  MakeupProfile? _selectedProfile;\\\\\\\\n  bool _isLoading = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  List\u003cMakeupProfile\u003e get recommendations =\u003e _recommendations;\\\\\\\\n  MakeupProfile? get selectedProfile =\u003e _selectedProfile;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isLoading =\u003e _isLoading;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void generateRecommendations(FaceFeatureResult features) {\\\\\\\\n    _isLoading = true;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // MVP: Rule-based recommendations\\\\\\\\n    _recommendations = _getDefaultRecommendations(features);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Select first recommendation by default\\\\\\\\n    if (_recommendations.isNotEmpty) {\\\\\\\\n      _selectedProfile = _recommendations.first;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _isLoading = false;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void selectProfile(MakeupProfile profile) {\\\\\\\\n    _selectedProfile = profile;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  List\u003cMakeupProfile\u003e _getDefaultRecommendations(FaceFeatureResult features) {\\\\\\\\n    // MVP: Simple rule-based recommendations\\\\\\\\n    final recommendations = \u003cMakeupProfile\u003e[];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Add recommendations based on face shape\\\\\\\\n    if (features.faceShape == FaceShape.round) {\\\\\\\\n      recommendations.add(const MakeupProfile(\\\\\\\\n        id: 'contour_round',\\\\\\\\n        name: 'Sculpt \u0026 Define',\\\\\\\\n        category: 'Contouring',\\\\\\\\n        description: 'Enhance your natural bone structure with subtle contouring',\\\\\\\\n        recommendationReasons: [\\\\\\\\n          'Great for round face shapes',\\\\\\\\n          'Creates definition',\\\\\\\\n          'Natural-looking results',\\\\\\\\n        ],\\\\\\\\n        tutorialSteps: [\\\\\\\\n          TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n            id: 'contour1',\\\\\\\\n            title: 'Apply Contour',\\\\\\\\n            instruction: 'Apply contour along your jawline and temples',\\\\\\\\n            targetRegion: TargetRegion.forehead,\\\\\\\\n            order: 1,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n        ],\\\\\\\\n      ));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Always include a natural daily look\\\\\\\\n    recommendations.add(const MakeupProfile(\\\\\\\\n      id: 'natural_daily',\\\\\\\\n      name: 'Natural Daily Look',\\\\\\\\n      category: 'Daily',\\\\\\\\n      description: 'A fresh, natural look perfect for everyday',\\\\\\\\n      lipColor: Color(0xFFE57373),\\\\\\\\n      blushColor: Color(0xFFFFB6C1),\\\\\\\\n      recommendationReasons: [\\\\\\\\n        'Perfect for everyday wear',\\\\\\\\n        'Enhances your natural features',\\\\\\\\n        'Quick and easy application',\\\\\\\\n      ],\\\\\\\\n      tutorialSteps: [\\\\\\\\n        TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n          id: 'step1',\\\\\\\\n          title: 'Apply Lip Color',\\\\\\\\n          instruction: 'Start from the center of your lips and work outward',\\\\\\\\n          targetRegion: TargetRegion.lips,\\\\\\\\n          overlayStyle: OverlayStyle(\\\\\\\\n            color: Color(0xFFE57373),\\\\\\\\n            opacity: 0.4,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          order: 1,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n        TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n          id: 'step2',\\\\\\\\n          title: 'Add Blush - Left Cheek',\\\\\\\\n          instruction: 'Smile and apply blush to the apples of your cheeks',\\\\\\\\n          targetRegion: TargetRegion.leftCheek,\\\\\\\\n          overlayStyle: OverlayStyle(\\\\\\\\n            color: Color(0xFFFFB6C1),\\\\\\\\n            opacity: 0.3,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          order: 2,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n        TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n          id: 'step3',\\\\\\\\n          title: 'Add Blush - Right Cheek',\\\\\\\\n          instruction: 'Apply the same technique to your right cheek',\\\\\\\\n          targetRegion: TargetRegion.rightCheek,\\\\\\\\n          overlayStyle: OverlayStyle(\\\\\\\\n            color: Color(0xFFFFB6C1),\\\\\\\\n            opacity: 0.3,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          order: 3,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n      ],\\\\\\\\n    ));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return recommendations;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void reset() {\\\\\\\\n    _recommendations = [];\\\\\\\\n    _selectedProfile = null;\\\\\\\\n    _isLoading = false;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Target region for makeup application\\\\\\\\nenum TargetRegion {\\\\\\\\n  lips,\\\\\\\\n  leftCheek,\\\\\\\\n  rightCheek,\\\\\\\\n  leftEye,\\\\\\\\n  rightEye,\\\\\\\\n  eyebrows,\\\\\\\\n  nose,\\\\\\\\n  forehead,\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Overlay style configuration\\\\\\\\nclass OverlayStyle {\\\\\\\\n  final Color color;\\\\\\\\n  final double opacity;\\\\\\\\n  final bool showBorder;\\\\\\\\n  final Color? borderColor;\\\\\\\\n  final double? borderWidth;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const OverlayStyle({\\\\\\\\n    required this.color,\\\\\\\\n    this.opacity = 0.5,\\\\\\\\n    this.showBorder = false,\\\\\\\\n    this.borderColor,\\\\\\\\n    this.borderWidth,\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  factory OverlayStyle.fromMap(Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e map) {\\\\\\\\n    return OverlayStyle(\\\\\\\\n      color: Color(map['color'] as int),\\\\\\\\n      opacity: (map['opacity'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? 0.5,\\\\\\\\n      showBorder: map['showBorder'] as bool? ?? false,\\\\\\\\n      borderColor:\\\\\\\\n          map['borderColor'] != null ? Color(map['borderColor'] as int) : null,\\\\\\\\n      borderWidth: (map['borderWidth'] as num?)?.toDouble(),\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e toMap() {\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      'color': color.toARGB32(),\\\\\\\\n      'opacity': opacity,\\\\\\\\n      'showBorder': showBorder,\\\\\\\\n      if (borderColor != null) 'borderColor': borderColor!.toARGB32(),\\\\\\\\n      if (borderWidth != null) 'borderWidth': borderWidth,\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Single step in a makeup tutorial\\\\\\\\nclass TutorialStep {\\\\\\\\n  final String id;\\\\\\\\n  final String title;\\\\\\\\n  final String instruction;\\\\\\\\n  final TargetRegion targetRegion;\\\\\\\\n  final OverlayStyle? overlayStyle;\\\\\\\\n  final int order;\\\\\\\\n  final Duration? estimatedDuration;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const TutorialStep({\\\\\\\\n    required this.id,\\\\\\\\n    required this.title,\\\\\\\\n    required this.instruction,\\\\\\\\n    required this.targetRegion,\\\\\\\\n    this.overlayStyle,\\\\\\\\n    required this.order,\\\\\\\\n    this.estimatedDuration,\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  factory TutorialStep.fromMap(Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e map) {\\\\\\\\n    return TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n      id: map['id'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      title: map['title'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      instruction: map['instruction'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      targetRegion: TargetRegion.values.firstWhere(\\\\\\\\n        (e) =\u003e e.name == map['targetRegion'],\\\\\\\\n        orElse: () =\u003e TargetRegion.lips,\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      overlayStyle: map['overlayStyle'] != null\\\\\\\\n          ? OverlayStyle.fromMap(map['overlayStyle'])\\\\\\\\n          : null,\\\\\\\\n      order: map['order'] as int,\\\\\\\\n      estimatedDuration: map['estimatedDuration'] != null\\\\\\\\n          ? Duration(milliseconds: map['estimatedDuration'] as int)\\\\\\\\n          : null,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e toMap() {\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      'id': id,\\\\\\\\n      'title': title,\\\\\\\\n      'instruction': instruction,\\\\\\\\n      'targetRegion': targetRegion.name,\\\\\\\\n      if (overlayStyle != null) 'overlayStyle': overlayStyle!.toMap(),\\\\\\\\n      'order': order,\\\\\\\\n      if (estimatedDuration != null)\\\\\\\\n        'estimatedDuration': estimatedDuration!.inMilliseconds,\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Complete makeup profile/template\\\\\\\\nclass MakeupProfile {\\\\\\\\n  final String id;\\\\\\\\n  final String name;\\\\\\\\n  final String description;\\\\\\\\n  final String category;\\\\\\\\n  final Color? lipColor;\\\\\\\\n  final Color? blushColor;\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cTutorialStep\u003e tutorialSteps;\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cString\u003e recommendationReasons;\\\\\\\\n  final String? thumbnail;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const MakeupProfile({\\\\\\\\n    required this.id,\\\\\\\\n    required this.name,\\\\\\\\n    this.description = '',\\\\\\\\n    required this.category,\\\\\\\\n    this.lipColor,\\\\\\\\n    this.blushColor,\\\\\\\\n    this.tutorialSteps = const [],\\\\\\\\n    this.recommendationReasons = const [],\\\\\\\\n    this.thumbnail,\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  factory MakeupProfile.fromMap(Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e map) {\\\\\\\\n    return MakeupProfile(\\\\\\\\n      id: map['id'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      name: map['name'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      description: map['description'] as String? ?? '',\\\\\\\\n      category: map['category'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      lipColor:\\\\\\\\n          map['lipColor'] != null ? 'package:camera/camera.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass CameraService {\\\\\\\\n  CameraController? _controller;\\\\\\\\n  List\u003cCameraDescription\u003e _cameras = [];\\\\\\\\n  bool _isInitialized = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  CameraController? get controller =\u003e _controller;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isInitialized =\u003e _isInitialized;\\\\\\\\n  List\u003cCameraDescription\u003e get cameras =\u003e _cameras;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e initialize() async {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      _cameras = await availableCameras();\\\\\\\\n      if (_cameras.isEmpty) {\\\\\\\\n        throw Exception('No cameras available');\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Find front camera\\\\\\\\n      final frontCamera = _cameras.firstWhere(\\\\\\\\n        (camera) =\u003e camera.lensDirection == CameraLensDirection.front,\\\\\\\\n        orElse: () =\u003e _cameras.first,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      _controller = CameraController(\\\\\\\\n        frontCamera,\\\\\\\\n        ResolutionPreset.high,\\\\\\\\n        enableAudio: false,\\\\\\\\n        imageFormatGroup: ImageFormatGroup.nv21,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      await _controller!.initialize();\\\\\\\\n      _isInitialized = true;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      debugPrint('Camera initialization error: $e');\\\\\\\\n      rethrow;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void startImageStream(Function(CameraImage) onImage) {\\\\\\\\n    if (_controller == null || !_isInitialized) return;\\\\\\\\n    _controller!.startImageStream((image) =\u003e onImage(image));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void stopImageStream() {\\\\\\\\n    if (_controller == null || !_isInitialized) return;\\\\\\\\n    if (_controller!.value.isStreamingImages) {\\\\\\\\n      _controller!.stopImageStream();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    _controller?.dispose();\\\\\\\\n    _controller = null;\\\\\\\\n    _isInitialized = false;\\\\\\\\n =\u003e _isInitialized;\\\\\\\\n  List\u003cCameraDescription\u003e get cameras =\u003e _cameras;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e initialize() async {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      final frontCamera = _cameras.firstWhere(\\\\\\\\n        (camera) =\u003e camera.lensDirection == CameraLensDirection.front,\\\\\\\\n        orElse: () =\u003e _cameras.first,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      _controller = CameraController(\\\\\\\\n        frontCamera,\\\\\\\\n        ResolutionPreset.high,\\\\\\\\n        enableAudio: false,\\\\\\\\n        imageFormatGroup: initialization error: $e');\\\\\\\\n      rethrow;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void startImageStream(Function(CameraImage) onImage) {\\\\\\\\n    if (_controller == null || 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:google_mlkit_face_detection/google_mlkit_face_detection.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_point.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass FaceMeshService {\\\\\\\\n  final FaceDetector _detector;\\\\\\\\n  bool _isProcessing = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FaceMeshService()\\\\\\\\n      : _detector = FaceDetector(\\\\\\\\n          options: FaceDetectorOptions(\\\\\\\\n            enableContours: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableLandmarks: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableClassification: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableTracking: true,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cList\u003cFacePoint\u003e?\u003e detectFace(InputImage image) async {\\\\\\\\n    if (_isProcessing) return null;\\\\\\\\n    _isProcessing = true;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      final faces = await _detector.processImage(image);\\\\\\\\n      if (faces.isEmpty) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Get the first face (most prominent)\\\\\\\\n      final face = faces.first;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Extract landmarks\\\\\\\\n      final landmarks = \u003cFacePoint\u003e[];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Face contour\\\\\\\\n      final faceContour = face.contours[FaceContourType.face];\\\\\\\\n      if (faceContour != null) {\\\\\\\\n        for (final point in faceContour.points) {\\\\\\\\n          landmarks.add(FacePoint(\\\\\\\\n            x: point.x.toDouble(),\\\\\\\\n            y: point.y.toDouble(),\\\\\\\\n          ));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Lip contour\\\\\\\\n      final upperLipTop = face.contours[FaceContourType.upperLipTop];\\\\\\\\n      final lowerLipBottom = face.contours[FaceContourType.lowerLipBottom];\\\\\\\\n      if (upperLipTop != null \u0026\u0026 lowerLipBottom != null) {\\\\\\\\n        for (final point in upperLipTop.points) {\\\\\\\\n          landmarks.add(FacePoint(x: point.x.toDouble(), y: point.y.toDouble()));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        for (final point in lowerLipBottom.points) {\\\\\\\\n          landmarks.add(FacePoint(x: point.x.toDouble(), y: point.y.toDouble()));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      return landmarks;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      debugPrint('Face detection error: $e');\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      _isProcessing = false;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? analyzeFeatures(List\u003cFacePoint\u003e landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks.isEmpty) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // MVP: Simple rule-based feature analysis\\\\\\\\n    // In a real implementation, this would use proper geometric calculations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Calculate face dimensions\\\\\\\\n    double minX = double.infinity, maxX = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\\\\\n    double minY = double.infinity, maxY = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (final point in landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n      if (point.x \u003c minX) minX = point.x;\\\\\\\\n      if (point.x \u003e maxX) maxX = point.x;\\\\\\\\n      if (point.y \u003c minY) minY = point.y;\\\\\\\\n      if (point.y \u003e maxY) maxY = point.y;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final width = maxX - minX;\\\\\\\\n    final height = maxY - minY;\\\\\\\\n    final aspectRatio = height / width;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Determine face shape based on aspect ratio\\\\\\\\n    FaceShape faceShape;\\\\\\\\n    if (aspectRatio \u003e 1.4) {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.long;\\\\\\\\n    } else if (aspectRatio \u003c 1.2) {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.round;\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.oval;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return FaceFeatureResult(\\\\\\\\n      faceShape: faceShape,\\\\\\\\n      skinTone: SkinTone.unknown, // Would need color analysis\\\\\\\\n      lipType: LipType.medium, // Would need lip measurement\\\\\\\\n      confidenceLevel: ConfidenceLevel.medium,\\\\\\\\n      ratios: {'aspectRatio': aspectRatio},\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    _detector.close();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":110}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/.cursor/worktrees/meet-beauty__SSH__home-mac_/rhb/lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cList\u003cFacePoint\u003e?\u003e detectFace(InputImage image) async {\\\\\\\\n    if (_isProcessing) return null;\\\\\\\\n    _isProcessing = true;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n face = faces.first;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Extract landmarks\\\\\\\\n      final landmarks = \u003cFacePoint\u003e[];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Face contour\\\\\\\\n      final faceContour = face.contours[FaceContourType.face];\\\\\\\\n      if (faceContour != null) {\\\\\\\\n        for (final point in faceContour.points) {\\\\\\\\n          landmarks.add(FacePoint(\\\\\\\\n            x: point.x.toDouble(),\\\\\\\\n            y: point.y.toDouble(),\\\\\\\\n          ));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Lip contour\\\\\\\\n      final upperLipTop = face.contours[FaceContourType.upperLipTop];\\\\\\\\n      final lowerLipBottom = face.contours[FaceContourType.lowerLipBottom];\\\\\\\\n      if (upperLipTop != null \u0026\u0026 lowerLipBottom != null) {\\\\\\\\n        for (final point in upperLipTop.points) {\\\\\\\\n          landmarks.add(FacePoint(x: point.x.toDouble(), y: point.y.toDouble()));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        for (final point in lowerLipBottom.points) {\\\\\\\\n          landmarks.add(FacePoint(x: point.x.toDouble(), y: point.y.toDouble()));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      return landmarks;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      debugPrint('Face detection error: $e');\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      _isProcessing = false;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? analyzeFeatures(List\u003cFacePoint\u003e landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks.isEmpty) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // MVP: Simple rule-based feature analysis\\\\\\\\n    // In a real implementation, this would use proper geometric calculations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Calculate face dimensions\\\\\\\\n    double minX = double.infinity, maxX = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\\\\\n    double minY = double.infinity, maxY = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (final point in landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n      if (point.x \u003c minX) minX = point.x;\\\\\\\\n      if (point.x \u003e maxX) maxX = point.x;\\\\\\\\n      if (point.y \u003c minY) minY = point.y;\\\\\\\\n      if (point.y \u003e maxY) maxY = point.y;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final width = maxX - minX;\\\\\\\\n    final height = maxY - minY;\\\\\\\\n    final aspectRatio = height / width;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Determine face shape based on aspect ratio\\\\\\\\n    FaceShape faceShape;\\\\\\\\n    if (aspectRatio \u003e 1.4) {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.long;\\\\\\\\n    } else if (aspectRatio \u003c 1.2) {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.round;\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.oval;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return FaceFeatureResult(\\\\\\\\n      faceShape: faceShape,\\\\\\\\n      skinTone: SkinTone.unknown, // Would need color analysis\\\\\\\\n      lipType: LipType.medium, // Would need lip measurement\\\\\\\\n      confidenceLevel: OverlayRenderer {\\\\\\\\n  /// Calculate lip polygon points from face landmarks\\\\\\\\n  List\u003cOffset\u003e? calculateLipPolygon(List\u003cFacePoint\u003e landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n    // MVP: Use predefined indices for lip region\\\\\\\\n    // In a real implementation, this would use MediaPipe face mesh indices\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks.length \u003c 50) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Placeholder: return center-based oval\\\\\\\\n    // Real implementation would extract actual lip contour points\\\\\\\\n    return null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Calculate cheek region center points\\\\\\\\n  Offset? calculateCheekCenter(List\u003cFacePoint\u003e landmarks, bool isLeft) {\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks.length \u003c 30) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // MVP: Simple estimation based on face center\\\\\\\\n    // Real implementation would use face mesh landmarks\\\\\\\\n    return null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Draw makeup overlay on canvas\\\\\\\\n  void drawOverlay(\\\\\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\\\\\n    Size size,\\\\\\\\n    TutorialStep step,\\\\\\\\n    List\u003cFacePoint\u003e? landmarks,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    if (step.overlayStyle == null) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final paint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = step.overlayStyle!.color.withValues(alpha: step.overlayStyle!.opacity)\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final center = Offset(size.width / 2, size.height / 2);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // MVP: Draw simple geometric shapes for overlay\\\\\\\\n    switch (step.targetRegion) {\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.lips:\\\\\\\\n        _drawLipOverlay(canvas, center, paint);\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.leftCheek:\\\\\\\\n paint,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _drawCheekOverlay(\\\\\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\\\\\n    Offset center,\\\\\\\\n    Paint paint, {\\\\\\\\n    required bool isLeft,\\\\\\\\n Meet Beauty - AI Makeup Coaching App\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAn AI-powered makeup learning application that provides personalized tutorials with real-time AR guidance.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Face Analysis**: AI-powered facial feature detection and analysis\\\\\\\\n- **Personalized Recommendations**: Custom makeup tutorials based on your face shape, skin tone, and lip type\\\\\\\\n- **AR Tutorial Overlay**: Real-time visual guidance for makeup application\\\\\\\\n- **Progress Scoring**: Instant feedback on your makeup application\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Flutter** - Cross-platform mobile development\\\\\\\\n- **Google ML Kit** - Face detection and landmarks\\\\\\\\n- **Provider** - State management\\\\\\\\n- **go_router** - Navigation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Project Structure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\\\\\\\nlib/\\\\\\\\n  app/                    # App-level configuration\\\\\\\\n    theme/                # Theme and colors\\\\\\\\n    app.dart              # Root app widget\\\\\\\\n    router.dart           # Navigation routes\\\\\\\\n  core/                   # Core utilities\\\\\\\\n    constants/\\\\\\\\n    utils/\\\\\\\\n    logger/\\\\\\\\n  features/               # Feature-based modules\\\\\\\\n    home/                 # Home page\\\\\\\\n    analysis/             # Face analysis feature\\\\\\\\n    recommendation/       # Makeup recommendations\\\\\\\\n    tutorial/             # AR tutorial feature\\\\\\\\n    result/               # Scoring and results\\\\\\\\n  services/               # Infrastructure services\\\\\\\\n    camera/               # Camera management\\\\\\\\n    facemesh/             # Face detection\\\\\\\\n    overlay/              # AR overlay rendering\\\\\\\\n  shared/                 # Shared components\\\\\\\\n    models/               # Data models\\\\\\\\n    widgets/              # Reusable widgets\\\\\\\\n    config/               # App configuration\\\\\\\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Getting Started\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Flutter SDK 3.11+\\\\\\\\n- Xcode (for iOS development)\\\\\\\\n- Android Studio (for Android development)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Installation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. Clone the repository\\\\\\\\n2. Install dependencies:\\\\\\\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;bash\\\\\\\\n   flutter pub get\\\\\\\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. Run the app:\\\\\\\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;bash\\\\\\\\n   flutter run\\\\\\\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Development Status\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThis project is currently in MVP development phase. AI Makeup Coaching App\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAn AI-powered makeup learning application that provides personalized tutorials with real-time AR guidance.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Face Analysis**: AI-powered facial feature detection and analysis\\\\\\\\n- **Personalized Recommendations**: Custom makeup tutorials based on your face shape, skin tone, and lip type\\\\\\\\n- **AR Tutorial Overlay**: Real-time visual guidance for makeup application\\\\\\\\n- **Progress Scoring**: Instant feedback on your makeup application\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Flutter** - Cross-platform mobile development\\\\\\\\n- **Google ML Kit** - Face detection and landmarks\\\\\\\\n- **Provider** - State management\\\\\\\\n- **go_router** - Navigation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Project Structure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\\\\\\\nlib/\\\\\\\\n  app/                    # App-level configuration\\\\\\\\n    theme/                # Theme and colors\\\\\\\\n    app.dart              # Root app widget\\\\\\\\n    router.dart           # Navigation routes\\\\\\\\n  core/                   # Core utilities\\\\\\\\n    constants/\\\\\\\\n    utils/\\\\\\\\n    logger/\\\\\\\\n  features/               # Feature-based modules\\\\\\\\n    home/                 # Home page\\\\\\\\n    analysis/             # Face analysis feature\\\\\\\\n    recommendation/       # Makeup recommendations\\\\\\\\n    tutorial/             # AR tutorial feature\\\\\\\\n    result/               # Scoring and results\\\\\\\\n  services/               # Infrastructure services\\\\\\\\n    camera/               # Camera management\\\\\\\\n    facemesh/             # Face detection\\\\\\\\n    overlay/              # AR overlay rendering\\\\\\\\n  shared/                 # Shared components\\\\\\\\n    models/               # Data models\\\\\\\\n    widgets/              # Reusable widgets\\\\\\\\n    config/               # App configuration\\\\\\\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Getting Started\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Flutter SDK 3.11+\\\\\\\\n- Xcode (for iOS development)\\\\\\\\n- Android Studio (for Android development)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Installation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. Clone the repository\\\\\\\\n2. Install dependencies:\\\\\\\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;bash\\\\\\\\n   flutter pub get\\\\\\\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. Run the app:\\\\\\\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;bash\\\\\\\\n   flutter run\\\\\\\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Development Status\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThis project is currently in MVP development phase.
