contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import 'dart:io';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:camera/camera.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/material.dart' show Size;\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:google_mlkit_face_detection/google_mlkit_face_detection.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_point.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass FaceMeshService {\\\\\\\\n  final FaceDetector _detector;\\\\\\\\n  bool _isProcessing = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FaceMeshService()\\\\\\\\n      : _detector = FaceDetector(\\\\\\\\n          options: FaceDetectorOptions(\\\\\\\\n            enableContours: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableLandmarks: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableClassification: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableTracking: true,\\\\\\\\n            performanceMode: FaceDetectorMode.accurate,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── CameraImage -\u003e InputImage conversion ─────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Convert a raw [CameraImage] frame into an [InputImage] suitable for ML Kit.\\\\\\\\n  /// Returns null when the image format is unsupported.\\\\\\\\n  InputImage? convertCameraImage(\\\\\\\\n    CameraImage image,\\\\\\\\n    CameraDescription camera,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      final rotation = _sensorToInputRotation(camera.sensorOrientation);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (Platform.isAndroid) {\\\\\\\\n        // Android delivers NV21 (YUV 4:2:0 semi-planar) in a single plane\\\\\\\\n        final plane = image.planes[0];\\\\\\\\n        return InputImage.fromBytes(\\\\\\\\n          bytes: plane.bytes,\\\\\\\\n          metadata: InputImageMetadata(\\\\\\\\n            size: Size(image.width.toDouble(), image.height.toDouble()),\\\\\\\\n            rotation: rotation,\\\\\\\\n            format: InputImageFormat.nv21,\\\\\\\\n            bytesPerRow: plane.bytesPerRow,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n      } else if (Platform.isIOS) {\\\\\\\\n        // iOS delivers BGRA8888 in a single plane\\\\\\\\n        final plane = image.planes[0];\\\\\\\\n        return InputImage.fromBytes(\\\\\\\\n          bytes: plane.bytes,\\\\\\\\n          metadata: InputImageMetadata(\\\\\\\\n            size: Size(image.width.toDouble(), image.height.toDouble()),\\\\\\\\n            rotation: rotation,\\\\\\\\n            format: InputImageFormat.bgra8888,\\\\\\\\n            bytesPerRow: plane.bytesPerRow,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      debugPrint('FaceMeshService: convertCameraImage error: $e');\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Map sensor orientation degrees to the nearest [InputImageRotation] value.\\\\\\\\n  InputImageRotation _sensorToInputRotation(int sensorOrientation) {\\\\\\\\n    switch (sensorOrientation) {\\\\\\\\n      case 90:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation90deg;\\\\\\\\n      case 180:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation180deg;\\\\\\\\n      case 270:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation270deg;\\\\\\\\n      default:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation0deg;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Detection ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Process an [InputImage] and return structured [FaceLandmarks], or null\\\\\\\\n  /// when no face is detected or another call is already in flight.\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cFaceLandmarks?\u003e detectFace(InputImage image) async {\\\\\\\\n    if (_isProcessing) return null;\\\\\\\\n    _isProcessing = true;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      final faces = await _detector.processImage(image);\\\\\\\\n      if (faces.isEmpty) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Use the face with the largest bounding box (most prominent)\\\\\\\\n      final face = faces.reduce(\\\\\\\\n        (a, b) =\u003e\\\\\\\\n            a.boundingBox.width * a.boundingBox.height \u003e\\\\\\\\n                    b.boundingBox.width * b.boundingBox.height\\\\\\\\n                ? a\\\\\\\\n                : b,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      return _extractLandmarks(face);\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      debugPrint('FaceMeshService: detectFace error: $e');\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      _isProcessing = false;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks _extractLandmarks(Face face) {\\\\\\\\n    // Face oval contour\\\\\\\\n    final faceContour = _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.face);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // All four lip contour groups\\\\\\\\n    final upperLipTop =\\\\\\\\n        _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.upperLipTop);\\\\\\\\n    final upperLipBottom =\\\\\\\\n        _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.upperLipBottom);\\\\\\\\n    final lowerLipTop =\\\\\\\\n        _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.lowerLipTop);\\\\\\\\n    final lowerLipBottom =\\\\\\\\n        _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.lowerLipBottom);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Named landmarks\\\\\\\\n    final noseBase = _extractLandmark(face, FaceLandmarkType.noseBase);\\\\\\\\n    final leftEye = _extractLandmark(face, FaceLandmarkType.leftEye);\\\\\\\\n    final rightEye = _extractLandmark(face, FaceLandmarkType.rightEye);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return FaceLandmarks(\\\\\\\\n      faceContour: faceContour,\\\\\\\\n      upperLipTop: upperLipTop,\\\\\\\\n      upperLipBottom: upperLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n      lowerLipTop: lowerLipTop,\\\\\\\\n      lowerLipBottom: lowerLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n      noseBase: noseBase,\\\\\\\\n      leftEye: leftEye,\\\\\\\\n      rightEye: rightEye,\\\\\\\\n      boundingBox: face.boundingBox,\\\\\\\\n      headAngleY: face.headEulerAngleY,\\\\\\\\n      headAngleZ: face.headEulerAngleZ,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  List\u003cFacePoint\u003e _extractContour(Face face, FaceContourType type) {\\\\\\\\n    final contour = face.contours[type];\\\\\\\\n    if (contour == null) return [];\\\\\\\\n    return contour.points\\\\\\\\n        .map((p) =\u003e FacePoint(x: p.x.toDouble(), y: p.y.toDouble()))\\\\\\\\n        .toList();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FacePoint? _extractLandmark(Face face, FaceLandmarkType type) {\\\\\\\\n    final lm = face.landmarks[type];\\\\\\\\n    if (lm == null) return null;\\\\\\\\n    return FacePoint(x: lm.position.x.toDouble(), y: lm.position.y.toDouble());\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Feature analysis ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Derive high-level face features from structured [FaceLandmarks].\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? analyzeFeatures(FaceLandmarks landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n    final contour = landmarks.faceContour;\\\\\\\\n    if (contour.isEmpty) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    double minX = double.infinity, maxX = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\\\\\n    double minY = double.infinity, maxY = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (final p in contour) {\\\\\\\\n      if (p.x \u003c minX) minX = p.x;\\\\\\\\n      if (p.x \u003e maxX) maxX = p.x;\\\\\\\\n      if (p.y \u003c minY) minY = p.y;\\\\\\\\n      if (p.y \u003e maxY) maxY = p.y;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final width = maxX - minX;\\\\\\\\n    final height = maxY - minY;\\\\\\\\n    if (width == 0) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final aspectRatio = height / width;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    FaceShape faceShape;\\\\\\\\n    if (aspectRatio \u003e 1.4) {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.long;\\\\\\\\n    } else if (aspectRatio \u003c 1.2) {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.round;\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.oval;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return FaceFeatureResult(\\\\\\\\n      faceShape: faceShape,\\\\\\\\n      skinTone: SkinTone.unknown,\\\\\\\\n      lipType: LipType.medium,\\\\\\\\n      confidenceLevel: ConfidenceLevel.medium,\\\\\\\\n      ratios: {'aspectRatio': aspectRatio},\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    _detector.close();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":206}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import 'dart:io';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:camera/camera.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/material.dart' show Size;\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:google_mlkit_face_detection/google_mlkit_face_detection.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_point.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass FaceMeshService {\\\\\\\\n  final FaceDetector _detector;\\\\\\\\n  bool _isProcessing = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FaceMeshService()\\\\\\\\n      : _detector = FaceDetector(\\\\\\\\n          options: FaceDetectorOptions(\\\\\\\\n            enableContours: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableLandmarks: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableClassification: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableTracking: true,\\\\\\\\n            performanceMode: FaceDetectorMode.accurate,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── CameraImage -\u003e InputImage conversion ─────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Convert a raw [CameraImage] frame into an [InputImage] suitable for ML Kit.\\\\\\\\n  /// Returns null when the image format is unsupported.\\\\\\\\n  InputImage? convertCameraImage(\\\\\\\\n    CameraImage image,\\\\\\\\n    CameraDescription camera,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      final rotation = _sensorToInputRotation(camera.sensorOrientation);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (Platform.isAndroid) {\\\\\\\\n        // Android delivers NV21 (YUV 4:2:0 semi-planar) in a single plane\\\\\\\\n        final plane = image.planes[0];\\\\\\\\n        return InputImage.fromBytes(\\\\\\\\n          bytes: plane.bytes,\\\\\\\\n          metadata: InputImageMetadata(\\\\\\\\n            size: Size(image.width.toDouble(), image.height.toDouble()),\\\\\\\\n            rotation: rotation,\\\\\\\\n            format: InputImageFormat.nv21,\\\\\\\\n            bytesPerRow: plane.bytesPerRow,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n      } else if (Platform.isIOS) {\\\\\\\\n        // iOS delivers BGRA8888 in a single plane\\\\\\\\n        final plane = image.planes[0];\\\\\\\\n        return InputImage.fromBytes(\\\\\\\\n          bytes: plane.bytes,\\\\\\\\n          metadata: InputImageMetadata(\\\\\\\\n            size: Size(image.width.toDouble(), image.height.toDouble()),\\\\\\\\n            rotation: rotation,\\\\\\\\n            format: InputImageFormat.bgra8888,\\\\\\\\n            bytesPerRow: plane.bytesPerRow,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      debugPrint('FaceMeshService: convertCameraImage error: $e');\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Map sensor orientation degrees to the nearest [InputImageRotation] value.\\\\\\\\n  InputImageRotation _sensorToInputRotation(int sensorOrientation) {\\\\\\\\n    switch (sensorOrientation) {\\\\\\\\n      case 90:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation90deg;\\\\\\\\n      case 180:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation180deg;\\\\\\\\n      case 270:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation270deg;\\\\\\\\n      default:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation0deg;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Detection ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Process an [InputImage] and return structured [FaceLandmarks], or null\\\\\\\\n  /// when no face is detected or another call is already in flight.\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cFaceLandmarks?\u003e detectFace(InputImage image) async {\\\\\\\\n    if (_isProcessing) return null;\\\\\\\\n    _isProcessing = true;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      final faces = await _detector.processImage(image);\\\\\\\\n      if (faces.isEmpty) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Use the face with the largest bounding box (most prominent)\\\\\\\\n      final face = faces.reduce(\\\\\\\\n        (a, b) =\u003e\\\\\\\\n            a.boundingBox.width * a.boundingBox.height \u003e\\\\\\\\n                    b.boundingBox.width * b.boundingBox.height\\\\\\\\n                ? a\\\\\\\\n                : b,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      return _extractLandmarks(face);\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      debugPrint('FaceMeshService: detectFace error: $e');\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      _isProcessing = false;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks _extractLandmarks(Face face) {\\\\\\\\n    // Face oval contour\\\\\\\\n    final faceContour = _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.face);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // All four lip contour groups\\\\\\\\n    final upperLipTop =\\\\\\\\n        _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.upperLipTop);\\\\\\\\n    final upperLipBottom =\\\\\\\\n        _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.upperLipBottom);\\\\\\\\n    final lowerLipTop =\\\\\\\\n        _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.lowerLipTop);\\\\\\\\n    final lowerLipBottom =\\\\\\\\n        _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.lowerLipBottom);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Named landmarks\\\\\\\\n    final noseBase = _extractLandmark(face, FaceLandmarkType.noseBase);\\\\\\\\n    final leftEye = _extractLandmark(face, FaceLandmarkType.leftEye);\\\\\\\\n    final rightEye = _extractLandmark(face, FaceLandmarkType.rightEye);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return FaceLandmarks(\\\\\\\\n      faceContour: faceContour,\\\\\\\\n      upperLipTop: upperLipTop,\\\\\\\\n      upperLipBottom: upperLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n      lowerLipTop: lowerLipTop,\\\\\\\\n      lowerLipBottom: lowerLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n      noseBase: noseBase,\\\\\\\\n      leftEye: leftEye,\\\\\\\\n      rightEye: rightEye,\\\\\\\\n      boundingBox: face.boundingBox,\\\\\\\\n      headAngleY: face.headEulerAngleY,\\\\\\\\n      headAngleZ: face.headEulerAngleZ,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  List\u003cFacePoint\u003e _extractContour(Face face, FaceContourType type) {\\\\\\\\n    final contour = face.contours[type];\\\\\\\\n    if (contour == null) return [];\\\\\\\\n    return contour.points\\\\\\\\n        .map((p) =\u003e FacePoint(x: p.x.toDouble(), y: p.y.toDouble()))\\\\\\\\n        .toList();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FacePoint? _extractLandmark(Face face, FaceLandmarkType type) {\\\\\\\\n    final lm = face.landmarks[type];\\\\\\\\n    if (lm == null) return null;\\\\\\\\n    return FacePoint(x: lm.position.x.toDouble(), y: lm.position.y.toDouble());\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Feature analysis ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Derive high-level face features from structured [FaceLandmarks].\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? analyzeFeatures(FaceLandmarks landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n    final contour = landmarks.faceContour;\\\\\\\\n    if (contour.isEmpty) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    double minX = double.infinity, maxX = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\\\\\n    double minY = double.infinity, maxY = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (final p in contour) {\\\\\\\\n      if (p.x \u003c minX) minX = p.x;\\\\\\\\n      if (p.x \u003e maxX) maxX = p.x;\\\\\\\\n      if (p.y \u003c minY) minY = p.y;\\\\\\\\n      if (p.y \u003e maxY) maxY = p.y;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final width = maxX - minX;\\\\\\\\n    final height = maxY - minY;\\\\\\\\n    if (width == 0) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final aspectRatio = height / width;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    FaceShape faceShape;\\\\\\\\n    if (aspectRatio \u003e 1.4) {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.long;\\\\\\\\n    } else if (aspectRatio \u003c 1.2) {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.round;\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.oval;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return FaceFeatureResult(\\\\\\\\n      faceShape: faceShape,\\\\\\\\n      skinTone: SkinTone.unknown,\\\\\\\\n      lipType: LipType.medium,\\\\\\\\n      confidenceLevel: ConfidenceLevel.medium,\\\\\\\\n      ratios: {'aspectRatio': aspectRatio},\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    _detector.close();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":206,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":6866,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":206}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"15acce03-deb2-4127-85f4-5f58fe68b6ca\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"cc4a5b76-b3f2-4766-b436-17fcf1418d69\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunde classification\\\\\\\\nenum SkinTone {\\\\\\\\n  cool,\\\\\\\\n  warm,\\\\\\\\n  neutral,\\\\\\\\n  unknown,\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Lip type classification\\\\\\\\nenum LipType {\\\\\\\\n  thin,\\\\\\\\n  medium,\\\\\\\\n  full,\\\\\\\\n  unknown,\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Confidence level for feature detection\\\\\\\\nenum ConfidenceLevel {\\\\\\\\n  low,\\\\\\\\n  medium,\\\\\\\\n  high,\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Result of facial feature analysis\\\\\\\\nclass FaceFeatureResult {\\\\\\\\n  final FaceShape faceShape;\\\\\\\\n  final SkinTone skinTone;\\\\\\\\n  final LipType lipType;\\\\\\\\n  final ConfidenceLevel confidenceLevel;\\\\\\\\n  final Map\u003cString, double\u003e ratios;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const FaceFeatureResult({\\\\\\\\n    this.faceShape = FaceShape.unknown,\\\\\\\\n    this.skinTone = SkinTone.unknown,\\\\\\\\n    this.lipType = LipType.unknown,\\\\\\\\n    this.confidenceLevel = ConfidenceLevel.low,\\\\\\\\n    this.ratios = const {},\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  factory FaceFeatureResult.fromMap(Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e map) {\\\\\\\\n    return FaceFeatureResult(\\\\\\\\n      faceShape: FaceShape.values.firstWhere(\\\\\\\\n        (e) =\u003e e.name == map['faceShape'],\\\\\\\\n        orElse: () =\u003e FaceShape.unknown,\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      skinTone: 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'face_point.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Structured face landmarks extracted from ML Kit FaceDetector\\\\\\\\nclass FaceLandmarks {\\\\\\\\n  /// Face oval contour points (~36 pts), used for cheek position estimation\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e faceContour;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Upper lip outer edge points (~11 pts), top boundary of lip polygon\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperLipTop;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Upper lip inner edge points (~9 pts)\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperLipBottom;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Lower lip inner edge points (~9 pts)\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerLipTop;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Lower lip outer edge points (~9 pts), bottom boundary of lip polygon\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerLipBottom;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Nose base landmark, anchor point for cheek center calculation\\\\\\\\n  final FacePoint? noseBase;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Left eye center landmark\\\\\\\\n  final FacePoint? leftEye;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Right eye center landmark\\\\\\\\n  final FacePoint? rightEye;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Bounding box of detected face in image coordinates\\\\\\\\n  final Rect boundingBox;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Head yaw angle in degrees; large values indicate side-facing\\\\\\\\n  final double? headAngleY;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Head roll angle in degrees\\\\\\\\n  final double? headAngleZ;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const FaceLandmarks({\\\\\\\\n    required this.faceContour,\\\\\\\\n    required this.upperLipTop,\\\\\\\\n    required this.upperLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n    required this.lowerLipTop,\\\\\\\\n    required this.lowerLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n    this.noseBase,\\\\\\\\n    this.leftEye,\\\\\\\\n    this.rightEye,\\\\\\\\n    required this.boundingBox,\\\\\\\\n    this.headAngleY,\\\\\\\\n    this.headAngleZ,\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Whether this landmarks object has enough data to render a lip overlay\\\\\\\\n  bool get hasLipData =\u003e\\\\\\\\n      upperLipTop.length \u003e= 3 \u0026\u0026 lowerLipBottom.length \u003e= 3;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Whether this landmarks object has enough data to render cheek overlays\\\\\\\\n  bool get hasCheekData =\u003e\\\\\\\\n      (noseBase != null || leftEye != null || rightEye != null) \u0026\u0026\\\\\\\\n      faceContour.length \u003e= 6;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Whether the face is significantly turned sideways (|yaw| \u003e 25 degrees)\\\\\\\\n  bool get isSideFacing =\u003e\\\\\\\\n      headAngleY != null \u0026\u0026 headAngleY!.abs() \u003e 25.0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Apply exponential moving average smoothing against a previous landmarks snapshot.\\\\\\\\n  /// [alpha] controls how much weight to give new values (0.0 = all old, 1.0 = all new).\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks smoothWith(FaceLandmarks? previous, {double alpha = 0.5}) {\\\\\\\\n    if (previous == null) return this;\\\\\\\\n    return FaceLandmarks(\\\\\\\\n      faceContour: _smoothPoints(faceContour, previous.faceContour, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      upperLipTop: _smoothPoints(upperLipTop, previous.upperLipTop, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      upperLipBottom:\\\\\\\\n          _smoothPoints(upperLipBottom, previous.upperLipBottom, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      lowerLipTop: _smoothPoints(lowerLipTop, previous.lowerLipTop, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      lowerLipBottom:\\\\\\\\n          _smoothPoints(lowerLipBottom, previous.lowerLipBottom, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      noseBase: _smoothPoint(noseBase, previous.noseBase, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      leftEye: _smoothPoint(leftEye, previous.leftEye, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      rightEye: _smoothPoint(rightEye, previous.rightEye, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      boundingBox: Rect.lerp(previous.boundingBox, boundingBox, alpha)!,\\\\\\\\n      headAngleY: headAngleY,\\\\\\\\n      headAngleZ: headAngleZ,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  static List\u003cFacePoint\u003e _smoothPoints(\\\\\\\\n    List\u003cFacePoint\u003e current,\\\\\\\\n    List\u003cFacePoint\u003e previous,\\\\\\\\n    double alpha,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    if (current.length != previous.length) return current;\\\\\\\\n    return List.generate(\\\\\\\\n      current.length,\\\\\\\\n      (i) =\u003e _smoothPoint(current[i], previous[i], alpha)!,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  static FacePoint? _smoothPoint(\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint? current,\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint? previous,\\\\\\\\n    double alpha,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    if (current == null) return null;\\\\\\\\n    if (previous == null) return current;\\\\\\\\n    return FacePoint(\\\\\\\\n      x: previous.x + alpha * (current.x - previous.x),\\\\\\\\n      y: previous.y + alpha * oval contour points (~36 pts), used for cheek position estimation\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e faceContour;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Upper lip outer edge points (~11 pts), top boundary of lip polygon\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperLipTop;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Upper lip inner edge points (~9 pts)\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperLipBottom;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Lower lip inner edge points (~9 pts)\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerLipTop;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Lower lip outer edge points (~9 pts), bottom boundary of lip polygon\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerLipBottom;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Nose base landmark, anchor point for cheek center calculation\\\\\\\\n  final FacePoint? noseBase;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Left eye center landmark\\\\\\\\n  final FacePoint? leftEye;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Right eye center landmark\\\\\\\\n  final FacePoint? rightEye;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Bounding box of detected face in image coordinates\\\\\\\\n  final Rect boundingBox;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Head yaw angle in degrees; large values indicate side-facing\\\\\\\\n  final double? headAngleY;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Head roll angle in degrees\\\\\\\\n  final double? headAngleZ;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const FaceLandmarks({\\\\\\\\n    required this.faceContour,\\\\\\\\n    required this.upperLipTop,\\\\\\\\n    required this.upperLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n    required this.lowerLipTop,\\\\\\\\n    required this.lowerLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n    this.noseBase,\\\\\\\\n    this.leftEye,\\\\\\\\n    this.rightEye,\\\\\\\\n    required this.boundingBox,\\\\\\\\n    this.headAngleY,\\\\\\\\n    this.headAngleZ,\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Whether this landmarks object has enough data to render a lip overlay\\\\\\\\n  bool get hasLipData =\u003e\\\\\\\\n      upperLipTop.length \u003e= 3 \u0026\u0026 lowerLipBottom.length \u003e= 3;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Whether this landmarks object has enough data to render cheek overlays\\\\\\\\n  bool get hasCheekData =\u003e\\\\\\\\n      (noseBase != null || leftEye != null || rightEye != null) \u0026\u0026\\\\\\\\n      faceContour.length \u003e= 6;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Whether the face is significantly turned sideways (|yaw| \u003e 25 degrees)\\\\\\\\n  bool get isSideFacing =\u003e\\\\\\\\n      headAngleY != null \u0026\u0026 headAngleY!.abs() \u003e 25.0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Apply exponential moving average smoothing against a previous landmarks snapshot.\\\\\\\\n  /// [alpha] controls how much weight to give new values (0.0 = all old, 1.0 = all new).\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks smoothWith(FaceLandmarks? previous, {double alpha = 0.5}) {\\\\\\\\n    if (previous == null) return this;\\\\\\\\n    return FaceLandmarks(\\\\\\\\n      faceContour: _smoothPoints(faceContour, previous.faceContour, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      upperLipTop: _smoothPoints(upperLipTop, previous.upperLipTop, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      upperLipBottom:\\\\\\\\n          _smoothPoints(upperLipBottom, previous.upperLipBottom, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      lowerLipTop: _smoothPoints(lowerLipTop, previous.lowerLipTop, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      lowerLipBottom:\\\\\\\\n          _smoothPoints(lowerLipBottom, previous.lowerLipBottom, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      noseBase: _smoothPoint(noseBase, previous.noseBase, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      leftEye: _smoothPoint(leftEye, previous.leftEye, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      rightEye: _smoothPoint(rightEye, previous.rightEye, alpha),\\\\\\\\n      boundingBox: Rect.lerp(previous.boundingBox, boundingBox, alpha)!,\\\\\\\\n      headAngleY: headAngleY,\\\\\\\\n      headAngleZ: headAngleZ,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  static List\u003cFacePoint\u003e _smoothPoints(\\\\\\\\n    List\u003cFacePoint\u003e current,\\\\\\\\n    List\u003cFacePoint\u003e previous,\\\\\\\\n    double alpha,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    if Color(map['borderColor'] as int) : null,\\\\\\\\n      borderWidth: (map['borderWidth'] as num?)?.toDouble(),\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e toMap() {\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      'color': color.toARGB32(),\\\\\\\\n      'opacity': opacity,\\\\\\\\n      'showBorder': showBorder,\\\\\\\\n      if (borderColor != null) 'borderColor': borderColor!.toARGB32(),\\\\\\\\n      if (borderWidth != null) 'borderWidth': borderWidth,\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Single step in a makeup tutorial\\\\\\\\nclass TutorialStep {\\\\\\\\n  final String id;\\\\\\\\n  final String title;\\\\\\\\n  final String instruction;\\\\\\\\n  final TargetRegion targetRegion;\\\\\\\\n  final OverlayStyle? overlayStyle;\\\\\\\\n  final int order;\\\\\\\\n  final Duration? estimatedDuration;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const TutorialStep({\\\\\\\\n    required this.id,\\\\\\\\n    required this.title,\\\\\\\\n    required this.instruction,\\\\\\\\n    required this.targetRegion,\\\\\\\\n    this.overlayStyle,\\\\\\\\n    required this.order,\\\\\\\\n    this.estimatedDuration,\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  factory TutorialStep.fromMap(Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e map) {\\\\\\\\n    return TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n      id: map['id'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      title: map['title'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      instruction: map['instruction'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      targetRegion: TargetRegion.values.firstWhere(\\\\\\\\n        (e) =\u003e e.name == map['targetRegion'],\\\\\\\\n        orElse: () =\u003e TargetRegion.lips,\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      overlayStyle: map['overlayStyle'] != null\\\\\\\\n          ? Duration(milliseconds: map['estimatedDuration'] as int)\\\\\\\\n          : null,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e toMap() {\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      'id': id,\\\\\\\\n      'title': title,\\\\\\\\n      'instruction': instruction,\\\\\\\\n      'targetRegion': targetRegion.name,\\\\\\\\n      if (overlayStyle != null) 'overlayStyle': overlayStyle!.toMap(),\\\\\\\\n      'order': order,\\\\\\\\n      if (estimatedDuration != null)\\\\\\\\n        'estimatedDuration': estimatedDuration!.inMilliseconds,\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Complete makeup profile/template\\\\\\\\nclass MakeupProfile {\\\\\\\\n  final String id;\\\\\\\\n  final String name;\\\\\\\\n  final String description;\\\\\\\\n  final String category;\\\\\\\\n  final Color? lipColor;\\\\\\\\n  final Color? blushColor;\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cTutorialStep\u003e tutorialSteps;\\\\\\\\n  final List\u003cString\u003e recommendationReasons;\\\\\\\\n  final String? thumbnail;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const MakeupProfile({\\\\\\\\n    required this.id,\\\\\\\\n    required this.name,\\\\\\\\n    this.description = '',\\\\\\\\n    required this.category,\\\\\\\\n    this.lipColor,\\\\\\\\n    this.blushColor,\\\\\\\\n    this.tutorialSteps = const [],\\\\\\\\n    this.recommendationReasons = const [],\\\\\\\\n    this.thumbnail,\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  factory MakeupProfile.fromMap(Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e map) {\\\\\\\\n    return MakeupProfile(\\\\\\\\n      id: map['id'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      name: map['name'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      description: map['description'] as String? ?? '',\\\\\\\\n      category: map['category'] as String,\\\\\\\\n      lipColor:\\\\\\\\n          map['lipColor'] != null ? []),\\\\\\\\n      thumbnail: map['thumbnail'] as String?,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e toMap() {\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      'id': id,\\\\\\\\n 'package:camera/camera.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/services/camera/camera_service.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass AnalysisController extends ChangeNotifier {\\\\\\\\n  final CameraService _cameraService;\\\\\\\\n  final FaceMeshService _faceMeshService;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  AnalysisController({\\\\\\\\n    CameraService? cameraService,\\\\\\\\n    FaceMeshService? faceMeshService,\\\\\\\\n  })  : _cameraService = cameraService ?? CameraService(),\\\\\\\\n        _faceMeshService = faceMeshService ?? FaceMeshService();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  bool _isAnalyzing = false;\\\\\\\\n  bool _isAnalysisComplete = false;\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? _featureResult;\\\\\\\\n  String? _errorMessage;\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks? _currentLandmarks;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Getters\\\\\\\\n  bool get isCameraInitialized =\u003e _cameraService.isInitialized;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isAnalyzing =\u003e _isAnalyzing;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isAnalysisComplete =\u003e _isAnalysisComplete;\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? get featureResult =\u003e _featureResult;\\\\\\\\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\\\\\\\\n  CameraStatus get cameraStatus =\u003e _cameraService.status;\\\\\\\\n  String? get cameraErrorMessage =\u003e _cameraService.errorMessage;\\\\\\\\n  CameraController? get cameraController =\u003e _cameraService.controller;\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks? get currentLandmarks =\u003e _currentLandmarks;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e startAnalysis() async {\\\\\\\\n    _errorMessage = null;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    await _cameraService.initialize();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!_cameraService.isInitialized) {\\\\\\\\n      _errorMessage = _cameraService.errorMessage ?? 'Camera initialization failed';\\\\\\\\n      notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n    _startFaceDetection();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _startFaceDetection() {\\\\\\\\n    final camera = _cameraService.cameras.firstWhere(\\\\\\\\n      (c) =\u003e c.lensDirection == CameraLensDirection.front,\\\\\\\\n      orElse: () =\u003e _cameraService.cameras.first,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _cameraService.startImageStream((image) async {\\\\\\\\n      if (_isAnalyzing) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      final inputImage = _faceMeshService.convertCameraImage(image, camera);\\\\\\\\n      if (inputImage == null) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      final landmarks = await _faceMeshService.detectFace(inputImage);\\\\\\\\n      if (landmarks != null) {\\\\\\\\n        _currentLandmarks = landmarks;\\\\\\\\n        notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e completeAnalysis() async {\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentLandmarks == null) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _isAnalyzing = true;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      final result = _faceMeshService.analyzeFeatures(_currentLandmarks!);\\\\\\\\n      if (result != null) {\\\\\\\\n        _featureResult = result;\\\\\\\\n        _isAnalysisComplete = true;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      _isAnalyzing = false;\\\\\\\\n      _cameraService.stopImageStream();\\\\\\\\n      notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void reset() {\\\\\\\\n    _cameraService.stopImageStream();\\\\\\\\n    _isAnalyzing = false;\\\\\\\\n    _isAnalysisComplete = false;\\\\\\\\n    _featureResult = null;\\\\\\\\n    _errorMessage = null;\\\\\\\\n    _currentLandmarks = null;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    _cameraService.dispose();\\\\\\\\n    _faceMeshService.dispose();\\\\\\\\n    super.dispose();\\\\\\\\n 'package:camera/camera.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/services/camera/camera_service.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass AnalysisController extends ChangeNotifier {\\\\\\\\n  final CameraService _cameraService;\\\\\\\\n  final FaceMeshService _faceMeshService;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  AnalysisController({\\\\\\\\n    CameraService? cameraService,\\\\\\\\n    FaceMeshService? faceMeshService,\\\\\\\\n  })  : _cameraService = cameraService ?? CameraService(),\\\\\\\\n        _faceMeshService = faceMeshService ?? FaceMeshService();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  bool _isAnalyzing = false;\\\\\\\\n  bool _isAnalysisComplete = false;\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? _featureResult;\\\\\\\\n  String? _errorMessage;\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks? _currentLandmarks;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Getters\\\\\\\\n  bool get isCameraInitialized =\u003e _cameraService.isInitialized;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isAnalyzing =\u003e _isAnalyzing;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isAnalysisComplete =\u003e _isAnalysisComplete;\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? get featureResult =\u003e _featureResult;\\\\\\\\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\\\\\\\\n  CameraStatus get cameraStatus =\u003e _cameraService.status;\\\\\\\\n  String? get cameraErrorMessage =\u003e _cameraService.errorMessage;\\\\\\\\n  CameraController? get cameraController =\u003e _cameraService.controller;\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks? get currentLandmarks =\u003e _currentLandmarks;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e startAnalysis() async {\\\\\\\\n    _errorMessage = null;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    await _cameraService.initialize();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!_cameraService.isInitialized) {\\\\\\\\n      _errorMessage = _cameraService.errorMessage ?? 'Camera initialization failed';\\\\\\\\n      notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n    _startFaceDetection();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _startFaceDetection() {\\\\\\\\n    final camera = _cameraService.cameras.firstWhere(\\\\\\\\n      (c) =\u003e c.lensDirection == CameraLensDirection.front,\\\\\\\\n      orElse: () =\u003e _cameraService.cameras.first,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _cameraService.startImageStream((image) async {\\\\\\\\n      if (_isAnalyzing) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      final inputImage = _faceMeshService.convertCameraImage(image, camera);\\\\\\\\n      if (inputImage == null) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      final landmarks = await _faceMeshService.detectFace(inputImage);\\\\\\\\n      if (landmarks != null) {\\\\\\\\n        _currentLandmarks = landmarks;\\\\\\\\n        notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e completeAnalysis() async {\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentLandmarks == null) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _isAnalyzing = true;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      final result = _faceMeshService.analyzeFeatures(_currentLandmarks!);\\\\\\\\n      if (result != null) {\\\\\\\\n        _featureResult = result;\\\\\\\\n        _isAnalysisComplete = true;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      _isAnalyzing = false;\\\\\\\\n      _cameraService.stopImageStream();\\\\\\\\n      notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void reset() {\\\\\\\\n    _cameraService.stopImageStream();\\\\\\\\n    _isAnalyzing = false;\\\\\\\\n    _isAnalysisComplete = false;\\\\\\\\n    _featureResult = null;\\\\\\\\n    _errorMessage = null;\\\\\\\\n    _currentLandmarks = null;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    _cameraService.dispose();\\\\\\\\n    _faceMeshService.dispose();\\\\\\\\n    super.dispose();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":107,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":3130,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":107}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"2fbc7420-de99-451d-9e13-49ac0c957a5d\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"ec8b95e1-94d2-421b-a52e-4e33a0fa369b\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[] SizedBox(height: 8),\\\\\\\\n          Text(\\\\\\\\n            message,\\\\\\\\n            style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 14),\\\\\\\\n            textAlign: }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass _PermissionDeniedWidget extends StatelessWidget {\\\\\\\\n  final VoidCallback onRetry;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const _PermissionDeniedWidget({required 'dart:async';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:camera/camera.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:google_mlkit_face_detection/google_mlkit_face_detection.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/config/app_config.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_point.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport 'camera/camera_service.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Tracking state reported to the UI.\\\\\\\\nenum TrackingState {\\\\\\\\n  idle,\\\\\\\\n  initializing,\\\\\\\\n  tracking,\\\\\\\\n  paused,\\\\\\\\n  error,\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Orchestrates [CameraService] and [FaceMeshService] into a single\\\\\\\\n/// [ChangeNotifier] that the UI can observe.\\\\\\\\n///\\\\\\\\n/// Responsibilities:\\\\\\\\n///  - Start / stop / pause camera and ML Kit pipeline\\\\\\\\n///  - Frame throttle: only process one frame per [AppConfig.analysisIntervalMs]\\\\\\\\n///  - Coordinate transform: image-space → widget-space (rotation + mirror + scale)\\\\\\\\n///  - EMA smoothing on landmark positions\\\\\\\\nclass FaceTrackingController extends ChangeNotifier {\\\\\\\\n  final CameraService _cameraService;\\\\\\\\n  final FaceMeshService _faceMeshService;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FaceTrackingController({\\\\\\\\n    CameraService? cameraService,\\\\\\\\n    FaceMeshService? faceMeshService,\\\\\\\\n  })  : _cameraService = cameraService ?? CameraService(),\\\\\\\\n        _faceMeshService = faceMeshService ?? FaceMeshService();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  TrackingState _state = TrackingState.idle;\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks? _landmarks;\\\\\\\\n  String? _errorMessage;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Timestamp of the last frame we actually processed through ML Kit.\\\\\\\\n  DateTime? _lastProcessedAt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Preview widget dimensions — set by the UI layer for coordinate scaling.\\\\\\\\n  Size? _previewWidgetSize;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Public getters ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  TrackingState get state =\u003e _state;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isTracking =\u003e _state == TrackingState.tracking;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isFaceDetected =\u003e _landmarks != null;\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks? get landmarks =\u003e _landmarks;\\\\\\\\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Expose the underlying [CameraController] so [CameraPreview] can use it.\\\\\\\\n  CameraController? get cameraController =\u003e _cameraService.controller;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Initialise the camera and start the detection pipeline.\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e startTracking() async {\\\\\\\\n    if (_state == TrackingState.tracking ||\\\\\\\\n        _state == TrackingState.initializing) {\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _setState(TrackingState.initializing);\\\\\\\\n    _errorMessage = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      await _cameraService.initialize();\\\\\\\\n      _cameraService.startImageStream(_onCameraFrame);\\\\\\\\n      _setState(TrackingState.tracking);\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      _errorMessage = e.toString();\\\\\\\\n      _setState(TrackingState.error);\\\\\\\\n      debugPrint('FaceTrackingController: startTracking error: $e');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Pause image processing without releasing the camera (e.g. app goes to background).\\\\\\\\n  void pauseTracking() {\\\\\\\\n    if (_state != TrackingState.tracking) return;\\\\\\\\n    _cameraService.stopImageStream();\\\\\\\\n    _setState(TrackingState.paused);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Resume after [pauseTracking].\\\\\\\\n  void resumeTracking() {\\\\\\\\n    if (_state != TrackingState.paused) return;\\\\\\\\n    if (_cameraService.isInitialized) {\\\\\\\\n      _cameraService.startImageStream(_onCameraFrame);\\\\\\\\n      _setState(TrackingState.tracking);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Fully stop and release all resources.\\\\\\\\n  void stopTracking() {\\\\\\\\n    _cameraService.stopImageStream();\\\\\\\\n    _cameraService.dispose();\\\\\\\\n    _faceMeshService.dispose();\\\\\\\\n    _landmarks = null;\\\\\\\\n    _setState(TrackingState.idle);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Call this from the UI once the preview widget size is known (e.g. in\\\\\\\\n  /// [LayoutBuilder] or [initState] after the first frame).\\\\\\\\n  void updatePreviewSize(Size size) {\\\\\\\\n    _previewWidgetSize = size;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Frame processing ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _onCameraFrame(CameraImage image) {\\\\\\\\n    // Throttle: skip frames that arrive too soon after the last one processed.\\\\\\\\n    final now = DateTime.now();\\\\\\\\n    if (_lastProcessedAt != null) {\\\\\\\\n      final elapsed = now.difference(_lastProcessedAt!).inMilliseconds;\\\\\\\\n      if (elapsed \u003c AppConfig.analysisIntervalMs) return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    _lastProcessedAt = now;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Schedule async processing without blocking the camera thread.\\\\\\\\n    _processFrame(image);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _processFrame(CameraImage image) async {\\\\\\\\n    final camera = _cameraService.cameras.isNotEmpty\\\\\\\\n        ? _cameraService.cameras.firstWhere(\\\\\\\\n            (c) =\u003e c.lensDirection == CameraLensDirection.front,\\\\\\\\n            orElse: () =\u003e _cameraService.cameras.first,\\\\\\\\n          )\\\\\\\\n        : null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (camera == null) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final inputImage =\\\\\\\\n        _faceMeshService.convertCameraImage(image, camera);\\\\\\\\n    if (inputImage == null) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final detected = await _faceMeshService.detectFace(inputImage);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (detected == null) {\\\\\\\\n      // Face lost\\\\\\\\n      if (_landmarks != null) {\\\\\\\\n        _landmarks = null;\\\\\\\\n        notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Apply coordinate transform then EMA smoothing.\\\\\\\\n    final imageSize =\\\\\\\\n        Size(image.width.toDouble(), image.height.toDouble());\\\\\\\\n    final transformed = _transformLandmarks(detected, imageSize, camera);\\\\\\\\n    final smoothed = transformed.smoothWith(_landmarks, alpha: 0.4);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _landmarks = smoothed;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Coordinate transform ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Transform [raw] landmarks from ML Kit image-space to Flutter widget-space.\\\\\\\\n  ///\\\\\\\\n  /// ML Kit returns coordinates in the camera image's native frame:\\\\\\\\n  ///  - For Android: image is often 90° rotated relative to screen\\\\\\\\n  ///  - For front cameras: image is mirrored on the X axis\\\\\\\\n  ///\\\\\\\\n  /// We produce widget-space coordinates so [CustomPainter] can draw directly.\\\\\\\\n  FaceLandmarks _transformLandmarks(\\\\\\\\n    FaceLandmarks raw,\\\\\\\\n    Size imageSize,\\\\\\\\n    CameraDescription camera,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    final widgetSize = _previewWidgetSize;\\\\\\\\n    if (widgetSize == null) return raw;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final isFront = camera.lensDirection == CameraLensDirection.front;\\\\\\\\n    final rotation = _resolveRotation(camera.sensorOrientation);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    Offset transform(FacePoint p) =\u003e\\\\\\\\n        _imageToWidget(p, imageSize, widgetSize, rotation, isFront);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    Rect transformRect(Rect r) {\\\\\\\\n      final tl = transform(FacePoint(x: r.left, y: r.top));\\\\\\\\n      final br = transform(FacePoint(x: r.right, y: r.bottom));\\\\\\\\n      return Rect.fromPoints(tl, br);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return FaceLandmarks(\\\\\\\\n      faceContour: raw.faceContour.map((p) =\u003e _toFacePoint(transform(p))).toList(),\\\\\\\\n      upperLipTop: raw.upperLipTop.map((p) =\u003e _toFacePoint(transform(p))).toList(),\\\\\\\\n      upperLipBottom:\\\\\\\\n          raw.upperLipBottom.map((p) =\u003e _toFacePoint(transform(p))).toList(),\\\\\\\\n      lowerLipTop:\\\\\\\\n          raw.lowerLipTop.map((p) =\u003e _toFacePoint(transform(p))).toList(),\\\\\\\\n      lowerLipBottom:\\\\\\\\n          raw.lowerLipBottom.map((p) =\u003e _toFacePoint(transform(p))).toList(),\\\\\\\\n      noseBase: raw.noseBase != null\\\\\\\\n          ? _toFacePoint(transform(raw.noseBase!))\\\\\\\\n          : null,\\\\\\\\n      leftEye: raw.leftEye != null\\\\\\\\n          ? _toFacePoint(transform(raw.leftEye!))\\\\\\\\n          : null,\\\\\\\\n      rightEye: raw.rightEye != null\\\\\\\\n          ? _toFacePoint(transform(raw.rightEye!))\\\\\\\\n          : null,\\\\\\\\n      boundingBox: transformRect(raw.boundingBox),\\\\\\\\n      headAngleY: raw.headAngleY,\\\\\\\\n      headAngleZ: raw.headAngleZ,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Convert a single [FacePoint] from image coordinates to widget coordinates.\\\\\\\\n  Offset _imageToWidget(\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint p,\\\\\\\\n    Size imageSize,\\\\\\\\n    Size widgetSize,\\\\\\\\n    InputImageRotation rotation,\\\\\\\\n    bool isFrontCamera,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    double x = p.x;\\\\\\\\n    double y = p.y;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Step 1 – rotate to match screen orientation.\\\\\\\\n    // After this step, (rotW, rotH) are the effective image dimensions.\\\\\\\\n    double rotW, rotH;\\\\\\\\n    switch (rotation) {\\\\\\\\n      case InputImageRotation.rotation90deg:\\\\\\\\n        // (x, y) in rotated image → (imageH - y, x)\\\\\\\\n        final tmp = x;\\\\\\\\n        x = imageSize.height - y;\\\\\\\\n        y = tmp;\\\\\\\\n        rotW = imageSize.height;\\\\\\\\n        rotH = imageSize.width;\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case InputImageRotation.rotation270deg:\\\\\\\\n        // (x, y) in rotated image → (y, imageW - x)\\\\\\\\n        final tmp = y;\\\\\\\\n        y = imageSize.width - x;\\\\\\\\n        x = tmp;\\\\\\\\n        rotW = imageSize.height;\\\\\\\\n        rotH = imageSize.width;\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case InputImageRotation.rotation180deg:\\\\\\\\n        x = imageSize.width - x;\\\\\\\\n        y = imageSize.height - y;\\\\\\\\n        rotW = imageSize.width;\\\\\\\\n        rotH = imageSize.height;\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      default:\\\\\\\\n        rotW = imageSize.width;\\\\\\\\n        rotH = imageSize.height;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Step 2 – scale to widget size.\\\\\\\\n    x = x * widgetSize.width / rotW;\\\\\\\\n    y = y * widgetSize.height / rotH;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Step 3 – mirror horizontally for front cameras (selfie view).\\\\\\\\n    if (isFrontCamera) {\\\\\\\\n      x = widgetSize.width - x;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return Offset(x, y);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  InputImageRotation _resolveRotation(int sensorOrientation) {\\\\\\\\n    switch (sensorOrientation) {\\\\\\\\n      case 90:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation90deg;\\\\\\\\n      case 180:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation180deg;\\\\\\\\n      case 270:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation270deg;\\\\\\\\n      default:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation0deg;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FacePoint _toFacePoint(Offset o) =\u003e FacePoint(x: o.dx, y: o.dy);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _setState(TrackingState state) {\\\\\\\\n    _state = state;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    stopTracking();\\\\\\\\n    super.dispose();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":300}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/services/face_tracking_controller.dart\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import
