null\\\\\\\\n          ? _toFacePoint(transform(raw.noseBase!))\\\\\\\\n          : null,\\\\\\\\n      leftEye: raw.leftEye != null\\\\\\\\n          ? _toFacePoint(transform(raw.leftEye!))\\\\\\\\n          : null,\\\\\\\\n      rightEye: raw.rightEye != null\\\\\\\\n          ? _toFacePoint(transform(raw.rightEye!))\\\\\\\\n          : null,\\\\\\\\n      boundingBox: transformRect(raw.boundingBox),\\\\\\\\n      headAngleY: raw.headAngleY,\\\\\\\\n      headAngleZ: raw.headAngleZ,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Convert a single [FacePoint] from image coordinates to widget coordinates.\\\\\\\\n  Offset _imageToWidget(\\\\\\\\n    FacePoint p,\\\\\\\\n    Size imageSize,\\\\\\\\n    Size widgetSize,\\\\\\\\n    InputImageRotation rotation,\\\\\\\\n    bool isFrontCamera,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    double x = p.x;\\\\\\\\n    double y = p.y;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Step 1 – rotate to match screen orientation.\\\\\\\\n    // After this step, (rotW, rotH) are the effective image dimensions.\\\\\\\\n    double rotW, rotH;\\\\\\\\n    switch (rotation) {\\\\\\\\n      case InputImageRotation.rotation90deg:\\\\\\\\n        // (x, y) in rotated image → (imageH - y, x)\\\\\\\\n        final tmp = x;\\\\\\\\n        x = imageSize.height - y;\\\\\\\\n        y = tmp;\\\\\\\\n        rotW = imageSize.height;\\\\\\\\n        rotH = imageSize.width;\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case InputImageRotation.rotation270deg:\\\\\\\\n        // (x, y) in rotated image → (y, imageW - x)\\\\\\\\n        final tmp = y;\\\\\\\\n        y = imageSize.width - x;\\\\\\\\n        x = tmp;\\\\\\\\n        rotW = imageSize.height;\\\\\\\\n        rotH = imageSize.width;\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case InputImageRotation.rotation180deg:\\\\\\\\n        x = imageSize.width - x;\\\\\\\\n        y = imageSize.height - y;\\\\\\\\n        rotW = imageSize.width;\\\\\\\\n        rotH = imageSize.height;\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      default:\\\\\\\\n        rotW = imageSize.width;\\\\\\\\n        rotH = imageSize.height;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Step 2 – scale to widget size.\\\\\\\\n    x = x * widgetSize.width / rotW;\\\\\\\\n    y = y * widgetSize.height / rotH;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Step 3 – mirror horizontally for front cameras (selfie view).\\\\\\\\n    if (isFrontCamera) {\\\\\\\\n      x = widgetSize.width - x;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return Offset(x, y);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  InputImageRotation _resolveRotation(int sensorOrientation) {\\\\\\\\n    switch (sensorOrientation) {\\\\\\\\n      case 90:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation90deg;\\\\\\\\n      case 180:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation180deg;\\\\\\\\n      case 270:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation270deg;\\\\\\\\n      default:\\\\\\\\n        return InputImageRotation.rotation0deg;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FacePoint _toFacePoint(Offset o) =\u003e FacePoint(x: o.dx, y: o.dy);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _setState(TrackingState state) {\\\\\\\\n    _state = state;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @override\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    stopTracking();\\\\\\\\n    super.dispose();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":300,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":10107,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/services/face_tracking_controller.dart\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":300}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"61420c77-1de0-42fd-9687-d5c475e7aa39\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"823a403b-d328-44fd-9028-6abc4187a099\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-31T02:04:02.133Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_e6160cd2-fdee-4f28-ad72-cfa2720ad3a\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_e6160cd2-fdee-4f28-ad72-cfa2720ad3a\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import 'dart:math' as math;\\\\\\\\nimport 'dart:ui' as ui;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_point.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/makeup_profile.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Draws AR makeup overlays onto a [Canvas].\\\\\\\\n///\\\\\\\\n/// When real [FaceLandmarks] are available, drawing is based on detected\\\\\\\\n/// face geometry.  If landmarks are absent (no face detected) the renderer\\\\\\\\n/// falls back to simple fixed-position shapes centred in the canvas so the UI\\\\\\\\n/// always shows something meaningful.\\\\\\\\nclass OverlayRenderer {\\\\\\\\n  // ── Public entry point ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Draw the overlay for [step] onto [canvas] / [size].\\\\\\\\n  ///\\\\\\\\n  /// [landmarks] may be null; the renderer gracefully falls back to fixed shapes.\\\\\\\\n  void drawOverlay(\\\\\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\\\\\n    Size size,\\\\\\\\n    TutorialStep step,\\\\\\\\n    FaceLandmarks? landmarks,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    final style = step.overlayStyle;\\\\\\\\n    if (style == null) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    switch (step.targetRegion) {\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.lips:\\\\\\\\n        _drawLip(canvas, size, style, landmarks);\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.leftCheek:\\\\\\\\n        _drawCheek(canvas, size, style, landmarks, isLeft: true);\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.rightCheek:\\\\\\\\n        _drawCheek(canvas, size, style, landmarks, isLeft: false);\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      default:\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Lip overlay ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _drawLip(\\\\\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\\\\\n    Size size,\\\\\\\\n    OverlayStyle style,\\\\\\\\n    FaceLandmarks? landmarks,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    final paint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = style.color.withValues(alpha: style.opacity)\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks != null \u0026\u0026 landmarks.hasLipData) {\\\\\\\\n      // Build an outer lip polygon from the four contour groups:\\\\\\\\n      //   upper-outer (left→right) + lower-outer (right→left) → closed path\\\\\\\\n      final path = _buildLipPath(\\\\\\\\n        landmarks.upperLipTop,\\\\\\\\n        landmarks.lowerLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      if (path != null) {\\\\\\\\n        canvas.drawPath(path, paint);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // Optional border / highlight for current step\\\\\\\\n        if (style.showBorder) {\\\\\\\\n          final borderPaint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n            ..color = (style.borderColor ?? style.color)\\\\\\\\n                .withValues(alpha: (style.opacity + 0.3).clamp(0.0, 1.0))\\\\\\\\n            ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke\\\\\\\\n            ..strokeWidth = style.borderWidth ?? 1.5;\\\\\\\\n          canvas.drawPath(path, borderPaint);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        return;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Fallback: fixed oval centred below mid-face\\\\\\\\n    _drawFallbackLip(canvas, size, paint);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Path? _buildLipPath(\\\\\\\\n    List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperOuter,\\\\\\\\n    List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerOuter,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    if (upperOuter.length \u003c 3 || lowerOuter.length \u003c 3) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final path = Path();\\\\\\\\n    // Upper outer: walk left → right\\\\\\\\n    path.moveTo(upperOuter.first.x, upperOuter.first.y);\\\\\\\\n    for (final p in upperOuter.skip(1)) {\\\\\\\\n      path.lineTo(p.x, p.y);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Lower outer: walk right → left (reverse) to close the polygon\\\\\\\\n    for (final p in lowerOuter.reversed) {\\\\\\\\n      path.lineTo(p.x, p.y);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    path.close();\\\\\\\\n    return path;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _drawFallbackLip(Canvas canvas, Size size, Paint paint) {\\\\\\\\n    canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n      Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n        center: Offset(size.width / 2, size.height / 2 + size.height * 0.07),\\\\\\\\n        width: size.width * 0.22,\\\\\\\\n        height: size.height * 0.05,\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      paint,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Cheek overlay ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _drawCheek(\\\\\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\\\\\n    Size size,\\\\\\\\n    OverlayStyle style,\\\\\\\\n    FaceLandmarks? landmarks, {\\\\\\\\n    required bool isLeft,\\\\\\\\n  }) {\\\\\\\\n    // Blush: soft Gaussian blur + slightly transparent fill\\\\\\\\n    final paint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = style.color.withValues(alpha: style.opacity)\\\\\\\\n      ..maskFilter = const ui.MaskFilter.blur(ui.BlurStyle.normal, 18)\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks != null \u0026\u0026 landmarks.hasCheekData) {\\\\\\\\n      final center = _cheekCenter(landmarks, size, isLeft: isLeft);\\\\\\\\n      if (center != null) {\\\\\\\\n        final faceW = landmarks.boundingBox.width;\\\\\\\\n        canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n          Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n            center: center,\\\\\\\\n            width: faceW * 0.35,\\\\\\\\n            height: faceW * 0.25,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          paint,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        return;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Fallback: fixed oval\\\\\\\\n    _drawFallbackCheek(canvas, size, paint, isLeft: isLeft);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Estimate the cheek blush centre from available landmarks.\\\\\\\\n  ///\\\\\\\\n  /// Strategy:\\\\\\\\n  ///   • Prefer: midpoint of outer-eye and noseBase (rough apple-of-cheek).\\\\\\\\n  ///   • Fallback within landmarks: use bounding box quarters.\\\\\\\\n  Offset? _cheekCenter(\\\\\\\\n    FaceLandmarks landmarks,\\\\\\\\n    Size size, {\\\\\\\\n    required bool isLeft,\\\\\\\\n  }) {\\\\\\\\n    final eye = isLeft ? landmarks.leftEye : landmarks.rightEye;\\\\\\\\n    final nose = landmarks.noseBase;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (eye != null \u0026\u0026 nose != null) {\\\\\\\\n      // Apple of cheek ≈ midpoint between eye and noseBase, shifted slightly\\\\\\\\n      // outward and downward.\\\\\\\\n      final mid = Offset(\\\\\\\\n        (eye.x + nose.x) / 2,\\\\\\\\n        (eye.y + nose.y) / 2,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      final outward = isLeft ? -landmarks.boundingBox.width * 0.06 : landmarks.boundingBox.width * 0.06;\\\\\\\\n      return mid.translate(outward, landmarks.boundingBox.height * 0.04);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // If only boundingBox is available, split into quadrants\\\\\\\\n    final bbox = landmarks.boundingBox;\\\\\\\\n    if (!bbox.isEmpty) {\\\\\\\\n      final x = isLeft\\\\\\\\n          ? bbox.left + bbox.width * 0.25\\\\\\\\n          : bbox.right - bbox.width * 0.25;\\\\\\\\n      final y = bbox.top + bbox.height * 0.55;\\\\\\\\n      return Offset(x, y);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _drawFallbackCheek(\\\\\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\\\\\n    Size size,\\\\\\\\n    Paint paint, {\\\\\\\\n    required bool isLeft,\\\\\\\\n  }) {\\\\\\\\n    final xOffset = isLeft ? -size.width * 0.22 : size.width * 0.22;\\\\\\\\n    canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n      Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n        center: Offset(\\\\\\\\n          size.width / 2 + xOffset,\\\\\\\\n          size.height / 2 + size.height * 0.03,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n        width: size.width * 0.18,\\\\\\\\n        height: size.height * 0.13,\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      paint,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Debug helper (call in debug builds to visualise raw landmarks) ─────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Draws all landmark points as small coloured dots.  Useful during initial\\\\\\\\n  /// integration to verify coordinate transform correctness.\\\\\\\\n  void debugDrawLandmarks(Canvas canvas, FaceLandmarks landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n    final contourPaint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = Colors.green.withValues(alpha: 0.7)\\\\\\\\n      ..strokeWidth = 2\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final lipPaint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = Colors.red.withValues(alpha: 0.9)\\\\\\\\n      ..strokeWidth = 3\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (final p in landmarks.faceContour) {\\\\\\\\n      canvas.drawCircle(Offset(p.x, p.y), 2, contourPaint);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    for (final p in [\\\\\\\\n      ...landmarks.upperLipTop,\\\\\\\\n      ...landmarks.lowerLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n    ]) {\\\\\\\\n      canvas.drawCircle(Offset(p.x, p.y), 3, lipPaint);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks.noseBase != null) {\\\\\\\\n      canvas.drawCircle(\\\\\\\\n        Offset(landmarks.noseBase!.x, landmarks.noseBase!.y),\\\\\\\\n        5,\\\\\\\\n        Paint()..color = Colors.blue,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks.leftEye != null) {\\\\\\\\n      canvas.drawCircle(\\\\\\\\n        Offset(landmarks.leftEye!.x, landmarks.leftEye!.y),\\\\\\\\n        5,\\\\\\\\n        Paint()..color = Colors.yellow,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks.rightEye != null) {\\\\\\\\n      canvas.drawCircle(\\\\\\\\n        Offset(landmarks.rightEye!.x, landmarks.rightEye!.y),\\\\\\\\n        5,\\\\\\\\n        Paint()..color = Colors.yellow,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Kept to satisfy any existing callers that still use the old API.\\\\\\\\n  // Delegates to [drawOverlay] without landmarks.\\\\\\\\n  @Deprecated('Use drawOverlay instead')\\\\\\\\n  List\u003cOffset\u003e? calculateLipPolygon(List\u003cFacePoint\u003e landmarks) =\u003e null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  @Deprecated('Use drawOverlay instead')\\\\\\\\n  Offset? calculateCheekCenter(List\u003cFacePoint\u003e landmarks, bool isLeft) =\u003e null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Suppress \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unused import\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for dart:math\\\\\\\\n  // ignore: unused_element\\\\\\\\n  double _noop() =\u003e math.pi;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":267}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import 'dart:math' as math;\\\\\\\\nimport 'dart:ui' as ui;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_point.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/makeup_profile.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/// Draws AR makeup overlays onto a [Canvas].\\\\\\\\n///\\\\\\\\n/// When real [FaceLandmarks] are available, drawing is based on detected\\\\\\\\n/// face geometry.  If landmarks are absent (no face detected) the renderer\\\\\\\\n/// falls back to simple fixed-position shapes centred in the canvas so the UI\\\\\\\\n/// always shows something meaningful.\\\\\\\\nclass OverlayRenderer {\\\\\\\\n  // ── Public entry point ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Draw the overlay for [step] onto [canvas] / [size].\\\\\\\\n  ///\\\\\\\\n  /// [landmarks] may be null; the renderer gracefully falls back to fixed shapes.\\\\\\\\n  void drawOverlay(\\\\\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\\\\\n    Size size,\\\\\\\\n    TutorialStep step,\\\\\\\\n    FaceLandmarks? landmarks,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    final style = step.overlayStyle;\\\\\\\\n    if (style == null) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    switch (step.targetRegion) {\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.lips:\\\\\\\\n        _drawLip(canvas, size, style, landmarks);\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.leftCheek:\\\\\\\\n        _drawCheek(canvas, size, style, landmarks, isLeft: true);\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      case TargetRegion.rightCheek:\\\\\\\\n        _drawCheek(canvas, size, style, landmarks, isLeft: false);\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n      default:\\\\\\\\n        break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Lip overlay ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _drawLip(\\\\\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\\\\\n    Size size,\\\\\\\\n    OverlayStyle style,\\\\\\\\n    FaceLandmarks? landmarks,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    final paint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = style.color.withValues(alpha: style.opacity)\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks != null \u0026\u0026 landmarks.hasLipData) {\\\\\\\\n      // Build an outer lip polygon from the four contour groups:\\\\\\\\n      //   upper-outer (left→right) + lower-outer (right→left) → closed path\\\\\\\\n      final path = _buildLipPath(\\\\\\\\n        landmarks.upperLipTop,\\\\\\\\n        landmarks.lowerLipBottom,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      if (path != null) {\\\\\\\\n        canvas.drawPath(path, paint);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // Optional border / highlight for current step\\\\\\\\n        if (style.showBorder) {\\\\\\\\n          final borderPaint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n            ..color = (style.borderColor ?? style.color)\\\\\\\\n                .withValues(alpha: (style.opacity + 0.3).clamp(0.0, 1.0))\\\\\\\\n            ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke\\\\\\\\n            ..strokeWidth = style.borderWidth ?? 1.5;\\\\\\\\n          canvas.drawPath(path, borderPaint);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        return;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Fallback: fixed oval centred below mid-face\\\\\\\\n    _drawFallbackLip(canvas, size, paint);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Path? _buildLipPath(\\\\\\\\n    List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperOuter,\\\\\\\\n    List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerOuter,\\\\\\\\n  ) {\\\\\\\\n    if (upperOuter.length \u003c 3 || lowerOuter.length \u003c 3) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final path = Path();\\\\\\\\n    // Upper outer: walk left → right\\\\\\\\n    path.moveTo(upperOuter.first.x, upperOuter.first.y);\\\\\\\\n    for (final p in upperOuter.skip(1)) {\\\\\\\\n      path.lineTo(p.x, p.y);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Lower outer: walk right → left (reverse) to close the polygon\\\\\\\\n    for (final p in lowerOuter.reversed) {\\\\\\\\n      path.lineTo(p.x, p.y);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    path.close();\\\\\\\\n    return path;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _drawFallbackLip(Canvas canvas, Size size, Paint paint) {\\\\\\\\n    canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n      Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n        center: Offset(size.width / 2, size.height / 2 + size.height * 0.07),\\\\\\\\n        width: size.width * 0.22,\\\\\\\\n        height: size.height * 0.05,\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      paint,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Cheek overlay ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _drawCheek(\\\\\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\\\\\n    Size size,\\\\\\\\n    OverlayStyle style,\\\\\\\\n    FaceLandmarks? landmarks, {\\\\\\\\n    required bool isLeft,\\\\\\\\n  }) {\\\\\\\\n    // Blush: soft Gaussian blur + slightly transparent fill\\\\\\\\n    final paint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = style.color.withValues(alpha: style.opacity)\\\\\\\\n      ..maskFilter = const ui.MaskFilter.blur(ui.BlurStyle.normal, 18)\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks != null \u0026\u0026 landmarks.hasCheekData) {\\\\\\\\n      final center = _cheekCenter(landmarks, size, isLeft: isLeft);\\\\\\\\n      if (center != null) {\\\\\\\\n        final faceW = landmarks.boundingBox.width;\\\\\\\\n        canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n          Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n            center: center,\\\\\\\\n            width: faceW * 0.35,\\\\\\\\n            height: faceW * 0.25,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          paint,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        return;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Fallback: fixed oval\\\\\\\\n    _drawFallbackCheek(canvas, size, paint, isLeft: isLeft);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Estimate the cheek blush centre from available landmarks.\\\\\\\\n  ///\\\\\\\\n  /// Strategy:\\\\\\\\n  ///   • Prefer: midpoint of outer-eye and noseBase (rough apple-of-cheek).\\\\\\\\n  ///   • Fallback within landmarks: use bounding box quarters.\\\\\\\\n  Offset? _cheekCenter(\\\\\\\\n    FaceLandmarks landmarks,\\\\\\\\n    Size size, {\\\\\\\\n    required bool isLeft,\\\\\\\\n  }) {\\\\\\\\n    final eye = isLeft ? landmarks.leftEye : landmarks.rightEye;\\\\\\\\n    final nose = landmarks.noseBase;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (eye != null \u0026\u0026 nose != null) {\\\\\\\\n      // Apple of cheek ≈ midpoint between eye and noseBase, shifted slightly\\\\\\\\n      // outward and downward.\\\\\\\\n      final mid = Offset(\\\\\\\\n        (eye.x + nose.x) / 2,\\\\\\\\n        (eye.y + nose.y) / 2,\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      final outward = isLeft ? -landmarks.boundingBox.width * 0.06 : landmarks.boundingBox.width * 0.06;\\\\\\\\n      return mid.translate(outward, landmarks.boundingBox.height * 0.04);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // If only boundingBox is available, split into quadrants\\\\\\\\n    final bbox = landmarks.boundingBox;\\\\\\\\n    if (!bbox.isEmpty) {\\\\\\\\n      final x = isLeft\\\\\\\\n          ? bbox.left + bbox.width * 0.25\\\\\\\\n          : bbox.right - bbox.width * 0.25;\\\\\\\\n      final y = bbox.top + bbox.height * 0.55;\\\\\\\\n      return Offset(x, y);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void _drawFallbackCheek(\\\\\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\\\\\n    Size size,\\\\\\\\n    Paint paint, {\\\\\\\\n    required bool isLeft,\\\\\\\\n  }) {\\\\\\\\n    final xOffset = isLeft ? -size.width * 0.22 : size.width * 0.22;\\\\\\\\n    canvas.drawOval(\\\\\\\\n      Rect.fromCenter(\\\\\\\\n        center: Offset(\\\\\\\\n          size.width / 2 + xOffset,\\\\\\\\n          size.height / 2 + size.height * 0.03,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n        width: size.width * 0.18,\\\\\\\\n        height: size.height * 0.13,\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      paint,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ── Debug helper (call in debug builds to visualise raw landmarks) ─────────\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /// Draws all landmark points as small coloured dots.  Useful during initial\\\\\\\\n  /// integration to verify coordinate transform correctness.\\\\\\\\n  void debugDrawLandmarks(Canvas canvas, FaceLandmarks landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n    final contourPaint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = Colors.green.withValues(alpha: 0.7)\\\\\\\\n      ..strokeWidth = 2\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final lipPaint = Paint()\\\\\\\\n      ..color = Colors.red.withValues(alpha: 0.9)\\\\\\\\n      ..strokeWidth = 3\\\\\\\\n      ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (final p in landmarks.faceContour) {\\\\\\\\n [com.google.mlkit.vision.face  |  ML Kit  |  Google for Developers](https://developers.google.com/android/reference/com/google/mlkit/vision/face/package-summary)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# FaceContourType and FaceLandmarkType in google_mlkit_face_detection\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**FaceContourType** is a Dart enum that represents available face contour types detected by the FaceDetector.[1] It includes the following values:[1]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- face\\\\\\\\n- leftEyebrowTop, leftEyebrowBottom\\\\\\\\n- rightEyebrowTop, rightEyebrowBottom\\\\\\\\n- leftEye, rightEye\\\\\\\\n- upperLipTop, upperLipBottom\\\\\\\\n- lowerLipTop, lowerLipBottom\\\\\\\\n- noseBridge, noseBottom\\\\\\\\n- leftCheek, rightCheek\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**FaceLandmarkType** is referenced as a Dart enum type used in the FaceLandmark class.[2] The FaceLandmark class represents a landmark on a human face detected in an image—a point on a detected face such as an eye, nose, or mouth.[2] FaceLandmark objects contain a FaceLandmarkType property indicating the type of landmark and a position property with 2D point coordinates.[2]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nBoth enums are part of the google_mlkit_face_detection library for Flutter, which provides access to Google's ML Kit Face Detection API for identifying key facial features and contours in images.[3]\\\\\\\"}],\\\\\\\"isFinal\\\\\\\":true,\\\\\\\"rejected\\\\\\\":false}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"webSearchToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"searchTerm\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"google_mlkit_face_detection FaceContourType FaceLandmarkType dart enum\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"toolCallId\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"tool_1fa47987-8dec-4514-bbe9-154e0bb1222\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"references\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"Web search results for query: google_mlkit_face_detection FaceContourType FaceLandmarkType dart enum\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"chunk\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"Links:\\\\\\\\n1. FaceLandmarkType in google_mlkit_face_detection\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**FaceContourType** is a Dart enum that represents available face contour types detected by the FaceDetector.[1] It includes the following values:[1]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- face\\\\\\\\n- leftEyebrowTop, leftEyebrowBottom\\\\\\\\n- rightEyebrowTop, rightEyebrowBottom\\\\\\\\n- leftEye, rightEye\\\\\\\\n- upperLipTop, upperLipBottom\\\\\\\\n- lowerLipTop, lowerLipBottom\\\\\\\\n- noseBridge, noseBottom\\\\\\\\n- leftCheek, rightCheek\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**FaceLandmarkType** is referenced as a Dart enum type used in the FaceLandmark class.[2] The FaceLandmark class represents a landmark on a human face detected in an image—a point on a detected face such as an eye, nose, or mouth.[2] FaceLandmark objects contain a FaceLandmarkType property indicating the type of landmark and a position property with 2D point coordinates.[2]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nBoth enums are part of the google_mlkit_face_detection library for Flutter, which provides access to Google's ML Kit Face Detection API for identifying key facial features and contours in is\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\n以下为基于仓库内文件的梳理报告（路径以仓库根 &#96;meet-beauty&#96; 为准，等价于 &#96;/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/...&#96;）。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 1. &#96;lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**职责概览**：封装 ML Kit &#96;FaceDetector&#96;；&#96;CameraImage&#96; → &#96;InputImage&#96;；检测人脸并抽出轮廓/关键点；&#96;analyzeFeatures&#96; 做极简脸型推断。\\\\n\\\\n**关键签名**\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;FaceMeshService()&#96; — 构造时创建 &#96;FaceDetector&#96;（&#96;enableContours&#96; / &#96;enableLandmarks&#96; / &#96;enableClassification&#96; / &#96;enableTracking&#96; 均为 &#96;true&#96;，&#96;FaceDetectorMode.accurate&#96;）。\\\\n- &#96;InputImage? convertCameraImage(CameraImage image, CameraDescription camera)&#96;\\\\n- &#96;Future\u003cFaceLandmarks?\u003e detectFace(InputImage image)&#96;\\\\n- &#96;FaceFeatureResult? analyzeFeatures(FaceLandmarks landmarks)&#96;\\\\n- &#96;void dispose()&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**关键片段**\\\\n\\\\n检测器与转换（Android NV21 / iOS BGRA）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;15:67:lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart\\\\n  FaceMeshService()\\\\n      : _detector = FaceDetector(\\\\n          options: FaceDetectorOptions(\\\\n            enableContours: true,\\\\n            enableLandmarks: true,\\\\n            enableClassification: true,\\\\n            enableTracking: true,\\\\n            performanceMode: FaceDetectorMode.accurate,\\\\n          ),\\\\n        );\\\\n  // ...\\\\n  InputImage? convertCameraImage(\\\\n    CameraImage image,\\\\n    CameraDescription camera,\\\\n  ) {\\\\n    try {\\\\n      final rotation = _sensorToInputRotation(camera.sensorOrientation);\\\\n\\\\n      if (Platform.isAndroid) {\\\\n        final plane = image.planes[0];\\\\n        return InputImage.fromBytes(\\\\n          bytes: plane.bytes,\\\\n          metadata: InputImageMetadata(\\\\n            size: Size(image.width.toDouble(), image.height.toDouble()),\\\\n            rotation: rotation,\\\\n            format: InputImageFormat.nv21,\\\\n            bytesPerRow: plane.bytesPerRow,\\\\n          ),\\\\n        );\\\\n      } else if (Platform.isIOS) {\\\\n        final plane = image.planes[0];\\\\n        return InputImage.fromBytes(\\\\n          bytes: plane.bytes,\\\\n          metadata: InputImageMetadata(\\\\n            size: Size(image.width.toDouble(), image.height.toDouble()),\\\\n            rotation: rotation,\\\\n            format: InputImageFormat.bgra8888,\\\\n            bytesPerRow: plane.bytesPerRow,\\\\n          ),\\\\n        );\\\\n      }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n抽取轮廓/关键点（当前用到的类型见下文 ML Kit 对比）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;113:159:lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart\\\\n  FaceLandmarks _extractLandmarks(Face face) {\\\\n    final faceContour = _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.face);\\\\n    final upperLipTop =\\\\n        _extractContour(face, FaceContourType.upperLipTop);\\\\n    // ... upperLipBottom, lowerLipTop, lowerLipBottom\\\\n    final noseBase = _extractLandmark(face, FaceLandmarkType.noseBase);\\\\n    final leftEye = _extractLandmark(face, FaceLandmarkType.leftEye);\\\\n    final rightEye = _extractLandmark(face, FaceLandmarkType.rightEye);\\\\n    return FaceLandmarks(\\\\n      // ...\\\\n    );\\\\n  }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. &#96;lib/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**行号范围**：全文件约 1–86。\\\\n\\\\n**内容**：枚举 &#96;FaceShape&#96; / &#96;SkinTone&#96; / &#96;LipType&#96; / &#96;ConfidenceLevel&#96;；模型 &#96;FaceFeatureResult&#96; 含 &#96;faceShape&#96;、&#96;skinTone&#96;、&#96;lipType&#96;、&#96;confidenceLevel&#96;、&#96;ratios&#96;；&#96;fromMap&#96; / &#96;toMap&#96; / &#96;toString&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n**关键签名**\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;35:48:lib/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart\\\\nclass FaceFeatureResult {\\\\n  final FaceShape faceShape;\\\\n  final SkinTone skinTone;\\\\n  final LipType lipType;\\\\n  final ConfidenceLevel confidenceLevel;\\\\n  final Map\u003cString, double\u003e ratios;\\\\n\\\\n  const FaceFeatureResult({\\\\n    this.faceShape = FaceShape.unknown,\\\\n    this.skinTone = SkinTone.unknown,\\\\n    this.lipType = LipType.unknown,\\\\n    this.confidenceLevel = ConfidenceLevel.low,\\\\n    this.ratios = const {},\\\\n  });\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. &#96;lib/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**行号范围**：全文件约 1–112。\\\\n\\\\n**关键 API**\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;const FaceLandmarks({ ... })&#96; — 多组唇轮廓、&#96;noseBase&#96;、&#96;leftEye&#96;/&#96;rightEye&#96;、&#96;boundingBox&#96;、&#96;headAngleY&#96;/&#96;headAngleZ&#96;。\\\\n- &#96;bool get hasLipData&#96; / &#96;bool get hasCheekData&#96; / this.lowerLipBottom,\\\\n    this.noseBase,\\\\n    this.leftEye,\\\\n    this.rightEye,\\\\n    required this.boundingBox,\\\\n    this.headAngleY,\\\\n    this.headAngleZ,\\\\n  });\\\\n\\\\n  bool get hasLipData =\u003e\\\\n      upperLipTop.length \u003e= 3 \u0026\u0026 lowerLipBottom.length \u003e= 3;\\\\n\\\\n  bool get hasCheekData =\u003e\\\\n      (noseBase != null || leftEye != null || rightEye != null) \u0026\u0026\\\\n      faceContour.length \u003e= 6;\\\\n\\\\n  bool get isSideFacing =\u003e\\\\n      headAngleY != null \u0026\u0026 headAngleY!.abs() \u003e 25.0;\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. &#96;lib/shared/models/face_point.dart&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**行号范围**：全文件约 1–32。\\\\n\\\\n**关键签名**：&#96;FacePoint({required double x, required double y, recommendationReasons;\\\\n  final String? thumbnail;\\\\n\\\\n  const MakeupProfile({\\\\n    required this.id,\\\\n    required this.name,\\\\n    this.description = '',\\\\n    required this.category,\\\\n    this.lipColor,\\\\n    this.blushColor,\\\\n    this.tutorialSteps = const [],\\\\n    this.recommendationReasons = const [],\\\\n    this.thumbnail,\\\\n  });\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. &#96;lib/features/recommendation/application/recommendation_controller.dart&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**关键签名**\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;void generateRecommendations(FaceFeatureResult features)&#96;\\\\n- &#96;void selectProfile(MakeupProfile profile)&#96;\\\\n- &#96;List\u003cMakeupProfile\u003e _getDefaultRecommendations(FaceFeatureResult features)&#96;（私有）\\\\n- &#96;void reset()&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;_getDefaultRecommendations&#96; 规则（MVP）**\\\\n\\\\n1. 若 &#96;features.faceShape == FaceShape.round&#96;：追加一条 &#96;MakeupProfile&#96;（&#96;id: 'contour_round'&#96;，分类 &#96;Contouring&#96;，含一步 contour 教程，&#96;targetRegion: TargetRegion.forehead&#96;）。\\\\n2. **无论脸型如何**，再追加固定的「Natural Daily Look」（&#96;id: 'natural_daily'&#96;），含唇色/腮红 &#96;Color&#96; 与三步教程（唇、左颊、右颊）。\\\\n3. 返回该列表；&#96;generateRecommendations&#96; 里默认选中**第一个**推荐项。\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;35:114:lib/features/recommendation/application/recommendation_controller.dart\\\\n  List\u003cMakeupProfile\u003e _getDefaultRecommendations(FaceFeatureResult features) {\\\\n    final recommendations = \u003cMakeupProfile\u003e[];\\\\n\\\\n    if (features.faceShape == FaceShape.round) {\\\\n      recommendations.add(const MakeupProfile(\\\\n        id: 'contour_round',\\\\n        name: 'Sculpt \u0026 Define',\\\\n        category: 'Contouring',\\\\n        // ...\\\\n      ));\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    recommendations.add(const MakeupProfile(\\\\n      id: 'natural_daily',\\\\n      name: 'Natural Daily Look',\\\\n      category: 'Daily',\\\\n      // lipColor, blushColor, tutorialSteps ...\\\\n    ));\\\\n\\\\n    return recommendations;\\\\n  }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 7. &#96;lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**关键签名**\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;Future\u003cvoid\u003e startAnalysis()&#96;\\\\n- &#96;void _startFaceDetection()&#96;（内部开 &#96;startImageStream&#96;）\\\\n- &#96;Future\u003cvoid\u003e completeAnalysis()&#96;\\\\n- &#96;void reset()&#96; / &#96;void dispose()&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**流程要点**：&#96;startAnalysis&#96; 初始化相机后 &#96;_startFaceDetection&#96; 每帧（在未 &#96;_isAnalyzing&#96; 时）&#96;convertCameraImage&#96; → &#96;detectFace&#96;，更新 &#96;_currentLandmarks&#96;；&#96;completeAnalysis&#96; 用 &#96;_currentLandmarks&#96; 调用 &#96;analyzeFeatures&#96;，成功后停流。\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;51:88:lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart\\\\n  void _startFaceDetection() {\\\\n    final camera = _cameraService.cameras.firstWhere(\\\\n      (c) =\u003e c.lensDirection == CameraLensDirection.front,\\\\n      orElse: () =\u003e _cameraService.cameras.first,\\\\n    );\\\\n\\\\n    _cameraService.startImageStream((image) async {\\\\n      if (_isAnalyzing) return;\\\\n\\\\n      final inputImage = _faceMeshService.convertCameraImage(image, camera);\\\\n      if (inputImage == null) return;\\\\n\\\\n      final landmarks = await _faceMeshService.detectFace(inputImage);\\\\n      if (landmarks != null) {\\\\n        _currentLandmarks = landmarks;\\\\n        notifyListeners();\\\\n      }\\\\n    });\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e completeAnalysis() async {\\\\n    if (_currentLandmarks == null) return;\\\\n    // analyzeFeatures -\u003e stopImageStream\\\\n  }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 8. &#96;lib/features/analysis/presentation/analysis_page.dart&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**关键类型**：&#96;AnalysisPage&#96;（&#96;StatefulWidget&#96;），&#96;initState&#96; 里 &#96;startAnalysis()&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n**UI 逻辑**：相机预览 / 权限与错误态；检测到脸后提示点「Capture \u0026 Analyze」；完成后跳转 &#96;/recommendation&#96; 并 &#96;extra: controller.featureResult&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;145:158:lib/features/analysis/presentation/analysis_page.dart\\\\n                        child: ElevatedButton(\\\\n                          onPressed: controller.isAnalysisComplete\\\\n                              ? () =\u003e context.go('/recommendation', extra: controller.featureResult)\\\\n                              : (controller.currentLandmarks != null \u0026\u0026 !controller.isAnalyzing)\\\\n                                  ? () =\u003e controller.completeAnalysis()\\\\n                                  : null,\\\\n                          child: Text(\\\\n                            controller.isAnalysisComplete\\\\n                                ? 'Get Recommendations'\\\\n                                : controller.isAnalyzing\\\\n                                    ? 'Analyzing...'\\\\n                                    : 'Capture \u0026 Analyze',\\\\n                          ),\\\\n                        ),\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 9. &#96;lib/services/face_tracking_controller.dart&#96; — &#96;_processFrame&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**行号**：约 130–163。\\\\n\\\\n**逻辑**：取前置（或第一台）相机 → &#96;convertCameraImage&#96; → &#96;detectFace&#96;；若未检测到且之前有脸则清空并 &#96;notifyListeners&#96;；若检测到则按预览尺寸做 &#96;_transformLandmarks&#96;，再 &#96;smoothWith(..., alpha: 0.4)&#96;，写回 &#96;_landmarks&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;130:163:lib/services/face_tracking_controller.dart\\\\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _processFrame(CameraImage image) async {\\\\n    final camera = _cameraService.cameras.isNotEmpty\\\\n        ? _cameraService.cameras.firstWhere(\\\\n            (c) =\u003e c.lensDirection == CameraLensDirection.front,\\\\n            orElse: () =\u003e _cameraService.cameras.first,\\\\n          )\\\\n        : null;\\\\n\\\\n    if (camera == null) return;\\\\n\\\\n    final inputImage =\\\\n        _faceMeshService.convertCameraImage(image, camera);\\\\n    if (inputImage == null) return;\\\\n\\\\n    final detected = await _faceMeshService.detectFace(inputImage);\\\\n\\\\n    if (detected == null) {\\\\n      if (_landmarks != null) {\\\\n        _landmarks = null;\\\\n        notifyListeners();\\\\n      }\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    final imageSize =\\\\n        Size(image.width.toDouble(), image.height.toDouble());\\\\n    final transformed = _transformLandmarks(detected, imageSize, camera);\\\\n    final smoothed = transformed.smoothWith(_landmarks, alpha: 0.4);\\\\n\\\\n    _landmarks = smoothed;\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\n  }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n（帧节流在 &#96;_onCameraFrame&#96;：&#96;AppConfig.analysisIntervalMs&#96;。）\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 10. &#96;lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**关键签名**\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;void drawOverlay(Canvas canvas, Size size, TutorialStep step, FaceLandmarks? landmarks)&#96;\\\\n- &#96;void debugDrawLandmarks(Canvas canvas, FaceLandmarks landmarks)&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**行为**：仅处理 &#96;TargetRegion.lips&#96;、&#96;leftCheek&#96;、&#96;rightCheek&#96;；有 &#96;overlayStyle&#96; 才绘制；唇用 &#96;upperLipTop&#96; + &#96;lowerLipBottom&#96; 闭合成路径；腮红用 &#96;_cheekCenter&#96;（眼+鼻或 bbox 四分位 fallback）。\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;21:43:lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart\\\\n  void drawOverlay(\\\\n    Canvas canvas,\\\\n    Size size,\\\\n    TutorialStep step,\\\\n    FaceLandmarks? landmarks,\\\\n  ) {\\\\n    final style = step.overlayStyle;\\\\n    if (style == null) return;\\\\n\\\\n    switch (step.targetRegion) {\\\\n      case TargetRegion.lips:\\\\n        _drawLip(canvas, size, style, landmarks);\\\\n        break;\\\\n      case TargetRegion.leftCheek:\\\\n        _drawCheek(canvas, size, style, landmarks, isLeft: true);\\\\n        break;\\\\n      case TargetRegion.rightCheek:\\\\n        _drawCheek(canvas, size, style, landmarks, isLeft: false);\\\\n        break;\\\\n      default:\\\\n        break;\\\\n    }\\\\n  }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 11. &#96;pubspec.yaml&#96; — &#96;dependencies&#96;（仅生产依赖）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;10:32:pubspec.yaml\\\\ndependencies:\\\\n  flutter:\\\\n    sdk: flutter\\\\n  cupertino_icons: ^1.0.8\\\\n  provider: ^6.1.2\\\\n  camera: ^0.11.0+2\\\\n  permission_handler: ^11.3.1\\\\n  google_mlkit_face_detection: ^0.12.0\\\\n  image: ^4.5.3\\\\n  go_router: ^15.1.2\\\\n  flutter_svg: ^2.0.17\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 专项：ML Kit 已开启但未在 &#96;_extractLandmarks&#96; 中使用的类型\\\\n\\\\n依据 [FaceContourType](https://pub.dev/documentation/google_mlkit_face_detection/latest/google_mlkit_face_detection/FaceContourType.html) / [FaceLandmarkType](https://pub.dev/documentation/google_mlkit_face_detection/latest/google_mlkit_face_detection/FaceLandmarkType.html) 文档，与当前 &#96;face_mesh_service.dart&#96; 对比：\\\\n\\\\n**FaceContourType — 已用**：&#96;face&#96;、&#96;upperLipTop&#96;、&#96;upperLipBottom&#96;、&#96;lowerLipTop&#96;、&#96;lowerLipBottom&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n**FaceContourType — 支持但当前未抽取**：&#96;leftEyebrowTop&#96;、&#96;leftEyebrowBottom&#96;、&#96;rightEyebrowTop&#96;、&#96;rightEyebrowBottom&#96;、&#96;leftEye&#96;、&#96;rightEye&#96;（轮廓多边形，与 landmark 点不同）、&#96;noseBridge&#96;、&#96;noseBottom&#96;、&#96;leftCheek&#96;、&#96;rightCheek&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n**FaceLandmarkType — 已用**：&#96;noseBase&#96;、&#96;leftEye&#96;、&#96;rightEye&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n**FaceLandmarkType — 支持但当前未用**：&#96;bottomMouth&#96;、&#96;rightMouth&#96;、&#96;leftMouth&#96;、&#96;rightEar&#96;、&#96;leftEar&#96;、&#96;rightCheek&#96;、&#96;leftCheek&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n**补充**：&#96;FaceDetectorOptions&#96; 还开了 &#96;enableClassification&#96; 与 &#96;enableTracking&#96;，本文件未读取 &#96;Face&#96; 的微笑/睁眼概率或跟踪 ID 等字段；若要做更细产品逻辑，这些也属于「已打开但未用」的能力。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 专项：&#96;analyzeFeatures&#96; 逻辑细节\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;163:200:lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? analyzeFeatures(FaceLandmarks landmarks) {\\\\n    final contour = landmarks.faceContour;\\\\n    if (contour.isEmpty) return null;\\\\n\\\\n    double minX = double.infinity, maxX = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\n    double minY = double.infinity, maxY = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\n\\\\n    for (final p in contour) {\\\\n      if (p.x \u003c minX) minX = p.x;\\\\n      if (p.x \u003e maxX) maxX = p.x;\\\\n      if (p.y \u003c minY) minY = p.y;\\\\n      if (p.y \u003e maxY) maxY = p.y;\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    final width = maxX - minX;\\\\n    final height = maxY - minY;\\\\n    if (width == 0) return null;\\\\n\\\\n    final aspectRatio = height / width;\\\\n\\\\n    FaceShape faceShape;\\\\n    if (aspectRatio \u003e 1.4) {\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.long;\\\\n    } else if (aspectRatio \u003c 1.2) {\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.round;\\\\n    } else {\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.oval;\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    return FaceFeatureResult(\\\\n      faceShape: faceShape,\\\\n      skinTone: SkinTone.unknown,\\\\n      lipType: LipType.medium,\\\\n      confidenceLevel: ConfidenceLevel.medium,\\\\n      ratios: {'aspectRatio': aspectRatio},\\\\n    );\\\\n  }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n要点：\\\\n\\\\n- 仅用 **脸椭圆轮廓** 的轴对齐包围盒算 &#96;height/width&#96;；**未**用 &#96;boundingBox&#96;、唇轮廓或 ML Kit 分类。\\\\n- &#96;FaceShape.square&#96; / &#96;heart&#96; / &#96;unknown&#96; 在此路径中**不会出现**（只赋 &#96;long&#96; / &#96;round&#96; / &#96;oval&#96;）。\\\\n- &#96;skinTone&#96; 固定 &#96;unknown&#96;，&#96;lipType&#96; 固定 &#96;medium&#96;，&#96;confidenceLevel&#96; 固定 &#96;medium&#96;；&#96;ratios&#96; 仅 &#96;aspectRatio&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 专项：&#96;CameraImage&#96; 与原始像素（肤色分析）\\\\n\\\\n- **可以拿到原始字节**：&#96;CameraImage&#96; 的 &#96;planes&#96; 列表中每个 &#96;Plane&#96; 有 &#96;bytes&#96;（以及 &#96;bytesPerRow&#96; 等）。本项目中 &#96;convertCameraImage&#96; 正是把 **Android &#96;planes[0].bytes&#96;（NV21）** 和 **iOS &#96;planes[0].bytes&#96;（BGRA8888）** 交给 &#96;InputImage.fromBytes&#96;，说明帧数据在内存里可读。\\\\n- **当前业务未做像素级肤色分析**：分析链路只把同一帧送进 ML Kit，没有在 Dart 侧对 &#96;CameraImage&#96; 做 ROI 采样或转 RGB。\\\\n- **若要做肤色**：需在流回调里（注意与 ML Kit 异步、节流、性能）对 &#96;image.planes&#96; 解码或采样——例如 Android NV21 可用 Y 平面亮度 + UV 还原近似颜色，或借助已依赖的 &#96;image&#96; 包做转换；还要注意与 &#96;sensorOrientation&#96;/镜像一致，ROI 最好用 &#96;Face.boundingBox&#96; 或扩展后的 &#96;FaceLandmarks&#96; 映射到图像坐标。这些属于实现建议，当前仓库未实现。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n如需把某一段改成「按文档逐文件全文粘贴」或对照 &#96;google_mlkit_face_detection&#96; 0.12.0 源码逐项核对枚举，可以说明一下偏好（Ask 模式下我只能解读与引用，不能直接改仓库）。\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1774882992539,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}}],\"name\":\"探索 [face_detection_tflite example | Flutter package](https://pub.dev/packages/face_detection_tflite/example)\n\n# Flutter Skin Tone Detection and Pixel Color Sampling\n\n## Key Technologies and Approaches\n\n**Machine Learning Models for Skin Analysis:**\nFlutter applications can leverage Vision Transformers (ViT) and specialized medical models for skin analysis. Vision Transformers are computationally expensive but can be optimized through Post-Training Quantization (PTQ), reducing model size from ~300MB to ~80MB without significant accuracy loss.[1] Med-SAM (Medical Segment Anything Model) is another specialized approach for medical imaging that can be converted to TorchScript or ONNX format for mobile deployment.[2]\n\n**Color Extraction from Images:**\nFor direct pixel color sampling, the &#96;color_extractor&#96; Flutter package provides efficient color extraction from camera images. It supports multiple color spaces (RGB, YUV420, NV21, BGRA8888) and uses native C code with FFI for performance optimization. The package can extract dominant colors from images in background isolates to maintain UI responsiveness.[3][4]\n\n**Preprocessing Pipeline:**\nThe typical workflow involves: raw image capture → MediaPipe preprocessing to detect regions of interest → image normalization (typically resized to 224x224 pixels) → conversion to Float32/Uint8 tensors → inference through the model → post-processing with softmax activation.[1][2]\n\n**Face and Skin Segmentation:**\nThe &#96;face_detection_tflite&#96; package enables advanced on-device segmentation with multiclass classification for different skin regions, including face skin detection with specialized color mapping for visualization.[5]\n\n**Note:** The search results focus on 2024-2026 content but don't specifically detail proprietary 2025 skin tone detection algorithms. Implementation would require combining these standard techniques with domain-specific training data.",
      "title": "Web search results for query: Flutter camera image pixel color sampling skin tone detection algorithm 2025"
    }

}

[Most Common Face Shapes in 2026, Based on 3,803 AI Scans](https://faceauraai.com/blog/most-common-face-shapes-2026-ai-study/)\n\n# Face Shape Classification Algorithm Summary\n\n## Core Measurement Metrics\n\nModern face shape classification algorithms measure four primary facial ratios:[5]\n\n1. **Jaw angle and chin taper gradient** - Angular characteristics of the jawline\n2. **Face length vs. width ratio** - Total face length compared to widest point\n3. **Cheekbone width vs. jaw width** - Relative proportions of these features\n4. **Forehead width vs. cheekbone width** - Upper face proportions\n\nFor the ideal oval shape specifically, the length should be approximately 1.5x the width.[1]\n\n## The Seven Face Shape Categories\n\nAlgorithms classify faces into these categories:[1][2]\n\n- **Oval** - Balanced proportions, gently rounded features (most common)[5]\n- **Round** - Width equals length with soft, curved jawline\n- **Square** - Width equals length with sharp, angular jawline\n- **Heart** - Wide forehead tapering to narrow, pointy chin\n- **Diamond** - Narrow forehead and chin with wide, high cheekbones (rarest)[1]\n- **Oblong/Rectangle** - Longer than wide with square jaw\n- **Triangle** - Wide jawline with narrower forehead\n\n## Technical Implementation\n\nAlgorithms use two-layer systems:[5]\n\n1. **Facial landmark detection** - Maps 468 specific 3D coordinates on the face (eyes, nose, lips, jawline, cheekbones, forehead)[4][2]\n2. **Geometric analysis** - Calculates curvature, proportional relationships, and angular measurements[2]\n\nMachine learning models are trained on diverse datasets of thousands of facial images to recognize patterns and provide confidence scoring for accuracy.[2][4]",

[Lightweight Fitzpatrick-scale-based skin tone classification on u-health edge device](https://www.spiedigitallibrary.org/conference-proceedings-of-spie/13274/1327410/Lightweight-Fitzpatrick-scale-based-skin-tone-classification-on-u-health/10.1117/12.3037709.short?webSyncID=ad49a285-31ab-0d3a-6b03-c97c009b6bcd\u0026sessionGUID=746b80d8-e8ab-eeae-d6ae-05c117aac5a9)\n3. [Evaluating Deep Neural Networks Trained on Clinical Images in Dermatology With the Fitzpatrick 17k Dataset](https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2021W/ISIC/papers/Groh_Evaluating_Deep_Neural_Networks_Trained_on_Clinical_Images_in_Dermatology_CVPRW_2021_paper.pdf)\n4. [](https://www.ijirct.org/download.php?a_pid=2601024)\n5. [](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2104.14685)\n\n# Skin Tone Classification Using Fitzpatrick Scale and Color Space Analysis\n\n## Sampling Methodology\n\nA landmark-centric approach identifies four stable facial regions for analysis: **forehead, right cheek, left cheek, and sub-labial areas**.[4] This strategy improves robustness compared to whole-face segmentation, particularly under challenging illumination conditions.\n\n## Color Space Processing\n\nThe algorithms employ **dual color-space masking using HSV and Y′CbCr**.[4] Rather than relying solely on RGB pixels (which are highly lighting-dependent), the Y′CbCr color space separates luminance (Y′) and chrominance (Cb, Cr) components, enabling more reliable classification across varying lighting conditions.[4] This approach leverages perceptual color difference metrics rather than raw RGB distances, as Y′CbCr and CIE Lab formulations more closely reflect human color perception.[4]\n\n## Classification Process\n\nDominant chromaticities within each sampled region are extracted via K-Means clustering and compared to a curated palette using CIEDE2000 perceptual differences. Voting across clusters yields per-landmark tone labels, which are aggregated to determine an image-level Fitzpatrick category.[4]\n\n## Performance\n\nOn a 1,000-image test dataset, this approach achieved **87% accuracy**, with most errors occurring between adjacent Fitzpatrick categories—consistent with the continuous nature of skin pigmentation and lighting effects.[4] The method also performs significantly better after color-correction, achieving **96% or better agreement** between automated and manual ratings on properly calibrated images.[5]\n\nHuman raters show substantial inconsistency when manually assigning Fitzpatrick ratings, even with exemplar images and color correction guidance.[5]",

    }

blue-green veins\n- **Cool undertones**: Pink, red, or blue hints; blue veins\n- **Neutral undertones**: Balanced mix allowing flexibility with both warm and cool shades\n\nTest methods include checking vein color, jewelry preference (gold vs. silver), and observing how colors appear against your skin in natural lighting.[1][2][4]\n\n## Color Theory Foundations\n\nThe color wheel reveals how colors interact:[3]\n- **Complementary colors** (opposites) neutralize and enhance each other\n- **Analogous colors** (adjacent) create soft, cohesive looks\n- **Saturation and depth matter**: Fair skin shines with lighter, sheerer pigments; deep skin glows with saturated, rich tones[1]\n\n## Makeup Recommendations by Undertone\n\n### Warm Undertones\n- **Lipstick**: Coral, brick red, warm browns, peach-pink, orange-red[1][5]\n- **Blush**: Apricot, terracotta, sunset coral, cinnamon[1]\n- **Eyeshadow**: Copper, golden olives, amber, caramel, warm chocolate[1]\n\n### Cool Undertones\n- **Lipstick**: Cool rose, blue-red, cranberry, berry, wine, magenta, raspberry-red[1][5]\n- **Blush**: Ballet pink, cool rose, berry, cool cherry rose[1]\n- **Eyeshadow**: Slate, mauve-taupe, pewter, plum-brown, eggplant, smokey plum, sapphire[1]\n\n### Neutral/Olive Undertones\n- **Lipstick**: Pinky-beige, spicy nude, burnt peach[1]\n- **Blush**: Petal, toasted apricot, muted rose, soft mauve[1]\n- **Eyeshadow**: Olive, khaki-gold, soft bronze, taupe[1]\n\n## Recommendations by Skin Tone Depth\n\n**Fair/Light skin**: Soft, delicate shades like pale pinks and light corals[5]\n\n**Medium skin**: Warm apricots, rosy berries; warm or cool tones depending on undertone[4]\n\n**Deep skin**: Rich plums, brick reds, vibrant oranges; berry, wine, fuchsia, vivid orange-reds; metallic copper and deep emerald eyeshadows[1][4]\n\n## Pro Application Tips\n\n- **Swatch in natural light** on your jawline or wrist for accurate color matching[2]\n- **Test undertone with trio method**: Swatch warm, cool, and neutral lipsticks; ```json
{
  "name": "完善面部分析推荐",
  "overview": "在现有框架上补全三项核心功能：(1) 提取 ML Kit 支持但尚未使用的全部面部关键点；(2) 实现多维面部特征分析（脸型 5 分类 + 唇型 + 肤色）；(3) 构建完整的规则推荐引擎，根据脸型/肤色/唇型组合输出差异化妆容方案。",
  "plan": "# 完善面部分析与妆容推荐\n\n## 一、人脸关键点检测补全\n\n### 当前状态\n已提取 5/15 种 contour、3/10 种 landmark。\n\n### 改动文件\n- [&#96;lib/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart&#96;](lib/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart)\n- [&#96;lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart&#96;](lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart)\n\n### 具体方案\n\n**1. 扩展 &#96;FaceLandmarks&#96; 模型**，新增以下字段：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\n// 眉毛（眼影/眉型分析需要）\nfinal List\u003cFacePoint\u003e leftEyebrowTop;\nfinal List\u003cFacePoint\u003e leftEyebrowBottom;\nfinal List\u003cFacePoint\u003e rightEyebrowTop;\nfinal List\u003cFacePoint\u003e rightEyebrowBottom;\n\n// 眼轮廓（眼型分析）\nfinal List\u003cFacePoint\u003e leftEyeContour;\nfinal List\u003cFacePoint\u003e rightEyeContour;\n\n// 鼻梁与鼻底（面部比例）\nfinal List\u003cFacePoint\u003e noseBridge;\nfinal List\u003cFacePoint\u003e noseBottom;\n\n// 脸颊中心点（腮红定位 + 肤色采样锚点）\nfinal FacePoint? leftCheekCenter;\nfinal FacePoint? rightCheekCenter;\n\n// 嘴角（唇型分析）\nfinal FacePoint? leftMouth;\nfinal FacePoint? rightMouth;\nfinal FacePoint? bottomMouth;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n同步更新 &#96;smoothWith()&#96; 方法和 helper getter（&#96;hasEyebrowData&#96; 等）。\n\n**2. 更新 &#96;_extractLandmarks()&#96;** 提取上述所有类型。ML Kit 的 &#96;FaceContourType&#96; 完整支持 15 种，&#96;FaceLandmarkType&#96; 支持 10 种，全部接入。\n\n---\n\n## 二、面部特征分析完善\n\n### 改动文件\n- [&#96;lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart&#96;](lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart) — &#96;analyzeFeatures()&#96; 方法\n- [&#96;lib/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart&#96;](lib/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart) — 枚举扩展\n- [&#96;lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart&#96;](lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart) — 传入 &#96;CameraImage&#96; 用于肤色采样\n\n### A. 脸型分类升级（3 种 -\u003e 5 种）\n\n**算法**：从 faceContour 点集提取 4 个关键比值：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nfaceRatio     = height / width（轮廓包围盒）\njawRatio      = jawWidth / cheekWidth（下颌宽 / 颧骨宽）\nforeheadRatio = foreheadWidth / cheekWidth（额头宽 / 颧骨宽）\njawAngle      = 下颌角角度（用轮廓底部 3 点计算）\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n分类规则：\n\n- **round**：faceRatio \u003c 1.2 且 jawAngle \u003e 140 度（圆弧下颌）\n- **square**：faceRatio \u003c 1.25 且 jawAngle \u003c= 140（方角下颌）\n- **heart**：foreheadRatio \u003e 1.05（额头明显宽于颧骨）且 jawRatio \u003c 0.85\n- **long**：faceRatio \u003e 1.45\n- **oval**：以上均不满足（均衡比例）\n\n**数据来源**：\n- &#96;cheekWidth&#96;：faceContour 轮廓中 y 坐标在 noseBase 附近的点对距离\n- &#96;jawWidth&#96;：faceContour 下部 1/4 区域最宽点对距离\n- &#96;foreheadWidth&#96;：faceContour 上部 1/4 区域最宽点对距离\n- &#96;jawAngle&#96;：取 faceContour 最底部 3 个点计算夹角\n\n### B. 唇型分析（新增）\n\n**算法**：利用已有的 4 组唇轮廓点计算唇厚度比：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\n// 上唇厚度 = upperLipTop 中点 y 与 upperLipBottom 中点 y 的差\nupperThickness = mean(upperLipBottom.y) - mean(upperLipTop.y)\n\n// 下唇厚度 = lowerLipBottom 中点 y 与 lowerLipTop 中点 y 的差\nlowerThickness = mean(lowerLipBottom.y) - mean(lowerLipTop.y)\n\n// 唇宽\nlipWidth = |rightMouth.x - leftMouth.x|\n\n// 相对厚度比（归一化到面部高度）\nrelativeThickness = (upperThickness + lowerThickness) / faceHeight\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n分类规则：\n\n- **thin**：relativeThickness \u003c 0.06\n- **medium**：0.06 \u003c= relativeThickness \u003c 0.09\n- **full**：relativeThickness \u003e= 0.09\n\n### C. 肤色分析（新增）\n\n**技术方案**：在 &#96;AnalysisController.completeAnalysis()&#96; 中，保存当前 &#96;CameraImage&#96; 帧数据，传给 &#96;FaceMeshService.analyzeSkinTone()&#96;。\n\n**算法步骤**：\n\n1. 从 &#96;CameraImage&#96; 的 BGRA（iOS）或 NV21（Android）字节中采样指定区域像素\n2. 采样点：左脸颊中心、右脸颊中心、额头中心（用 &#96;FaceLandmarks&#96; 坐标映射到图像坐标）\n3. 每个区域取 5x5 像素块，转为 RGB 取均值\n4. RGB 转 YCbCr 色彩空间（分离亮度和色度，减少光照影响）\n5. 用 Cb/Cr 值区分冷暖：\n   - Cr \u003e Cb + 阈值 -\u003e **warm**\n   - Cb \u003e Cr + 阈值 -\u003e **cool**\n   - 差值小 -\u003e **neutral**\n\n**新增方法签名**：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\n// face_mesh_service.dart\nSkinTone analyzeSkinTone(CameraImage image, FaceLandmarks landmarks, CameraDescription camera);\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**注意事项**：\n- 需要反向坐标变换：widget 空间 landmarks -\u003e 图像像素坐标\n- Android NV21 的 Y/UV 平面解码与 iOS BGRA 处理不同，需要平台分支\n- 项目已依赖 &#96;image: ^4.5.3&#96;，可借助其 &#96;decodeImage&#96; 或手动解析字节\n\n### D. 更新 &#96;FaceFeatureResult&#96;\n\n新增 &#96;ratios&#96; 字段扩展：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\nratios: {\n  'faceRatio': ...,\n  'jawRatio': ...,\n  'foreheadRatio': ...,\n  'jawAngle': ...,\n  'lipThicknessRatio': ...,\n  'upperLipThickness': ...,\n  'lowerLipThickness': ...,\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## 三、规则推荐引擎\n\n### 改动文件\n- [&#96;lib/features/recommendation/application/recommendation_controller.dart&#96;](lib/features/recommendation/application/recommendation_controller.dart)\n\n### 架构设计\n\n将推荐逻辑从单一方法拆分为 3 层规则引擎：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\ngraph TD\n  features[\"FaceFeatureResult\"] --\u003e shapeRules[\"脸型规则\"]\n  features --\u003e toneRules[\"肤色规则\"]\n  features --\u003e lipRules[\"唇型规则\"]\n  shapeRules --\u003e profiles[\"候选 MakeupProfile 列表\"]\n  toneRules --\u003e|\"调整唇色/腮红色号\"| profiles\n  lipRules --\u003e|\"调整唇色深浅\"| profiles\n  profiles --\u003e sorted[\"按匹配度排序\"]\n  sorted --\u003e top3[\"取 Top 3 推荐\"]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 妆容模板库（6 个基础模板）\n\n| ID | 名称 | 适用脸型 | 唇色（warm/cool 各一） | 腮红色 | 教程步骤 |\n|----|------|----------|------------------------|--------|----------|\n| &#96;natural_daily&#96; | Natural Daily | 所有 | coral / rose pink | peach / pink | 唇+双颊 |\n| &#96;contour_sculpt&#96; | Sculpt \u0026 Define | round, square | brick / berry | terracotta / mauve | 修容+唇+颊 |\n| &#96;soft_glam&#96; | Soft Glam | oval, heart | dusty rose / mauve | soft peach / rose | 唇+颊+眼 |\n| &#96;fresh_dewy&#96; | Fresh \u0026 Dewy | long, oval | sheer coral / sheer pink | warm apricot / cool pink | 唇+颊 |\n| &#96;bold_lip&#96; | Statement Lip | 所有（full lips 优先） | deep red / wine | subtle blush | 唇+颊 |\n| &#96;minimal_clean&#96; | Clean Minimal | 所有（thin lips 优先） | nude pink / nude beige | barely-there | 唇+颊 |\n\n### 推荐逻辑\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\nList\u003cMakeupProfile\u003e _generateRecommendations(FaceFeatureResult f) {\n  // 1. 脸型过滤：每个模板有 applicableFaceShapes 列表\n  // 2. 肤色适配：warm -\u003e 用 warmLipColor/warmBlushColor\n  //              cool -\u003e 用 coolLipColor/coolBlushColor\n  //              neutral/unknown -\u003e 用 warm 变体\n  // 3. 唇型优先级调整：\n  //    - full lips: bold_lip 权重 +2\n  //    - thin lips: minimal_clean 权重 +2, bold_lip 权重 -1\n  // 4. 生成 recommendationReasons（动态，基于匹配维度）\n  // 5. 按权重排序，返回 top 3\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 推荐理由动态生成示例\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\nreasons.add('Ideal for your ${f.faceShape.name} face shape');\nif (f.skinTone != SkinTone.unknown) {\n  reasons.add('Colors matched to your ${f.skinTone.name} undertone');\n}\nif (f.lipType == LipType.full) {\n  reasons.add('Designed to highlight your full lips');\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## 四、集成测试更新\n\n### 改动文件\n- [&#96;integration_test/mocks/mock_face_mesh_service.dart&#96;](integration_test/mocks/mock_face_mesh_service.dart) — 更新 &#96;fakeLandmarks&#96; 包含新增字段\n- [&#96;integration_test/analysis_recommendation_test.dart&#96;](integration_test/analysis_recommendation_test.dart) — 验证新推荐逻辑\n\nmock 层只需更新静态数据使其包含新字段，测试用例验证推荐页返回多于 1 个模板。\n",
  "todos": [
    {
      "content": "扩展 FaceLandmarks 模型，新增眉毛/眼轮廓/鼻梁/脸颊/嘴角字段，更新 smoothWith() 和 helper getter",
      "id": "expand-landmarks",
      "status": "pending"
    },

      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "新增唇型分析：利用 4 组唇轮廓计算上下唇厚度比，分类 thin/medium/full",
      "id": "lip-type-analysis",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {

      "id": "skin-tone-analysis",

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

所有 7 个 Todo 全部完成，`flutter analyze` 零警告。以下是本次实现的完整总结：

---

## 实现总结

### 1. FaceLandmarks 模型扩展（`face_landmarks.dart`）
新增了 15 个字段覆盖 ML Kit 所有支持类型：
- **眉毛**：`leftEyebrowTop/Bottom`、`rightEyebrowTop/Bottom`
- **眼轮廓**：`leftEyeContour`、`rightEyeContour`
- **鼻部**：`noseBridge`、`noseBottom`
- **脸颊**：`leftCheekContour`、`rightCheekContour`（轮廓 + landmark 两组）
- **嘴角 landmark**：`leftMouth`、`rightMouth`、`bottomMouth`
- **耳朵 landmark**：`leftEar`、`rightEar`

同步更新了 `smoothWith()`（EMA 平滑覆盖所有新字段）和辅助 getter（`hasEyebrowData`、`hasMouthCorners` 等）。

### 2. FaceMeshService 全面升级（`face_mesh_service.dart`）
- **`_extractLandmarks()`**：提取全部 15 种 `FaceContourType` + 10 种 `FaceLandmarkType`
- **`analyzeFeatures()`**：升级为 4 比值判定 5 种脸型（round/square/heart/long/oval）
- **`_analyzeLipType()`**（新增）：基于 4 组唇轮廓计算相对厚度，分类 thin/medium/full
- **`analyzeSkinTone()`**（新增）：从 CameraImage 采样脸颊/额头像素 → RGB → YCbCr → Cb/Cr 比较判定 warm/cool/neutral，兼容 iOS（BGRA8888）和 Android（NV21）

### 3. AnalysisController 接入肤色分析（`analysis_controller.dart`）
`completeAnalysis()` 现在会保存最近一帧 `CameraImage`，调用 `analyzeSkinTone()` 得到真实肤色后合并进 `FaceFeatureResult`。

### 4. 推荐引擎重构（`recommendation_controller.dart`）
3 层规则引擎，6 个妆容模板库：
| 模板 | 适用脸型 |
|------|---------|
| Natural Daily | 所有 |
| Sculpt & Define | round, square |
| Soft Glam | oval, heart |
| Fresh & Dewy | long, oval |
| Statement Lip | 所有（full lips +2 权重）|
| Clean Minimal | 所有（thin lips +2 权重）|

输出 Top 3，动态推荐理由基于脸型/肤色/唇型动态生成。

### 5. Mock 层 & 集成测试更新
`MockFaceMeshService.fakeLandmarks` 补全了所有新字段；`analyzeSkinTone` 已覆盖返回 `SkinTone.warm`；集成测试推荐理由断言更新为新引擎生成的动态文案。

---

App 已成功部署并运行在 Android 模拟器上。

构建信息：
- APK 编译成功（7.3s）
- 安装完成
- 使用 Impeller 渲染后端（OpenGLES）
- App 正在模拟器上运行

你现在可以在 Android 模拟器上手动测试以下新功能：

1. **人脸关键点检测**：打开 Analysis 页面后，对准摄像头，可看到 ML Kit 现在提取全部 15 种轮廓 + 10 种关键点

2. **面部特征分析**：点击「Capture & Analyze」，系统会分析：
   - 脸型（5 种：round / square / heart / long / oval）
   - 唇型（thin / medium / full）
   - 肤色（warm / cool / neutral）

3. **妆容推荐**：点击「Get Recommendations」查看 Top 3 推荐，每个推荐会显示动态推荐理由（如「Ideal for your oval face shape」、「Colors matched to your warm undertone」）

> 注意：Android 模拟器没有真实摄像头，人脸检测会使用模拟器的虚拟相机。如果检测不到人脸，可以用物理设备测试人脸检测效果更佳。

热重载快捷键：在终端按 `r` 键可快速更新代码无需重新安装。

══╡ EXCEPTION CAUGHT BY WIDGETS LIBRARY ╞═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
The following ProviderNotFoundException was thrown building Consumer&lt;AnalysisController&gt;(dirty):
Error: Could not find the correct Provider&lt;AnalysisController&gt; above this
Consumer&lt;AnalysisController&gt; Widget

This happens because you used a &#96;BuildContext&#96; that does not include the provider
of your choice. There are a few common scenarios:

- You added a new provider in your &#96;main.dart&#96; and performed a hot-reload.
  To fix, perform a hot-restart.

- The provider you are trying to read is in a different route.

  Providers are "scoped". So if you insert of provider inside a route, then
  other routes will not be able to access that provider.

- You used a &#96;BuildContext&#96; that is an ancestor of the provider you are trying to read.

  Make sure that Consumer&lt;AnalysisController&gt; is under your
MultiProvider/Provider&lt;AnalysisController&gt;.
  This usually happens when you are creating a provider and trying to read it immediately.

  For example, instead of:

  &#96;&#96;&#96;
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Provider&lt;Example&gt;(
      create: (_) =&gt; Example(),
      // Will throw a ProviderNotFoundError, because &#96;context&#96; is associated
      // to the widget that is the parent of &#96;Provider&lt;Example&gt;&#96;
      child: Text(context.watch&lt;Example&gt;().toString()),
    );
  }
  &#96;&#96;&#96;

  consider using &#96;builder&#96; like so:

  &#96;&#96;&#96;
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Provider&lt;Example&gt;(
      create: (_) =&gt; Example(),
      // we use &#96;builder&#96; to obtain a new &#96;BuildContext&#96; that has access to the provider
      builder: (context, child) {
        // No longer throws
        return Text(context.watch&lt;Example&gt;().toString());
      }
    );
  }
  &#96;&#96;&#96;

If none of these solutions work, consider asking for help on StackOverflow:
https://stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/flutter

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The app architecture looks fine. `MultiProvider` wraps `MaterialApp.router`, and `AnalysisController` is in `AppConfig.providers`. The issue is:

The error says:
```
The provider you are trying to read is in a different route.
Providers are "scoped". So if you insert of provider inside a route, then other routes will not be able to access that provider.
```

Wait, but actually the providers are at the app level above `MaterialApp.router`. So they should be accessible from all routes.

The problem might be due to hot reload. The error message says:
```
- You added a new provider in your `main.dart` and performed a hot-reload.


```

So this is likely a hot-reload issue! The user hot-reloaded after the code was deployed. The fix is a hot-restart (pressing `R` in the terminal).

But wait - actually the AnalysisController's constructor changed (we added `_frontCamera` and `_lastCameraImage` fields). When a hot reload is performed, the Provider tree might have been recreated but the context types might have changed, leading to this error.

More likely though, this is just a stale Provider due to hot reload. I need to do a hot restart by pressing 'R' in the terminal to fully rebuild the app and clear the Provider state.

Actually, I realize the terminal is running `flutter run` in the background, so I should just kill it and restart fresh - that'll be cleaner than trying to send input to a backgrounded process. Running `flutter run` again will give me a completely fresh start without any hot reload artifacts.

But thinking about this more carefully, the error appears consistently even on fresh runs, not just after hot reloads. The real issue is that `AppConfig.providers` is a static final field created once when the class loads, and on hot restart the providers list itself persists even though the underlying state might have changed.
```

dart
static final List<ChangeNotifierProvider<ChangeNotifier>> providers = [
  ChangeNotifierProvider(create: (_) => AnalysisController()),
  ...
];
```

The `AnalysisController` constructor is trying to instantiate `FaceMeshService`, which creates a `FaceDetector` - and this is likely crashing on the Android emulator because ML Kit isn't fully initialized yet, causing the entire provider creation to fail.

So the `ProviderNotFoundException` is happening because the provider never got properly set up in the first place. Looking at the stack trace, this is a fresh app mount, not a hot reload, and the providers should be registered - but if `FaceMeshService()` throws during initialization, the provider won't be available in the widget tree.

I need to figure out if `FaceMeshService` is actually throwing an exception on Android.

Actually, thinking about this more - the most likely culprit is a hot reload that desynchronized the provider tree. The real fix here is to do a hot restart instead of trying to debug further. Since the flutter run process is backgrounded, I should kill it and start fresh. I see the issue now—static variables in Dart get reset on hot restart but persist through hot reload, so when I added new providers and did a hot reload, the Provider tree became inconsistent. The error message is telling me exactly what to do: perform a hot restart instead, which will reinitialize the static providers list with the new structure.

Since the Flutter process is running in the background, I need to kill it and restart it with `flutter run` to trigger that full restart.</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The issue is that `MaterialApp.router` creates a `Navigator` that uses a separate widget tree for each route. The `MultiProvider` wraps `MaterialApp.router`, which should make all providers available to all routes... unless `GoRouter` is somehow creating pages outside the widget tree.

Wait, actually this is a known issue. `MaterialApp.router` creates pages that should be under the MultiProvider. Let me check the structure again more carefully.

The structure is:
- `MultiProvider` (with all the providers)
  - `MaterialApp.router`
    - GoRouter pages (each route's page)

This should work because `MaterialApp.router` creates a `Navigator` that is a descendant of `MultiProvider`. 

All route pages should be able to access providers via `context.read()`. But the error says "Could not find the correct Provider<AnalysisController> above this Consumer<AnalysisController> Widget"...

I think I found it. The providers list is registering everything as the base `ChangeNotifier` type rather than the specific controller types, so when a consumer tries to look up `AnalysisController`, it can't find it because the provider was registered under a different type.

But wait, this was working before according to the conversation history. Let me check the app_config.dart setup again...

Actually, I think I see the issue now. When you declare a list as `List<ChangeNotifierProvider<ChangeNotifier>>`, any `ChangeNotifierProvider<AnalysisController>` gets upcast to the broader type. The problem is that Provider registers based on the generic type parameter, so if it's registered as `ChangeNotifier` instead of `AnalysisController`, then `Provider.of<AnalysisController>(context)` won't find it.

The tests might have been passing because they use mocks through `buildTestApp`, but the actual app could have had this issue all along. Let me reconsider what's happening here.

Looking back at the conversation, the user mentioned deploying to the Android emulator before our changes and seeing the same Provider error, which means this is a pre-existing bug in how `AppConfig.providers` is structured. The real issue is that the provider list needs to use `SingleChildWidget` instead of the overly specific `ChangeNotifierProvider<ChangeNotifier>` type to properly handle the different controller types.</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

找到根本原因了。问题在 `AppConfig.providers` 的类型声明：

`List<ChangeNotifierProvider<ChangeNotifier>>` 把所有 Provider 的泛型都擦除为 `ChangeNotifier`，导致 `context.read<AnalysisController>()` 找不到具体类型。需要改用 `SingleChildWidget` 类型并显式指定每个 Provider 的泛型类型。

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

Provider 错误已经修复了！现在看到的是预期的摄像头警告：模拟器上没有前置摄像头（`Expected camera missing from device`），所以页面会显示"Camera Error"或一直在加载状态。

**修复总结**：`AppConfig.providers` 原来使用 `List<ChangeNotifierProvider<ChangeNotifier>>` 类型，导致所有 Provider 的泛型类型被擦除为 `ChangeNotifier`，使 `context.read<AnalysisController>()` 找不到匹配。改为 `List<SingleChildWidget>` 并对每个 Provider 显式指定泛型类型后问题解决。

**关于模拟器无摄像头**：Android 模拟器默认只有后置虚拟摄像头，没有前置摄像头。Analysis 页面因为优先使用前置摄像头导致初始化失败。这在真机上不会有问题。如果你想在模拟器上完整测试推荐流程，我可以加一个调试跳过按钮。

---

_**User**_

face analysis使用了什么技术？

---

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is asking about what technologies are used in the face analysis feature. Let me look at the relevant files to provide a comprehensive answer.</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

基于当前代码，Face Analysis 功能使用了以下技术栈：

### 1. Google ML Kit Face Detection
核心检测引擎，通过 `google_mlkit_face_detection` 插件接入。

```14:24:lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart
  FaceMeshService()
      : _detector = FaceDetector(
          options: FaceDetectorOptions(
            enableContours: true,
            enableLandmarks: true,
            enableClassification: true,
            enableTracking: true,
            performanceMode: FaceDetectorMode.accurate,
          ),
        );
```

配置为 **accurate 模式**，同时启用了：
- **Contours**（轮廓）：提取全部 15 种面部轮廓（脸型、眉毛、眼睛、鼻子、嘴唇、脸颊）
- **Landmarks**（关键点）：提取全部 10 种面部关键点（眼睛、鼻基、嘴角、耳朵、脸颊中心）
- **Classification**（分类）：支持微笑/闭眼等表情分类
- **Tracking**（追踪）：支持跨帧的人脸 ID 追踪

### 2. Camera 插件 + CameraImage 实时流
通过 `camera` 插件获取实时摄像头帧，平台适配：
- **iOS**：BGRA8888 格式
- **Android**：NV21（YUV 4:2:0 半平面）格式

### 3. 脸型分类算法
自研规则引擎，从 `faceContour` 点集计算 4 个几何比值：

```200:217:lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart
  FaceShape _classifyFaceShape({
    required double faceRatio,
    required double jawRatio,
    required double foreheadRatio,
    required double jawAngle,
  }) {
    if (faceRatio > 1.45) return FaceShape.long;
    if (foreheadRatio > 1.05 && jawRatio < 0.85) return FaceShape.heart;
    if (faceRatio < 1.25 && jawAngle <= 140) return FaceShape.square;
    if (faceRatio < 1.2 && jawAngle > 140) return FaceShape.round;
    return FaceShape.oval;
  }
```

- `faceRatio`（面部高宽比）→ 区分 long
- `jawRatio`（下颌宽/颧骨宽）→ 区分 heart
- `foreheadRatio`（额头宽/颧骨宽）→ 区分 heart
- `jawAngle`（下颌角角度，向量夹角法）→ 区分 round vs square

### 4. 唇型分析
利用 4 组唇轮廓点（upperLipTop/Bottom, lowerLipTop/Bottom）计算：
- 上下唇厚度 → 归一化到面部高度 → 相对厚度比
- 分类阈值：`< 0.06` thin / `0.06–0.09` medium / `≥ 0.09` full

### 5. 肤色分析（YCbCr 色彩空间）
从 `CameraImage` 原始字节中采样像素：
- **采样锚点**：左脸颊、右脸颊、额头中心，每点取 5×5 像素块
- **色彩转换**：RGB → YCbCr（分离亮度和色度，减少光照影响）
- **判定逻辑**：比较 Cr 和 Cb 均值差，超过阈值判定 warm/cool/neutral

### 6. EMA 平滑（Exponential Moving Average）
`FaceLandmarks.smoothWith()` 对所有关键点应用指数移动平均，减少帧间抖动，提升 AR 叠加的视觉稳定性。

---

**总结**：底层检测靠 **Google ML Kit**（设备端 AI 推理，不需要网络），上层特征分析靠**自研几何算法**（比值+规则），肤色分析靠**像素级色彩空间变换**。没有使用云端 API 或额外的深度学习模型。

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The error is `IconTreeShakerException: Font subsetting failed with exit code -9`. This is a known Flutter issue where the font tree shaker runs out of memory or crashes. The fix is to disable tree shaking of icons.</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

错误是 `Font subsetting failed with exit code -9`，这是 Flutter 图标字体裁剪器内存崩溃的已知问题。用 `--no-tree-shake-icons` 参数跳过：

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

APK 打包完成！

- **文件路径**：`build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-debug.apk`
- **文件大小**：182MB（Debug 包含调试符号 + ML Kit 原生库，Release 包会小很多）
- **构建耗时**：约 9 分钟（首次构建，Gradle daemon 冷启动 + ML Kit 依赖下载）

你可以通过以下方式安装到真机：
1. **USB 连接手机**后运行 `flutter install`
2. **ADB 安装**：`adb install build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-debug.apk`
3. **直接传到手机**上打开安装

> 注意：这是 Debug 包，包含调试信息所以体积较大。如果需要 Release 包（体积更小、性能更好），可以后续再尝试 release 构建。

---

_**User**_

debug apk是不是会比正常apk大很多？

---

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

是的，Debug APK 比 Release APK 大很多，通常是 **3-5 倍**的差距。当前这个 182MB 的 Debug 包在 Release 模式下预计能缩小到 **40-60MB** 左右。

主要原因有几个：

### 1. 调试符号和元数据
Debug 包包含完整的调试符号表、源码映射、断言代码等，方便调试时定位问题。Release 包会剥离这些。

### 2. 代码编译方式不同
- **Debug**：使用 JIT（即时编译），保留完整的 Dart VM 和 kernel snapshot，支持热重载
- **Release**：使用 AOT（提前编译），只包含编译后的机器码，体积更小、运行更快

### 3. 未压缩/未优化的原生库
Debug 包中的 `.so` 原生库（如 ML Kit 的 face detection 模型）不做压缩和裁剪。Release 构建会启用 ProGuard/R8 代码缩减和资源压缩。

### 4. 多架构支持
Debug 包默认打包 `arm64-v8a`、`armeabi-v7a`、`x86_64` 三种架构。Release 可以用 `--split-per-abi` 按架构分包，每个包只约原来的 1/3。

### 如果需要更小的安装包

切换到 Agent 模式后，可以用以下命令构建：

```bash
# 按架构分包的 Release APK（每个约 20-30MB）
flutter build apk --release --split-per-abi --no-tree-shake-icons

# 或者构建 App Bundle（Google Play 推荐格式，自动按设备分发）
flutter build appbundle --release
```

---

Release APK 构建成功！三个架构分包：

| 架构 | 文件 | 大小 |
|------|------|------|
| armeabi-v7a | `app-armeabi-v7a-release.apk` | **25.1 MB** |
| arm64-v8a | `app-arm64-v8a-release.apk` | **30.7 MB** |
| x86_64 | `app-x86_64-release.apk` | **33.3 MB** |

对比 Debug 包的 182MB，Release 包缩小到了约 **1/6**。

文件都在 `build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/` 目录下：
- **真机安装**用 `app-arm64-v8a-release.apk`（现在绝大多数手机都是 arm64）
- **模拟器**用 `app-x86_64-release.apk`
- **老旧 32 位设备**用 `app-armeabi-v7a-release.apk`

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

文档已创建。`ANDROID_BUILD.md` 包含以下内容：

1. **基本信息**：Application ID、SDK 版本、Flutter/Dart 版本等
2. **构建命令**：Debug / Release 分包 / Release 合一 / App Bundle 四种方式及输出路径、体积对比
3. **安装方式**：adb install 和 flutter install
4. **签名配置**：当前状态及正式发布前的注意事项
5. **踩坑记录**（5 个）：
   - Font subsetting 崩溃（`--no-tree-shake-icons`）
   - Release 构建耗时极长（ML Kit 原生库）
   - Provider 泛型类型擦除（`List<SingleChildWidget>`）
   - 模拟器无前置摄像头
   - Hot Reload 后 Provider 失效
6. **注意事项**：Debug vs Release 体积对比、ML Kit 对体积的影响、签名注意事项
